title: Social Media Content Producer *Superstar Only*
description:
We're hiring a Social Media Content Producer to own the daily execution, publishing, and production operations behind our short-form content engine across Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. This is the hands-on execution role on the social team. You take creative direction and turn it into finished, polished, published content - fast, clean, and on-brand, every single day.



You will be working directly with a creator who has over 4 million followers across platforms, with Instagram as the primary channel. Our content operation is structured like a studio with batch production, performance metrics, and AI-native systems. You report to the Content Strategist who sets the creative direction and generates the ideas. Your job is to bring those ideas to life - editing, designing, scheduling, publishing, tracking performance, and keeping the entire production machine running smoothly.



This is a full-time remote position. We are looking for a fast, detail-oriented executor who can produce high-quality short-form content at volume, manage publishing workflows across multiple platforms, and actively use AI tools to increase speed and output. A genuine interest in health, beauty, and strong visual aesthetics is essential - this is the world we operate in, and you need to live and breathe it.



Responsibilities

- Produce 2 to 3 short-form videos and supporting graphics per day, including editing, trimming, captioning, and polishing content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.

- Execute on creative briefs and direction provided by the Content Strategist, turning concepts into finished, platform-ready assets.

- Design on-brand visuals such as carousels, text graphics, thumbnails, and infographics that support the creator's style and messaging.

- Plan, schedule, and publish short-form content across all platforms while maintaining a balanced mix of educational, inspirational, and trend-based formats.

- Follow short-form trends including audio, hooks, captions, and editing styles, and flag relevant opportunities to the Content Strategist.

- Monitor performance metrics weekly and provide insights, recommendations, and data summaries based on watch time, retention, views, and engagement.

- Source and organize trending sounds, audio, and reference content to support the Content Strategist's ideation process.

- Coordinate collaboration posts and identify smart opportunities for creator crossovers and partnership content.

- Keep systems clean in Asana and Google Drive, ensuring clear task ownership, file naming, version control, and a predictable content runway.

- Use AI tools to streamline editing, captioning, clipping, and repurposing workflows to increase daily output and reduce turnaround time.

- Continuously improve and document production workflows to increase the efficiency and scalability of the content system.



Requirements

- 3+ years of experience creating and publishing short-form content for Instagram, TikTok, and/or YouTube Shorts with proven results.

- Genuine interest in health, beauty, and aesthetics. You naturally follow this space, understand the visual standards, and have an eye for what looks premium.

- Editing and design expertise in short-form video editing using Premiere Pro, CapCut, or Final Cut, and strong design ability using Canva or Photoshop, including thumbnails, carousels, text graphics, and supporting visuals.

- Strong ability to take creative direction and execute it accurately and quickly with minimal revision cycles.

- Deep platform fluency across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and emerging formats, with a clear understanding of distribution mechanics and platform culture.

- Experience managing posting schedules and publishing workflows across multiple platforms, with strong attention to detail, file organization, and systems management.

- Ability to track and interpret performance metrics such as watch time, retention, views, and engagement, and surface insights to inform strategy.

- AI-forward operator who actively uses AI tools in editing and production workflows. Bonus for familiarity with tools such as Runway, VEO or Flow, ChatGPT, or Claude.

- Excellent communication skills for collaborating with the Content Strategist, editors, and cross-functional teams.

- Ability to handle multiple tasks effectively while operating in a high-volume, fast-paced environment.

- Must submit a strong portfolio demonstrating editing, design, and creative execution across multiple short-form formats.

- Recognized for exceptional achievements such as attaining Latin Honors (Summa Cum Laude, Magna Cum Laude, Cum Laude), performance awards, or demonstrating fast career progression into higher roles.



Results

- Social content consistently published within 24 to 48 hours of long-form production wrap.

- Sustained growth in high-quality engagement including shares, saves, retention, and audience sentiment.

- A cohesive, premium social presence that reinforces and amplifies the creator's broader ecosystem.

- Clean, organized production systems with predictable output and minimal missed deadlines.



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of video editing.

- High-speed internet connection plus backup.

- Conducive work environment.



Working Schedule

- Full-time remote position.



Compensation

- Salary will be based on skills, speed, portfolio output, and experience.



Benefits

- Competitive salary.

- Paid Time Off from day one, increasing to 10 days annually after six months with the company.

- Training and development opportunities.

- Opportunity to contribute to a rapidly expanding content team producing world-class creator content.

- Great potential for career advancement into leadership positions.



Application Instructions

Since this is a long-term position, there will be an in-depth qualification process. If you believe you have what it takes, here is what to do next:



Please go to the link below, review the questions carefully, and share the required information.







If you believe you meet our qualifications and requirements, we encourage you to apply now and become a valuable part of our rapidly expanding company.

title: Accounting Lead for Operations
description:
About Us

Pivot Solutions helps businesses across Arizona, Colorado, and New Mexico succeed. We provide practical support in accounting, tax, construction, HR, and business operations. We focus on accuracy, accountability, and real results.



Role Summary

We are looking for an experienced Accounting Manager to lead day-to-day accounting operations for U.S.-based clients. This position focuses on delivering accurate financials, maintaining U.S. tax compliance, and managing a distributed accounting team. The ideal candidate is hands-on, organized, and confident working directly with clients while supervising remote staff.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

	• Handle end-to-end U.S. bookkeeping and accounting for multiple client accounts

	• Monitor and review general ledger activity, reconciliations, and financial statements

	• Ensure all work meets U.S. tax and reporting standards

	• Review team output and provide feedback to maintain quality and consistency

	• Coach and support remote accountants to meet performance expectations

	• Act as the primary accounting contact for assigned clients

	• Deliver accurate monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports

	• Identify opportunities to streamline processes and improve workflows

	• Support client onboarding and ongoing service improvements



What We’re Looking For

	• 7+ years of professional accounting experience

	• Solid background in U.S. tax, accounting, and bookkeeping

	• Experience supporting small to mid-sized U.S. businesses

	• QuickBooks expertise required

	• Prior experience leading, supervising, or reviewing the work of accountants

	• Strong analytical skills with high attention to detail

	• Fluent English communication skills (C2 level)



Education

	• Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related discipline



Remote Setup Requirements

	• Stable, high-speed internet connection

	• Quiet and dedicated work-from-home environment

	• Dual monitors strongly preferred



Schedule

	• US Arizona business hours (11:00pm to 8:00am Philippines time)

title: Remote Architect
description:
We are seeking a licensed Architect or highly experienced architectural professional with a strong background in working with US-based clients to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for producing precise elevations, coordinating MEP (mechanical, electrical, plumbing) layouts, and ensuring that all measurements are meticulously verified. This position requires a deep understanding of construction documentation, interior architecture, and the ability to bridge the gap between conceptual design and technical execution. You will work during U.S business hours and get paid weekly.



Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Architecture (or related field) with 2-3 years of professional experience.



- Proven experience working directly with US-based architecture firms, developers, or clients (knowledge of US building standards, imperial units, and architectural workflows is required).



- Strong creative vision balanced with technical precision.



- Demonstrated ability to manage complex project workflows with high attention to detail.



Responsibilities



- Utilize existing SketchUp models to develop detailed architectural plans, elevations, and construction details. Verify all measurements for electrical, plumbing, and structural elements to ensure accuracy.



- Collaborate with US-based clients, vendors, and internal tea
mbers to interpret project goals, address client needs, and ensure design intent is maintained through the construction documentation phase.

title: Sales Virtual Assistant (Sales Enablement)
description:
About the Company

Located in Campbell, California, MiaRec is an award-winning software company that offers AI-powered Automated Quality Management and Conversation Intelligence solutions for contact centers worldwide. Our Generative AI-powered platform is designed to automate workflows, save costs, boost efficiency, enhance customer experiences, grow revenue, and drive digital transformation.



What We’re Looking For:

We are currently seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Sales Enablement Specialist / Sales Virtual Assistant to support our sales team and help optimize sales admin. This role is ideal for someone who thrives behind the scenes: keeping sales teams organized, equipped, and efficient while working closely with sales, marketing, and leadership in a fast-paced B2B SaaS environment.



What You'll Do:

As a Sales Enablement Specialist / Sales Virtual Assistant, you will play a key role in supporting the sales organization by streamlining administrative processes, maintaining tools and data, and enabling sales to focus on closing deals. Your responsibilities will include:



-Sales Pipeline & CRM Support:

Maintain and update sales pipelines in HubSpot, ensuring accurate deal stages, data hygiene, and visibility. Track follow-ups, tasks, and reminders to support deal progression and sales team efficiency.



-Sales Enablement & Admin Support:

Assist sales reps with day-to-day administrative tasks such as preparing meeting agendas, organizing notes, managing calendars, and ensuring follow-ups are completed on time.



-Sales Materials & Documentation:

Support the creation, organization, and maintenance of sales collateral including pitch decks, proposals, one-pagers, case studies, and internal playbooks using tools like Google Docs, and HubSpot.



-Lead Management & Coordination:

Support inbound and outbound lead workflows by assigning leads, tracking responses, reactivating dormant leads, and coordinating with marketing to ensure smooth handoffs and follow-up execution.



-Lead Generation & Outreach Support:

Assist with outbound lead generation using ZoomInfo, LinkedIn, and Dripify by downloading and keeping records of prospect lists, executing outreach admin tasks, tracking responses, and ensuring all leads and activities are properly documented and followed up in HubSpot.



-Multi-Channel Outreach Support:

Assist with sales outreach campaigns by preparing and recording
 templates, LinkedIn messages, and call scripts. Help schedule outreach sequences (eg. via Dripify) and ensure consistent follow-through by the sales team.



-Event, Webinar & Campaign Support:

Assist with pre- and post-event or webinar coordination, including list preparation, outreach support, follow-up tracking, and reporting.



-Reporting & Sales Insights:

Prepare and maintain sales reports, dashboards, and summaries in HubSpot and Dropbox to help leadership track performance, pipeline health, and activity metrics.



-Sales Process Optimization:

Identify gaps or inefficiencies in sales admin workflows and proactively suggest improvements to tools, templates, and processes that enhance sales admin productivity.



What You'll Bring:

-Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Communications, or a related field (or equivalent experience).

-At least 3 years of experience in Sales Operations, Sales Enablement, Virtual Assistant, or B2B SaaS sales support roles.

-Strong interest in technology, SaaS, and AI-driven solutions.

-Highly organized, detail-oriented, and process-driven.

-Proactive self-starter with the ability to anticipate needs and take ownership.

-Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

-Comfortable working with CRM systems and productivity tools (HubSpot preferred).

-Direct experience with HubSpot CRM, ZoomInfo, LinkedIn outreach tools (including Dripify), and other sales enablement platforms

-Strong time-management skills and ability to juggle multiple priorities.

-Willing to work Mondays to Fridays, 8:00 AM to 4:30 PM Pacific Time (some flexibility may be required when supporting East Coast stakeholders).





What You’ll Need to Work Remotely

Technical Hardware Requirements:

CPU (Processor):

Intel i5 / Ryzen 5 processor or higher

Apple M1 (for macOS users)



RAM:

8GB RAM minimum (16GB preferred)

Storage:

256GB SSD



Other Requirements:

High-quality webcam and headphones for virtual meetings and collaboration





What We Offer

This is a 100% remote opportunity. We offer competitive hourly pay, the chance to work with cutting-edge AI technology, a collaborative and supportive team environment, opportunities for professional growth, and the opportunity to be remotely involved in major industry events such as Enterprise Connect and Contact Center Expo.



Our Core Values

At MiaRec, we don’t just build technology—we build with purpose. Our culture is shaped by five core values that guide how we work, collaborate, and grow:

-Commitment to Excellence – We take pride in high-quality work, push through challenges, and get things done with purpose.

-Proactive Ownership – We don’t wait to be asked. We take initiative and lead with accountability.

-Integrity in Every Action – We do what’s right, not what’s easy—trust is non-negotiable.

-Growth Mindset – We stay curious, welcome feedback, and continuously improve.





If this role sounds like a great fit, we’d love to hear from you.

Due to the high number of applications, only shortlisted candidates who meet the role requirements will be contacted. Thank you!

title: Google Ads (Search) Campaign Manager – Long-Term, Flat Fee Per Account
description:
Job Description



We’re looking for a Google Ads Search-only campaign manager to help manage and optimize multiple client accounts.



This is not an entry-level role and not a “learning opportunity.”

You will be managing live client ad spend, following SOPs, and optimizing for lead quality, not volume.



This is a long-term position for the right person.



What You’ll Be Doing



-Setting up Google Search-only campaigns



-Structuring campaigns and ad groups based on intent



-Writing and rotating ad copy (no AI-only junk)



-Adding and managing negative keywords



-Weekly optimization and cleanup



-Basic performance summaries and notes



You will not:



-Touch budgets without approval



-Use Smart campaigns



-Use Display or Performance Max



-Use broad match without explicit approval



Requirements (Read Carefully)



-Proven experience managing Google Search Ads



-Comfortable following SOPs and rules



-Understands keyword intent and filtering low-quality traffic



Familiar with:



-Conversion tracking



-Call tracking



-Google Business Profile integrations



-Can explain why you made changes, not just what you changed



If you rely heavily on Google “recommendations,” this is not a fit.



Compensation (Flat Fee – Not Hourly)



We pay per account, not per hour.



Campaign Setup: $100 per account (one-time)



Monthly Management: $75 per account



Typical workload:



~8–12 hours for setup (paid flat)



~4 hours per month per active account



A manager handling 15–20 accounts can earn $1,100–$1,500/month consistently.



Trial Period



Paid trial with one account



30 days



Continued work based on quality, communication, and SOP compliance



How to Apply (Required)



Please include:



A 5–7 minute Loom video explaining how you would structure a Google Search campaign for a high-ticket local or commercial service



Screenshots or brief descriptions of accounts you’ve worked on (client info can be blurred)



Your experience level with Google Ads (years, approximate account count)



Applications without a Loom will not be reviewed.



Final Notes



We are building a small, high-quality team.

We value:



-Clear thinking



-Rule-following



-Consistency



-Long-term reliability



If you’re looking to grow with a stable agency and manage accounts responsibly, apply.

title: AI Content Specialist (eCommerce & Amazon)
description:

We’re hiring an AI Content Specialist to produce high-quality eCommerce creative and product content by orchestrating multiple AI platforms. You’ll use ChatGPT, Veo3, Higgsfield, ElevenLabs, Suno, and Caspa to assemble short-form video ads, conversion-focused copy, and marketplace-ready product images, primarily for our eCommerce clients across DTC (Shopify) and Amazon.



Key Responsibilities:

? Produce short creative video ads by combining AI-generated visuals, voice, music, captions, and edited sequences

? Write and refine eCommerce copy: landing pages, product pages, brand messaging, and Amazon listing content (titles, bullets, descriptions, A+ copy)

? Generate and polish product imagery for website listings and Amazon (infographics, lifestyle, variations, image cleanup)

? Turn creative briefs and product inputs into finished deliverables with clear versioning and organized asset handoff

? Maintain brand voice consistency and apply channel best practices (Amazon vs DTC)

? Collaborate with strategists and account leads to support creative testing and iteration cycles

? Follow compliance-safe standards for health/wellness categories (no medical claims; use support-oriented language)



Required Skills & Experience

? Proven experience creating eCommerce content (Amazon and/or Shopify)

? Strong prompt writing + editing judgment (you can improve outputs, not just generate them)

? Working proficiency in: ChatGPT, Veo3, Higgsfield, ElevenLabs, Suno, and Caspa

? Ability to manage multiple tools and assemble outputs into cohesive, on-brand assets

? Sharp copy fundamentals: clarity, conversion intent, and scannable structure

? Strong file organization, naming conventions, and deadline reliability



Nice to Have (Bonus Skills)

? Familiarity with Amazon listing rules, image requirements, and marketplace creative standards

? Experience supporting creative testing workflows (multiple hooks, angles, variants)

? Basic motion/short-form editing sensibility (timing, pacing, retention hooks)



What Success Looks Like

? Fast, consistent production of on-brand ads, listing content, and product imagery

? Clean handoffs: organized assets, clear variations, and minimal revisions

? Content that fits the channel, protects compliance, and supports conversion goals

title: Full-Time Amazon Product Research Specialist (Wholesale)
description:
We are a US-based Amazon wholesale company processing large supplier catalogs (50,
,000+ SKUs per file) and need a detail-oriented product research specialist to join our team full-time.

What You'll Be Doing:

You will receive pre-scanned wholesale supplier lists that have already been filtered down by our proprietary scanning software. Your job is to manually review each remaining product using BuyBotPro and internal tools to determine whether the product is profitable and worth purchasing. This is high-volume, detail-oriented work — not sourcing or lead generation.

On a typical day, you will:



Open a scanned supplier file and work through each row systematically

Run each ASIN through BuyBotPro to evaluate profitability, competition, sales velocity, and risk

Cross-reference data points including net profit, ROI, sales rank trends, number of FBA sellers, Buy Box behavior, IP/brand restrictions, and hazmat/gating status

Flag products that meet our buy criteria and log them in a shared spreadsheet with all relevant data points

Note and skip items that fail criteria (too many sellers, flat/dead rank, restricted, etc.)

Communicate daily via Slack or similar tool, providing end-of-day summaries of products reviewed and leads found



Requirements:



Prior experience with Amazon FBA product research (wholesale or online arbitrage) — at minimum 6 months

Hands-on experience with BuyBotPro (not just "familiar with" — you must have actually used it for product evaluation)

Understanding of Amazon wholesale math: COGS, FBA fees, referral fees, ROI, profit margin, sales rank interpretation

Familiarity with reading Keepa graphs (rank history, price history, seller count trends)

Ability to work independently through large data sets without constant supervision

Strong attention to detail — one incorrect approval on a bulk buy can cost hundreds of dollars

Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace

Available to overlap at least 3-4 hours with US Eastern Time for communication



Nice to Have (not required):



Experience with Keepa, RevSeller, SellerAmp SAS, or similar Chrome extensions

Understanding of Amazon gating, IP complaints, and brand restrictions

Experience working with wholesale supplier catalogs specifically (vs. retail arbitrage or private label)

Familiarity with Amazon Seller Central (inventory management, shipment creation)



What We Provide:



All tool subscriptions and software licenses (BuyBotPro, scanner access, etc.)

Documented SOPs and training videos for our specific workflow

Clear buy criteria and decision-making framework — no guessing

Paid via Wise to your Philippine bank account (bi-weekly)

Long-term position with room to grow into a senior research or sourcing role

Supportive management — we invest in people who deliver results



How to Apply:

To be considered, you MUST complete our screening form here: 

Applications without a completed form will not be reviewed. The form takes about 15-20 minutes and includes a short practical assessment. This is how we identify candidates who actually know what they're doing vs. those who just list "Amazon VA" on their resume.

We are hiring immediately and will begin interviews within one week of posting.

title: Admin to the Chief Marketing Officer
description:
Join Our Value-Centered Team: Where Passion Meets Purpose!



Application Process:

1.
 us your resume in PDF format only. Include ALL of the jobs you've worked at with Month and Year. Do not leave anything out of your resume. Do not leave anything off.  You must provide an explanation of any gaps in your work history.  Include all compensation for every job, project, etc. Do not give us your hourly pay, only your annual compensation or total compensation.  If there is any gap in your resume without an explanation of the gap, you will be disqualified.

2.
 us a 60-second video of yourself answering the following question:

What are the 3 most important things that the company you work for MUST do to show you that they care about you? For example, if they don’t give me these 3 things then that means they don’t care about me. The video CANNOT EXCEED 60 seconds, or you will automatically be disqualified. Be honest, don’t give us nice to hear words.

3. IMPORTANT: Please
 the above two items to 
 to follow the above instructions will result in automatic termination for further interview process.



Company: Achieve Integrative Health, No. 1 Acupuncture Clinic in Cedar Park and Austin surrounding areas

Website: 
/



About the Company:

Join Achieve Integrative Health, Austin, TX's premier acupuncture clinic, and be part of a transformative healthcare journey. For over 18 years, we've championed health restoration, empowering thousands to reclaim their energy, vitality, and joy. Our success stems from a unique blend of Traditional Chinese Medicine and advanced technologies.



At Achieve Integrative Health, we're not just about healthcare; we're about life-changing care. Join us to deliver unparalleled service and results, reshaping healthcare one patient at a time. Let's make lives great again, together!



Let's build the future together! Your skills, combined with our vision and aligned with our values, will pave the path for a brighter tomorrow.



Why Join Us?

• Transform Lives: We're not just another company. At Achieve Integrative Health, WE MAKE a real difference by bringing joy and health back into lives with every interaction.

• Unbounded Growth: There is no limit to your growth with our company. We're on a mission to grow, with plans to expand our healing touch in Austin, Texas and its surrounding areas.

• Empowerment Team Culture: We are known for our team culture because we make it our mission to help our tea
mbers achieve their professional, financial, and personal goals. 



We're Seeking Individuals Who Are Aligned with Our Core Values...

• Service Above Self: You have a CARING heart and a HUMBLE attitude to put patients’ needs before yours.

• Commitment: You are persistent and disciplined in reaching your OWN goals that are demonstrated by your consistent performance and growth.

• Accountable: No excuses allowed. You are responsible for everything that happens to you and everything that doesn’t happen to you. You are responsible for everything that you have and everything that you don’t have.

• Results Oriented: While we acknowledge your effort, you are only rewarded when producing results that are measured via the statistics for your positions and for the company.

• Transparency: You maintain and practice clear, honest, and direct communication about your thoughts and intentions with every tea
mber and every patient.

• Inspirational: You lead by example to inspire our patients to live a healthy lifestyle by living a healthy lifestyle yourself and you lead by example to inspire each tea
mber by constantly striving to reach your own potential.



WHAT WE OFFER:

• Competitive total Compensation: Base salary + performance bonuses in the acupuncture industry that rewards you based on the RESULTS you produce. If you are looking for a guaranteed salary w/o being accountable to meeting KPIs, this is not the team for you.

* A team and environment that is collaborative, accountable, caring, supportive, honest, transparent, as we remove all employees who talk behind peoples back and lack integrity

• Learning & Growth Opportunities: Access a wealth of resources to keep sharpening your mindset, communication, and customer service skills.

• Wellness Initiatives: Benefit from complimentary virtual health services, ensuring your well-being is always a priority.

• Work from Home: Be able to build a career working from home, no more 3-4 hour commutes to work.

• Other Benefits: Paid-Time off and medical insurance for qualified tea
mbers after successfully completing the 90-day training period.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

* assist the Chief Marketing Officer in reviewing
s, marketing material, uploading videos onto social media

* use Editing Apps that integrate AI (ie. CapCut, Canva, ChatGPT) to generate thumbnails, images, reels

* organize all of our marketing tasks and make sure all tasks are executed in a timely manner w/ excellence

* respond to social media comments

* create newsletters

* track All marketing stats

* Transcribe videos into
s and blogs

* vitally important = be able to follow the CMO's instructions

* and additional admin tasks



CHARACTER REQUIREMENTS & QUALIFICATIONS

• You must truly have a caring heart and truly want to help people improve their health, if you are mainly focused on how much money you can make, we are not the team for you

• You must be organized and be able to handle multiple tasks and responsibilities everyday. If you’re looking to only do one or two tasks per day, we are the wrong team for you.

• You must be able to follow instructions exactly as written, if you don’t like reading or following instructions, we are not the right team for you

• You must value Results over effort. If you like to be paid based on how many tasks you completed or how much responsibilities you have, we are not the team for you. We pay ONLY based on you meeting your KPIs, metrics, quotas.

• You must sleep the same schedule 7 days a week. Your Health is our priority, and if you don’t value your own health we don’t want you on our team.

• You must be honest and have integrity. If you are caught lying, you will be immediately terminated.

• You must want to EARN your pay (ie. base salary + bonuses) instead of being given a pay (ie. focused only on base salary) that you didn’t earn.



Computer/Laptop/Internet Requirements:

• Fast and reliable wired internet connection of not less than 10 Mbps

• Secondary and Tertiary Back up Internet

• Intel Core i5 or higher Operating System with at least 8gb RAM

• Excellent quality headset with microphone, and a working webcam

• Quiet, private home office free from noise background or distractions



WORK HOURS

* Option Full-time =  40 hours per week, work schedule is based on your time zone and must be consistent work hours, you cannot work whenever you want.

* Option PART-TIME = Part-time 20 hours/wk, in your timezone, but assignments/projects/tasks must be completed by 6am CST everyday M-F 

* BOTH must attend our morning marketing huddle mon-fri 8:09am CST - 8:45am cst





COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS:

* be able to build a career working from home, no more 3-4 hour commutes to work

* monthly salary for full-time

* pay is based on your ability to produce measurable results and not experience

* the more Qualified Leads you help our clinic generate the higher your compensation

* we offer lucrative performance based bonuses that are paid monthly

* Paid Time Off, Paid Holidays for qualified tea
mbers

* Medical Insurance for qualified tea
mbers

* The biggest Benefit of joining our team is we help our tea
mbers achieve their Personal, Professional and Financial Goals. When was the last time you joined a company that invested resources to help you achieve YOUR professional, financial and personal goals? We could be your first.

title: Junior Operations Coordinator
description:
Date With the Muse



[
](
)



If you can commit to and live with the following principles, then you are the type of person who will be successful and help our company thrive. If you feel this level of engagement is not right for you or that you’re not willing or able to participate with us at this level, we are not a good fit for you.



Our expectation is that you will take the steps necessary to do what you say you are going to do and be accountable for your actions. You are committed to excellence and take pride in a job well done.



We understand that not every person is ready for this level of performance and we appreciate the honesty of those who d
 this is not the right place for them. On the other hand, you would make an ideal candidate to join our company if you are willing to commit to the following principles:



- Accountability: see it, own it, solve it, do it

- Become part of the solution

- Respect for others and their feelings

- Act now.

- Ask the question: “What else can I do?”

- Ask the questions: “What coaching do you have for me?” and “What can I do better?”

- Personal ownership and pride

- Reject average

- Show others that you care



This is not a virtual assistant role.



This is a structured operational coordination role for someone with project management or operations experience who understands sequencing, readiness, and follow-through.



You are not here to “help where needed.”



You are here to ensure the company runs cleanly.



---



## The Real Role



You are the traffic controller of the company’s time resource.



Your responsibility is to ensure:



- The right people are in the right place

- At the right time

- With the right materials

- Fully prepared



Across clients, coaches, the CEO, and potential clients.



Meetings do not proceed without readiness.



Deadlines do not pass silently.



Follow-ups do not disappear.



You protect operational flow.





 Core Responsibilities



 1 Calendar & Readiness Enforcement



You do not just manage calendars.



You:



- Perform pre-meeting readiness checks

- Confirm prerequisites are complete

- Ensure materials are attached in advance

- Validate participant readiness

- Prevent dependency errors

- Escalate when sequencing is wrong



If a meeting is not ready, it does not proceed.



-

2 Cross-Team Coordination



You ensure:



- Coaches have what they need before sessions

- Clients receive required prep materials

- The CEO is not blindsided

- Deliverables are tracked and owned

- Commitments are visible

- Follow-ups are documented and confirmed



You are the continuity layer between tea
mbers.



You prevent dropped balls before they fall.







3 Client & Team Communication



Strong written communication is essential.



You must be able to:



- Write clear, concise updates

- Ask clarifying questions

- Confirm understanding before execution

- Document decisions accurately

- Escalate professionally without drama

- Communicate boundaries clearly



You do not assume.



You confirm.



---



4 Help Desk & Operational Support



You:



- Route tickets accurately

- Respond using existing SOPs

- Escalate policy-related issues

- Identify recurring friction patterns

- Flag documentation gaps



You protect the client experience from preventable errors.



---



 5 Execution with Verification



You:



- Follow checklists precisely

- Test links before marking tasks complete

- Verify time zones and views

- Attach proof of completion

- Complete recurring tasks without prompting



If it’s on the checklist, it gets done.



Without reminders.



---



Non-Negotiable Traits



- Strong executive function

- Exceptional follow-through

- Structured thinking

- Pattern recognition

- Calm escalation when unclear

- High personal accountability

title: Vendor Management Specialist (Engineering Background Required)
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Vendor Management & Procurement Specialist to support vendor sourcing, purchasing operations, and supplier relationships. This role plays a critical part in ensuring efficient procurement processes, cost optimization, and smooth coordination between the business and its vendors.



The ideal candidate has a strong engineering background, allowing them to better understand technical products, specifications, and vendor capabilities. This position is well-suited for someone who is both process-driven and a strong communicator, capable of balancing technical evaluation with vendor coordination and negotiation.



Key Responsibilities

1. Vendor Research & Selection (Primary Focus)

Sourcing & Evaluation

- Identify and research potential vendors and suppliers

- Evaluate vendor offerings based on technical specifications, quality, pricing, and reliability

- Compare products/services to support informed decision-making

- Assist in selecting vendors aligned with business requirements and budget



2. Vendor Communication & Coordination

Vendor Liaison

- Serve as the primary point of contact between the business and vendors

- Communicate inquiries, requirements, and updates regarding orders, pricing, and timelines

- Facilitate negotiations and ensure clarity on terms and expectations



3. Order Processing & Tracking

Procurement Execution

- Manage end-to-end order placement with vendors

- Ensure accuracy of order details, specifications, and quantities

- Track shipments and delivery timelines

- Resolve issues related to delays, discrepancies, or fulfillment



4. Price Negotiation & Cost Management

- Negotiation Support

- Negotiate pricing, terms, and discounts with vendors

- Ensure procurement decisions align with budget and cost-efficiency goals

- Identify opportunities for cost savings and value optimization



5. Invoice Management & Payment Coordination

Financial Coordination

- Review vendor invoices for accuracy and completeness

- Coordinate with internal teams for payment processing

- Address billing discrepancies and resolve issues promptly

- Maintain accurate records of financial transactions



6. Vendor Relationship Management

- Partnership Development

- Build and maintain strong, professional relationships with vendors

- Address concerns and ensure a positive working partnership

- Monitor vendor performance and reliability



7. Data & Documentation Management

Records & Reporting

- Maintain organized records of vendor information, contracts, and communication

- Track procurement activities, pricing history, and transactions

- Ensure proper documentation for audit and reporting purposes



8. Vendor Onboarding

- Onboarding & Compliance

- Assist in onboarding new vendors

- Ensure vendors understand business requirements, processes, and expectations

- Collect and organize necessary documentation and agreements



Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Engineering (required) – Industrial, Mechanical, Civil, or related field preferred

- Proven experience in procurement, vendor management, or supply chain operations

- Strong understanding of technical specifications, materials, or product evaluation

- Experience in vendor negotiation and cost analysis

- Familiarity with procurement tools, spreadsheets, and tracking systems

- Excellent communication and coordination skills

- Strong attention to detail and organizational ability



Work Style & Personality Fit

- Analytical and detail-oriented with strong problem-solving skills

- Proactive and able to manage tasks independently

- Strong communicator with negotiation confidence

- Organized and process-driven

- Able to balance technical evaluation with business priorities

title: Social Media Content Strategist *Superstar Only
description:
We're hiring a Social Media Content Strategist to lead the creative vision, ideation, and strategic direction behind our short-form content engine across Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. This is the senior creative role on the social team. You are the person who has the ideas - who watches a long-form episode and immediately knows which fifteen seconds will stop a scroll, who sees a cultural 
nt and already has three concepts ready before anyone asks.



You will be working directly with a creator who has over 4 million followers across platforms, with Instagram as the primary channel. Our content operation is structured like a studio with batch production, performance metrics, and AI-native systems. You own the creative engine - the ideas, the concepts, the narrative direction, and the quality standard. You manage the Content Producer who handles daily execution, publishing, and platform operations. Together you run a system that produces high-volume, high-quality content every day.



This is a full-time remote position. We are looking for a senior creative operator who generates ideas naturally, understands modern platform dynamics at a deep level, actively integrates AI into workflows, and holds every piece of content to an elite standard. A genuine interest in health, beauty, and strong visual aesthetics is essential - this is the world we operate in, and you need to live and breathe it.



Responsibilities

- Generate and develop original content ideas, concepts, and creative angles on a continuous basis. You are the primary source of what we make and why.

- Identify high-retention 
nts within long-form content and develop them into short-form concepts with clear hooks, narrative arcs, and platform-specific angles.

- Develop creative briefs and direction for each content cycle, giving the Content Producer and editors clear guidance on what to build and how it should feel.

- Lead trend research and cultural awareness across TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts, spotting opportunities early and translating them into on-brand concepts.

- Translate brand strategy into high-performing content concepts, story structures, and creative playbooks that guide all short-form output.

- Define and evolve the brand's visual and tonal identity across platforms, maintaining a cohesive and premium creative standard.

- Direct and approve content through production and post-production, ensuring quality, creative alignment, and platform-ready formatting before anything publishes.

- Manage the Content Producer by setting priorities, providing creative direction, reviewing output, and ensuring disciplined execution of the publishing calendar.

- Analyze performance data at a strategic level, identifying what is working, why it is working, and how to double down or pivot.

- Build and optimize repeatable creative systems, including AI-driven workflows that streamline ideation, editing, and production.

- Partner with the production team to ensure social-first thinking is embedded in long-form content capture and planning.



Requirements

- 5+ years of experience in a creative strategy or production leadership role in digital media, YouTube, branded content, or entertainment with proven results.

- A natural idea generator who consistently develops strong content concepts, creative angles, and fresh approaches without waiting to be briefed.

- Genuine interest in health, beauty, and aesthetics. You naturally follow this space, understand the visual standards, and care about how things look and feel.

- Deep fluency in platform culture and trends. You know what is trending, why it is working, and how to adapt it to a creator's voice without losing authenticity.

- Strong understanding of storytelling, pacing, hooks, and modern platform dynamics across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and emerging formats.

- Demonstrated experience managing at least one direct report and owning creative and performance outcomes.

- Proven ability to operate across creative strategy and production logistics while maintaining high quality standards.

- Editing and design literacy. You do not need to be the hands-on editor, but you must be able to direct editors and designers with precise, actionable feedback.

- AI-forward operator who actively integrates AI into creative and production workflows. Bonus for familiarity with tools such as Runway, VEO or Flow, ChatGPT, or Claude.

- Strong editorial judgment. You can look at a piece of content and immediately know what is missing, what is not working, and how to fix it.

- Excellent communication skills and ability to give clear, concise creative direction.

- Must submit a strong portfolio demonstrating creative direction, ideation, and platform-native content across multiple formats.

- Recognized for exceptional achievements such as attaining Latin Honors (Summa Cum Laude, Magna Cum Laude, Cum Laude), performance awards, or demonstrating fast career progression into higher roles.



Results

- A consistent pipeline of strong content ideas and creative concepts that drive the team's output forward.

- Trending sounds, formats, and cultural 
nts consistently identified and turned into on-brand content before they peak.

- A high-functioning creative system with predictable output and strong quality control.

- Content that reinforces the creator's positioning while maintaining consistency and a premium standard across platforms.

- Measurable increase in traffic from short-form content to long-form assets.



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of handling video production workflows.

- High-speed internet connection plus backup.

- Conducive work environment.



Working Schedule

- Full-time remote position.



Compensation

- Salary will be based on skills, speed, portfolio output, and experience.



Benefits

- Competitive salary.

- Paid Time Off from day one, increasing to 10 days annually after six months with the company.

- Training and development opportunities.

- Opportunity to contribute to a rapidly expanding content team producing world-class creator content.

- Great potential for career advancement into leadership positions.



Application Instructions

Since this is a long-term position, there will be an in-depth qualification process. If you believe you have what it takes, here is what to do next:



Please go to the link below, review the questions carefully, and share the required information.







If you believe you meet our qualifications and requirements, we encourage you to apply now and become a valuable part of our rapidly expanding company.

title: Book Keeper
description:
ARCADY MEDIA | BOOKKEEPER JOB DESCRIPTION



REQUIRED: 

Please complete the following pre-screening form to be considered: 



About Arcady Media

Arcady Media is a Canadian retention marketing agency helping e-commerce brands grow through Klaviyo
 and SMS automation, paid advertising, and conversion rate optimization. With a fast-moving, globally distributed team, Arcady delivers high-quality retention strategies that drive long-term revenue and customer loyalty for its clients.



About the Role

The Bookkeeper owns Arcady Media's core financial operations, from Accounts Receivable and Accounts Payable through to month-end close and financial reporting. This role works closely with the CEO and supports select e-commerce agency clients, ensuring financial data is accurate, structured, and actionable. As the single point of accountability for clean books every month, you will also help translate financial data into the forecasts, dashboards, and insights leadership relies on to make decisions.

This begins as a part-time contractor engagement with a path to a longer-term or expanded role as the agency scales. 



Accounts Receivable & Accounts Payable

-Generate and send client invoices on schedule; track payment status and follow up proactively on overdue accounts.

-Reconcile incoming payments and maintain an accurate, up-to-date Accounts Receivable aging report.

-Process vendor and contractor payments on time; manage payment schedules and maintain organized records of all Accounts Payable transactions.



Bookkeeping & Reconciliation

-Maintain accurate books in QuickBooks Online, primarily on an accrual basis.

-Reconcile bank accounts and credit cards monthly; categorize transactions correctly and flag discrepancies proactively.

-Identify structural issues or inconsistencies in financial data before they compound.

-Maintain organized digital filing for all financial documents and follow internal SOPs consistently.



Payroll Support

-Collect and organize payroll inputs each cycle; coordinate with the external payroll provider.

-Track payroll-related liabilities accurately and ensure timely processing.



Month-End Close

-Deliver clean, audit-ready books by the 5th of each month.

-Prepare a concise month-end summary covering Accounts Receivable/Accounts Payable status and cash position for CEO review.

-Ensure all records are organized and ready for external accountant use.



Financial Analysis & Reporting

-Prepare monthly financial reports for leadership, including Profit & Loss, cash flow, and margin snapshots.

-Build and maintain revenue, expense, and cash-flow forecasts; support scenario modeling as needed.

-Help define and track financial KPIs, translating numbers into clear, decision-ready insights.

-Support external accountants during tax preparation and year-end processes.



Systems, Automation & Continuous Improvement

-Identify and implement workflow improvements to reduce manual work and improve accuracy.

-Leverage modern tools and AI, where they reduce friction and improve reporting quality.

-Follow established SOPs while actively helping refine and evolve them as Arcady scales.

-Stay current on accounting platform updates and proactively identify opportunities to improve financial operations.



Qualifications

-3–7+ years of bookkeeping or financial operations experience.

-Proficient in QuickBooks Online; strong understanding of Accounts Receivable, Accounts Payable, reconciliation, and month-end close.

-Direct experience working with agencies (e-commerce, marketing, or similar) is a strong plus.

-Comfortable reading and preparing Profit & Loss reports, cash flow statements, and basic forecasts.

-Experience working with North American clients (Canada or US); multi-currency (CAD/USD) exposure preferred.

-Systems-minded, detail-oriented, and proactive,  able to manage your own deadlines without oversight.

-Excellent written English communication skills; able to flag issues clearly and early.

-Familiarity with labor-based business models, utilization economics, or profitability by service line is an asset.

title: Appointment Setter Recruiting and Team Manager
description:
Appointment Setter Recruiting and Team Manager



Remote | Long-Term Role | $5/hour + Hiring Bonuses



We are hiring an experienced recruiting and team manager to help us find, hire, and manage outbound appointment setters.



This is not just a recruiting role.



You will be responsible for helping recruit strong candidates, screening them, supporting the hiring process, managing current tea
mbers, helping new hires stay on track, and making sure performance standards and KPIs are being met.



Our appointment setters speak with US business owners and either transfer live calls or book appointments for our closer. Because of that, we need someone who understands phone-based sales talent, knows how to evaluate strong communicators, and can help manage performance after the hire is made.



Working Hours



• 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM Central Time



Responsibilities



• Post and manage job ads  

• Source candidates through OnlineJobs.ph,
 groups, referrals, and other channels  

• Review applications and identify strong candidates  

• Follow up with applicants  

• Request and review voice samples  

• Screen for spoken English, confidence, professionalism, and sales ability  

• Shortlist qualified candidates  

• Help coordinate interviews and hiring steps  

• Track each candidate from application to hire  

• Help onboard new hires  

• Manage current appointment setters and monitor performance  

• Help new hires stay on track during ramp-up  

• Follow up with tea
mbers to make sure expectations are clear  

• Help enforce accountability and consistency  

• Track KPIs and report on team performance  

• Help improve team quality, hiring, and overall results as we grow



Team Environment



You will work closely with leadership and alongside another recruiter as part of a growing team. We want someone who is collaborative, organized, performance-minded, and comfortable taking ownership. This role requires both recruiting ability and management ability.



Required Experience



• Experience recruiting for appointment setters, sales reps, outbound callers, call center agents, or similar roles  

• Management experience overseeing a sales team, call team, recruiting team, or similar performance-based team  

• Experience helping new hires ramp up and stay accountable  

• Experience tracking performance and KPIs  

• Strong understanding of what makes someone effective on the phone  

• Strong written English  

• Organized, dependable, and proactive  

• Able to work independently and help keep others on track



Strong Bonus If You Have



• BPO or call center leadership experience  

• Experience hiring for cold calling or outbound sales roles  

• Experience managing appointment setters or phone sales teams  

• Experience using OnlineJobs.
 and
 groups to source candidates  

• Experience screening for spoken English and phone confidence  

• Experience improving hiring systems and team performance



Pay



• $5/hour base  

• $20 per new hire who officially starts  

• Additional $5 if that hire remains active for 30 days



Officially starts means the hire completes onboarding and begins working.



To Apply, Send



1. A short introduction  

2. Your recruiting experience  

3. The types of sales or outbound roles you have hired for  

4. Your management experience  

5. Your experience managing KPIs or performance  

6. Where you usually find candidates  

7. Your internet speed  

8. Confirmation that you are available to work 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM Central Time  

9. A 60–90 second audio introducing yourself, your recruiting experience, your management background, and how you would find and manage strong appointment setters



Please put TEAM MANAGER at the top of your application.



Learn more about us at

title: Proposal & Client Operations Lead
description:
Role Summary



This role owns the movement of client opportunities from initial conversation through to signed engagement. The focus is on structuring proposals, maintaining pipeline 
ntum, and ensuring no opportunities are lost due to delays or lack of follow-up.



This is not an administrative role. This role requires independent thinking, strong judgment, and the ability to operate in a fast-paced consulting environment.



Key Responsibilities



1. Proposal Development

Translate rough notes and conversations into structured, client-ready proposals

Draft statements of work, scopes, and pricing based on defined frameworks

Ensure proposals are clear, compelling, and aligned to client needs

Maintain and evolve proposal templates and reusable content



2. Pipeline & Deal Management

Track all active leads and opportunities

Proactively follow up with prospects and clients

Identify stalled deals and take action to move them forward

Maintain a simple, effective CRM or tracking system



3. Client Coordination

Coordinate next steps with clients after initial conversations

Manage scheduling, materials, and communication flow

Ensure a high-quality, professional client experience



4. Founder Support (High-Leverage Only)

Prepare briefing notes for sales calls

Highlight risks, gaps, or opportunities in deals

Reduce reliance on the founder for day-to-day coordination



What Good Looks Like (90 Days)



All leads are tracked and visible at any time

Proposals go out within 48 hours of key conversations

No deals are “lost” due to lack of follow-up

Founder is no longer writing proposals from scratch



Ideal Profile



5–10+ years in consulting, agency, or professional services

Strong writing and structuring skills

Highly organized but also proactive and assertive

Comfortable working with senior executives

Able to operate with minimal direction

Responsibilities:

mbers to ensure seamless delivery of accounting services.

- Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills, with the ability to manage multiple tasks efficiently.

- Strong communication skills and ability to interact professionally with clients and tea
mbers.

- Reliable internet connection and ability to work independently in a remote environment.



Additional Requirements:

- Familiarity with an accounting firm's processes and procedures.

Benefits:

Please
 me at 
 with the following:

---

We review every application carefully. We look forward to hearing from you. Initial applications will close on April 2nd.

title: Credentialing Specialist - min 3 years experience (Remote)
description:
Please do NOT spend lots of points to apply. We will not factor in how many points you spend in our selection process and you can spend/bid just 1 point. 



We will only consider applicants who meet the requirements below. If you do not meet these requirements, please do not apply. 



We are a US–TX–based company that builds software and provides related services to healthcare organizations supporting their staff credentialing and learning needs.



We are seeking a Credentialing Specialist with a minimum of 2 years of experience in US-based medical staff insurance credentialing/enrollment. This position is full-time (35-40 hours per week). Because we are based in the US, you must be available to work Monday–Friday, between 8:00am–6:00pm US Central Time.



Qualifications:

* Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience with US medical staff insurance credentialing or payor enrollment; working knowledge of CAQH, PECOS, Availity, and TMHP systems are strongly preferred.

* Proficiency using web-based business software (MS Word, Outlook/Gmail, Excel, Google Docs, Google Sheets, etc.)

* Excellent communication and follow-up abilities with English-speaking clients

* Reliable computer and internet connection

* Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

* Ability to work independently, manage priorities, and meet deadlines in a remote environment.



Responsibilities:

* Maintain provider enrollment information in the credentialing database; generate reports for hospital administration, billing staff, and clinic managers as needed

* Evaluate credentialing/privileging requests and practitioner documentation (education, training, experience) for eligibility

* Compile and present practitioner data for review by appropriate committees or administrators

* Investigate and resolve discrepancies or adverse findings in credentialing information

* Support audits and surveys by regulatory and accreditation agencies

* Obtain and review practitioner sanctions, complaints, and adverse data to ensure compliance

* Verify and document expirables using primary source verification and other accepted methods

* Collaborate with payors and internal teams to stay informed about updates, requirements, and policy changes

* Manage and update provider profiles in CAQH, ensuring accuracy and timely attestations

* Prepare and submit payor credentialing and re-credentialing applications for commercial, Medicare, and Medicaid plans

* Complete and maintain provider enrollments in PECOS (Medicare) and TMHP Medicaid portals in compliance with federal and state regulations

 

The salary for this position is $300 USD per week. We pay weekly via Wise. In addition to the salary, we also offer a benefits package to cover health insurance cards and paid time off for tea
mbers.



Interested candidates should respond to this posting with the following:

* An updated resume

* Confirmation of your availability to meet during U.S. business hours for a few hours each week

* Any relevant certifications or formal training related to credentialing (e.g., CPCS®, CPMSM®) and/or medical services/staffing

* Your best contact
 for interview scheduling



Qualified candidates will be contacted for an interview within the next week. Please be prepared to begin work within a few days to one week after being hired.



Please note - due to the high volume of responses we receive, we may not be able to respond individually to each applicant. If you do not hear back from us within 10 days of applying, you were not selected to interview.

title: Lead Transactions Coordinator & Executive Assistant
description:
I’m a real estate entrepreneur based in Dallas, Texas, running two connected businesses: a real estate sales team that helps buyers and sellers, and a property management company that operates furnished co-living rentals. We use ClickUp for task and project management and Google Drive as our primary file system. We also use Buildium as our main property management tool.



I’m looking for a full-time Real Estate Lead Transaction Coordinator to manage the flow of transactions from contract to close, making sure deadlines are met and nothing falls through the cracks.



This role combines transaction management with systems coordination. You’ll handle communication between agents, clients, title, and lenders — while also ensuring that files and documents for each transaction are organized and fully documented.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

- Manage all real estate transactions from contract to close

- Communicate with agents, clients, title companies, and lenders to ensure smooth closings

- Schedule showings, enter listings, and draft proposals

- Track deadlines, contingencies, and documentation compliance

- Create and update SOPs and workflow documentation for transaction processes

- Coordinate with automation partners for system improvements



YOU’D BE A GREAT FIT IF

- 2+ years of experience as a Real Estate Transaction Coordinator (or a similar role in real estate operations)

- You follow instructions exactly and don’t cut corners

- You write and speak clearly in English

- You stay calm managing many moving parts

- You take ownership and don’t need hand-holding

- You take initiative: you spot issues early, investigate, and propose next steps/solutions

- You use good judgment and can prioritize without being told every step

- You thrive in a fast-paced environment and can adapt quickly as priorities shift

- You are tech-savvy, detail-oriented, and reliable under deadlines

- Understanding of contract timelines, title/lender coordination, and client communication

- Flexibility to work some hours on weekends is preferred





ROLE DETAILS

- Full-time, remote

- Schedule: Mon–Fri, aligned with CST

- Pay: $5-7 USD/hour, based on experience

- Long-term role with growth and bonuses



HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY)

We do not review platfor
ssages.

Applications that don’t follow instructions are disqualified.



STEP 1 —

1. Send an
 to 

2. Subject line: Lead Transactions Coordinator – [Full Name]

3.
 body must include only:

- A short greeting

- A Google Drive folder link

- Your answer to the Detail Check (see Step 3)



STEP 2 — GOOGLE DRIVE FOLDER

1. Create a folder named: [Your Full Name] — Lead Transactions Coordinator Application

2. Set sharing to “Anyone with the link can view.”

3. You can organize the folder however you think is best. I will be looking at both what you submit and how you organize it.

4. Include the following:

a. Resume (PDF)

b. Tech and Setup

   - Include a screenshot of your internet speed showing download and upload speeds. 

   - Include a screenshot of your computer specs showing RAM, processor, and OS.

   - Include one photo of your current workspace (desk and computer).

c. Written Answers (one Google Doc)

   - Transactions Coordinator Experience

      - Describe one property management role or company you worked with. Include:

      - Number of properties/units

      - Your day-to-day responsibilities

      - Tools you used 

   - Taking Ownership

      - We already have SOPs and systems, but they’re still improving.

      - What would you focus on in your first 2 weeks to keep operations running smoothly without needing constant supervision?

d. Systems Proof (2–4 screenshots)

   - At least 1 “HQ” or home base view you’ve built (for a founder/team)

      Example: a dashboard, control panel, or main view in ClickUp, Asana, Notion, etc.

   - At least 1 project management board or folder structure you created

      Example: a tool for maintenance tracking, tenant or leasing pipeline, or vendor coordination

   - For each screenshot, add a short caption (this can be in a small Google Doc or directly on the image as text), including:

      - What the system is used for

      - Which tool it’s in (ClickUp, Asana, Google Drive, Notion, etc.)

      - What part you personally designed or organized

   - If you cannot share screenshots from a previous client because of confidentiality, you may recreate a similar structure in a fresh workspace (with fake data) and take screenshots of that instead.

e. Video Introduction (2–4 minutes)

   - Who you are and where you’re based

   - Your Transactions Coordinator experience (+team leading)

   - How you personally stay organized



STEP 3 — DETAIL CHECK

 (under the Drive link), write only the price per square foot for this property:



3384 P Avenue, Plano, TX 75074 – Sold for 255,555 USD.

 application screen

title: Locksmith Dispatcher
description:
Emergency Service Dispatcher

Join Our Emergency Response Operations Team



We are seeking a qualified Emergency Service Dispatcher to provide real-time dispatch coordination for our emergency lockout service. The successful candidate will demonstrate exceptional response times, professional communication standards, and reliable execution in a high-urgency service environment.



Key Responsibilities:

– Receive and process incoming emergency service calls with efficiency and professionalism

– Dispatch service requests to designated field technicians via WhatsApp within established response time standards

– Monitor incoming work orders from all service channels and advertising platforms

– Verify technician job acceptance and track service delivery through completion

– Provide customers with accurate estimated times of arrival and ongoing status updates

– Maintain comprehensive dispatch logs including job assignments, technician availability, and service outcomes

– Coordinate with management regarding technician scheduling, coverage requirements, and operational priorities

– Facilitate communication with Spanish-speaking customers using approved translation tools



Mandatory Requirements:

– Superior English communication skills, both written and verbal

– Clear, articulate, and confident telephone manner

– Demonstrated experience in dispatch operations, call center management, or real-time service coordination

– Proven capacity to operate under strict time-sensitive protocols

– Advanced multitasking abilities across concurrent communication channels

– Exceptional reliability and consistency in service delivery

– Proficiency in WhatsApp-based team communication

– Ability to perform independently



Preferred Qualifications:

– Professional experience in emergency services, locksmith operations, or roadside assistance

– Spanish language competency (verbal and/or written)

– Working knowledge of dispatch management software or CRM platforms

– Documented experience coordinating field service personnel



What We Offer:

– Critical operational role within a growing emergency service organization

– Stable employment with structured scheduling

– Professional development opportunities as operations expand

– Direct contribution to customer service excellence and operational performance



Qualified candidates with dispatch experience and a commitment to rapid, reliable service delivery are encouraged to apply now and contribute to our emergency response operations.
