title: Procurement Assistant
description:
Overview

This role owns the execution and tracking layer of procurement. It sits downstream of validated procurement input and is responsible for placing orders, managing vendor communication, tracking delivery, and maintaining accurate records across all active items.



The role combines execution and tracking into a single function to ensure continuity, speed, and accountability. It does not define what to buy. It ensures what has been approved gets executed correctly and monitored until completion.



Core Function

Take validated procurement packages and drive them through ordering, tracking, and issue resolution with full visibility and accuracy.



Key Responsibilities



Execution (Order Placement and Vendor Coordination)

- Place orders based on validated and approved procurement lists

- Communicate directly with vendors for order confirmation, pricing, and details

- Ensure orders match approved specifications (SKU, quantity, finish, dimensions)

- Confirm payment status before order processing where applicable



Tracking (End-to-End Visibility)

- Track all active orders from placement to final delivery

- Monitor ETA, shipping status, and transit updates

- Maintain up-to-date procurement tracker with:

  - Order dates

  - ETA updates

  - Payment status

  - Delivery status

  - Receipt documentation



Issue Management (RTS, Delays, Exceptions)

- Identify delays, discrepancies, or risks early

- Proactively follow up with vendors on late shipments or missing information

- Escalate issues with clear data and context

- Coordinate with procurement manager and design team when intervention is required

- Data Accuracy and Reporting

- Maintain high accuracy in procurement sheets and tracking systems

- Ensure all records are complete, consistent, and audit-ready

- Support cost tracking and reconciliation inputs when needed

- Provide clear status updates across all active orders



Process Discipline

- Follow standardized workflows for execution and tracking

- Ensure no order is placed without proper validation and approval

- Maintain consistency in naming, documentation, and tracking structure



Cross-Functional Coordination

- Work closely with Procurement Manager for approvals and escalations

- Coordinate with Design Team when clarification is required post-order

- Support internal visibility by keeping trackers clean and current



Scope Boundaries



This role does:

- Execute approved procurement

- Track and manage orders through completion

- Maintain operational visibility



This role does not:

- Define procurement lists

- Make design decisions

- Approve substitutions without validation



Key Requirements

- 2+ years experience in procurement, order management, or operations

- Experience working with vendors, suppliers, or logistics tracking

- Strong attention to detail and data accuracy

- Ability to manage multiple orders across projects simultaneously

- Strong follow-up discipline and accountability

- Add the work roof to your cover letter/procurement experience

- Comfortable working in structured workflows and tracking systems

- Clear written communication for vendor and internal coordination



Preferred Background

- Experience in interior design, FF&E procurement, or construction-related sourcing

- Familiarity with international vendors and shipping timelines

- Experience using spreadsheets or procurement tracking tools



Success Metrics

- Accuracy of procurement tracker (minimal data errors)

- On-time order placement after approval

- Reduction in missed or delayed deliveries due to lack of follow-up

- Speed of issue identification and escalation

- Completeness of tracking records and documentation



Reporting Structure

- Reports to Procurement Manager

- Works closely with Design-Integrated Procurement Assistants (Intake/Validation role)

- Supports overall procurement operations through execution discipline



Role Intent

This role exists to eliminate execution gaps and tracking blind spots. It ensures that once a procurement decision is made, it is carried out accurately, monitored continuously, and completed without loss of visibility or control.





APPLICATION PROCESS: 

- Only apply to this link: 

- Any messages thru this platform will not be entertained

- Failure to follow instructions will result to application disqualification

title: Online Business Manager
description:
About Us



We are a UK-based charity supporting families with babies and young children during times of hardship. Like many charities, we’ve faced funding and operational challenges and are now entering a 90-day recovery and rebuild phase.



We’re looking for a calm, organised, and proactive Online Business Manager to help us stabilise income, coordinate volunteers, and put simple systems in place so our local services can restart safely.



About the Role



This is a strategic coordination role, not a hands-on “do everything” job.



Your main responsibility is to recruit, organise, and support volunteer project managers to run three key income streams:



GoFundMe crisis appeal



eBay / online sales



Charity bucket collections



You’ll also support a UK-based Local Baby Bank Manager and ensure the charity has clear systems, reporting, and weekly financial visibility.



Key Responsibilities



Recruit and coordinate volunteer project managers for fundraising pipelines



Set clear targets, timelines, and weekly check-ins



Support recruitment and onboarding of the Local Baby Bank Manager



Streamline systems for reporting, referrals, and volunteer coordination



Track weekly KPIs and cashflow and report to senior leadership



Keep everything organised, documented, and realistic.



What We’re Looking For



Essential:



Strong English communication (written and spoken)



Experience in operations, coordination, admin management, or non-profit work



Confident using Google Docs, Sheets, WhatsApp, Zoom



Organised, reliable, and calm under pressure



Desirable (not required):



Charity or fundraising experience



Experience managing volunteers or remote teams



Why This Role Is Different



Clear structure and expectations



Supportive leadership (you won’t be left alone)



Meaningful impact during a critical recovery phase



Long-term potential beyond the crisis period

title: Charity Fundraising Manager
description:
Context

The Women & Families Resource Centre (WFRC) is a registered charity based in Wolverhampton which supports, empowers and advocates for women and children. We aim to actively encourage women to be self-reliant, through empowering them to identify their own needs, make their own choices and create their own solutions. 

We offer short term home visits, counselling sessions, practical & emotional One to One support, Domestic violence groups, a baby bank, awareness raising workshops and drop in or chat groups to help women & families facing crises or challenging situations.



We are seeking a passionate, experienced & results driven fundraiser to join our team and help us build vital fundraising income to continue delivering our services and programmes. This role is pivotal in ensuring the charity secures significant income from trusts, foundations, individuals and corporate partners to support our vital work. Working with the charity director and services administrator, you will be responsible for developing and implementing an ambitious fundraising strategy to identify, cultivate, and steward relationships with grant-making organisations and corporate entities, ensuring sustainable growth in income. 



We are looking for someone with experience of researching and preparing effective funding applications; preparing reports to funders; and excellent time management, including coordinating input from other staff & volunteers. The post is for twelve months with a three- month probation period and the possibility of extension. 

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES 



 

1. Income Generation Strategy Development and Implementation: 

• Develop and deliver a trust and corporate fundraising strategy aligned with the charity’s broader fundraising objectives. 

• Develop a case for support document that can be used to underpin our fundraising strategy.

2. Research and identify new funding opportunities to diversify and expand income streams. 

• Grow the charity’s grant and corporate income. 



3. Grant and Proposal Writing: 

• Prepare, submit and monitor compelling and tailored funding applications and proposals to trusts, foundations, and corporate donors. 

• Ensure all applications are aligned with funders’ priorities and demonstrate clear impact, and upholding the integrity of WFRC.



4. Relationship Management: 

• Cultivate and maintain relationships with current and prospective funders through effective stewardship. 

• Build partnerships with corporate donors, ensuring mutual benefits and long term commitment that result in an increase in charity income. i.e. charity of the year partnerships. 



5. Reporting and Evaluation: 

• Monitor and report on income targets, ensuring accurate records are maintained in the CRM system. 

• Provide regular impact reports to funders, demonstrating the outcomes of their support. • Evaluate the success of fundraising initiatives and identify areas for improvement. 



6. Team Collaboration: 

• Work collaboratively with the charity team and trustees to develop funding proposals and case studies. 

• Contribute to the development of innovative fundraising campaigns and activities. 

• Attend meetings as required, with regular check-ins with line manager. 

• Any other task as requested by line manager.

title: Promotional Products CSR
description:
Job Title: Sales Support Virtual Assistant (Promotional Products / Branded Merch)



Location: 100% Remote / Virtual 



Employment Type: Full-time (40 hours/week aligned with US central time business hours 8am-5pm)



About the Role We are looking for a dependable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to provide dedicated selling support to members of our sales team. Our company operates in the promotional products and branded merchandise (merch) industry.



You will act as the behind-the-scenes operational backbone, primarily handling order management and sales-administration tasks inside our core platform.



This role is not client-facing at the start, but may evolve to include light client communication as you grow with the team. The goal is simple: keep the sales team focused on selling while you make sure every order, quote, and follow-up runs smoothly

and accurately.



Key Responsibilities

* Create, update, and manage purchase orders (POs), sales orders, and production timelines inside our order entry system

* Handle day-to-day sales admin 
 organization, file management, data entry, calendar coordination)

Required Skills & Qualifications

s, status updates) in the future

What We Offer

* Opportunity for long-term growth and increased responsibility (including client interaction)

* Direct support to only two sales professionals — focused, low-chaos role

* Collaborative, supportive team environment

* If you thrive on accuracy, enjoy making complex order workflows run like clockwork, and want to be a key player in a growing promotional products company, we’d love to hear from you.

To Apply Please send your resume + 1-5 minute video talking to us about:

2. What was your most challenging project and why?

3. On that challenging project - how did it serve as a character-builder and how did it improve your skill set?

title: Credit Repair Specialist / Manager (Lead Management & Operations)
description:
Overview:

We are a U.S.-based credit repair company looking for an experienced Credit Repair Specialist / Manager to oversee our lead management and pre-dispute operations.



This role is focused on handling leads from the 
nt they come in up until they are closed and transferred to our disputing team. You will be responsible for ensuring every lead is properly nurtured, followed up with, and guided through our process efficiently.



We are looking for someone with a proven track record in the credit repair industry who understands how to manage both people and systems at a high level.



Responsibilities:



Manage all incoming leads (speed to contact, follow-ups, and nurturing)

Build and optimize lead nurturing workflows from start to close

Ensure all leads are properly tracked, updated, and documented

Oversee CRM systems (Go High Level experience preferred)

Implement and maintain automation for lead follow-ups

Monitor team performance and ensure leads are being handled correctly

Set clear processes for appointment booking and handoff to sales

Ensure smooth transition from closed deal to disputing team

Identify bottlenecks and improve overall operational efficiency



Requirements:



Proven experience in credit repair (REQUIRED)

Prior management or team lead experience in a credit repair company

Strong understanding of the full credit repair process (lead ? close ? disputes)

Experience with CRM systems (Go High Level is a big plus)

Strong communication and organizational skills

Ability to think critically and improve systems, not just follow them

Reliable, detail-oriented, and proactive



Nice to Have:



Experience managing remote teams

Experience with SMS/email automation workflows

Familiarity with dispute platforms (DisputeFox or similar)



What We’re Looking For:

We need someone who can take ownership of this entire process. This is not just a task-based role. We are looking for someone who understands how a high-performing credit repair operation should run and can help us build and maintain that standard.



To Apply:

Your experience in the credit repair industry

Any management experience you have had

HouseSensationsArt is a leading US-based provider of custo
tal fabrication, specializing in personalized art, business signs, and home decor. We are looking for a highly skilled Shopify Developer & SEO Specialist who can handle the full lifecycle of an e-commerce store—from initial design and new builds to backend technical maintenance.

title: Ecommerce Video Editor with AI Experience
description:
Are you someone who THRIVES on CREATIVITY, SPEED, and HIGH PERFORMANCE?



Do you get excited by the idea of creating cutting-edge e-commerce ad creatives and using AI at a high level to produce better work, faster?



Do you love the challenge of turning raw ideas, footage, and concepts into emotionally compelling, sales-driven videos that actually convert?



If your answer is a big “ABSOLUTELY!”, keep reading. This could be the opportunity you’ve been waiting for.



We’re a young and ambitious e-commerce brand on a mission to improve the lives of women over 60 through thoughtful, high-quality products designed specifically for them.



We’re looking for an Experienced Video Editor to join our team.



This is not an entry-level editing role.



We want someone who already has strong experience creating direct-response e-commerce ads, and who knows how to use AI tools at a high level to speed up production, improve creative output, and bring fresh ideas to the table.



You’ll be creating video ads that are designed not just to look good, but to capture attention, hold interest, and drive conversions.



We’re aiming to build an 8-figure brand within the next 12 months, and we want a growth-minded A-player who thrives at the intersection of creative instinct, performance marketing, speed, and AI leverage.



What We’re Looking For



We’re not just hiring for technical skills. We’re building a team around shared values:



Unvarnished Integrity

Truth builds trust.



Urgent Precision

We move fast, but we care about quality.



Challenge Assumptions

We don’t just accept “that’s how it’s done.”



Relentless Improvement

We’re always looking for ways to get better.



Extreme Ownership

We take responsibility for outcomes.



What You’ll Be Doing



Video Editing

Create high-performing
 ads, UGC-style creatives, VSL segments, and other direct-response content designed to grab attention and convert.



AI-Powered Production

Use AI tools at a high level to improve speed, workflow, idea generation, asset creation, captions, scripting support, visual development, and creative testing.



Creative Execution

Work closely with the team to turn marketing ideas, scripts, and concepts into polished, conversion-focused video ads.



Creative Testing Support

Help produce multiple variations of hooks, angles, edits, and concepts so we can test faster and find winners.



Trendspotting

Stay current with the latest e-commerce ad styles, editing trends, platform trends, and AI tools that can improve output.



Workflow Efficiency

Continuously look for ways to edit faster, improve quality, and streamline production without sacrificing performance.



What You’ll Need to Bring



Proven experience editing direct-response video ads for e-commerce brands

Especially
 / Meta ads.



Strong editing skills across both short-form and long-form content

Including UGC-style ads, VSL-style content, and social creatives.



Advanced AI proficiency

You already use AI tools in a serious way as part of your workflow. You understand how to use AI to save time, improve quality, generate iterations, and work at a higher level.



Understanding of direct-response marketing

You know how to edit for hooks, retention, emotional engagement, pacing, and conversions, not just aesthetics.



Ability to work fast without sacrificing quality

You can manage multiple projects and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.



Strong communication and teamwork

You can take feedback well, collaborate smoothly, and contribute ideas when needed.



Bonus Points If You Have



Experience in high-volume e-commerce creative production

Experience editing for older demographics, especially women 60+

Experience using AI to create faster testing cycles and better-performing creative variations

Strong instinct for ad angles, hooks, pacing, and direct-response structure



What’s In It For You



Above-market compensation

With performance-based upside depending on experience and results.



The opportunity to work on meaningful products

Helping improve the lives of women over 60.



A high-growth environment

Where strong performance is valued and rewarded.



The chance to be part of something ambitious

Your work will directly contribute to building a fast-growing brand.



If you’re an experienced video editor who understands direct-response, moves fast, and knows how to use AI to create a real edge, we’d love to hear from you.



Apply now and show us what you can do:

title: Real Estate Administrative VA
description:
Job Overview: 

We’re looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Real Estate Administrative Virtual Assistant to support our U.S.-based property operations. This is a full-time, remote role that involves tenant coordination, document research, and administrative support, designed to keep our property management running smoothly in a fast-paced environment. 



Strong English communication skills, Excel proficiency, and adaptability are essential. Join our growing team and help streamline our operations!



Key Responsibilities:

* Conduct research to gather documents, complete forms correctly, and ensure compliance with housing regulations.  

* Follow step-by-step examples to execute tasks such as preparing and submitting property-related paperwork.  

* Communicate with potential tenants to collect required information, assess their eligibility, and coordinate appointments.  

* Maintain organized records and produce clear, detailed reports to support team operations.  

* Use Microsoft Excel to track, structure, and update property-related data accurately.  

* Call U.S.-based offices or agencies to gather details or troubleshoot property-related issues.



Required Skills & Qualifications: 

* Strong written and spoken English communication skills.  

* Excellent research abilities and the ability to gather and organize information.  

* Attention to detail with the ability to accurately replicate existing workflows.  

* Proficiency in Microsoft Excel for data entry, organization, and reporting.  

* Comfortable making professional phone calls to U.S. offices when needed.



Preferred Skills:

* Prior experience in administrative support or customer-facing roles.  

* Experience using QuickBooks (a big advantage!).  

* Familiarity with U.S. real estate or housing systems is a plus.  

* Proactive, resourceful, and eager to learn new systems and processes.



Why Join Our Team?  

* Work alongside a remote team that values collaboration and clear communication.  

* Gain hands-on experience in the real estate field while supporting U.S.-based operations.  

* Take on a role that encourages initiative, critical thinking, and continuous improvement.



If you're an organized and motivated virtual assistant looking to grow in the real estate space, we’d love to hear from you.  Apply now and take the next step in your remote career!

title: Technical Writer
description:
A US-based consulting company is looking to hire a hard-working and self-motivated Filipino Technical Writer to create and document processes and procedures for our clients. Impeccable mastery of the English language (both written and verbal) is a must. 



This role is 100% work from home.



Your responsibilities will include but not be limited to:



• Map process flows based on a recording of the consultant interviewing the client. This includes creating flow charts and diagrams. 

• Write high-quality, clear, easy-to-understand step-by-step procedures based on a recording of an interview of a client or videos submitted directly by clients on how they perform certain tasks.

• Organize the material in a cloud-based process documentation software or Learning Management System software. 

• Use videos, screenshots, links, etc to provide a balance between written material and demonstration of the material and to ensure full understanding. 

• Identify points of improvement and communicate it clearly to the consultant you are working with 

• Use our internal systems to communicate about their work and report daily on progress. 





About You:



• 3+ years of experience in technical writing, creating instructions, creating flow charts, process mapping, and process improvement background. 

• Ability to translate highly technical information into easily understandable information

• Very good understanding of the business world and high familiarity with common terms 

• Experience in process documentation and process improvement 

• Ability to duplicate what is said and translate it into writing

• Excellent mastery of the English language including grammar, punctuation and spelling. 

• Good mastery of MS Products (Word, Excel and PowerPoint) and Google suite 

• Detail-oriented, efficient and concise

• Ability to critical thinking and problem-solving





Compensation: 



• Competitive salary

• Awesome culture and work-from-home set-up

Systems

title: WordPress Web Designer & Seo Link Building Specialist (off page SEO)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a results-driven WordPress Web Designer & SEO Specialist who understands both design and performance.

This role is not just about building websites, it’s about creating high-converting, fast, and search-optimized digital assets that drive real business results.

You will be responsible for:

Designing and managing WordPress websites

Improving user experience and conversion flow

Executing SEO strategies with a strong focus on off-page link building

Optimizing website performance and speed

This is a hybrid role combining design, technical SEO, and growth marketing.

Key Responsibilities

1. WordPress Website Design & Management

Design, build, and maintain WordPress websites (landing pages, service pages, blogs)

Ensure mobile responsiveness across all devices

Implement clean, modern, high-end layouts aligned with brand standards

Manage plugins, themes, and updates to ensure site stability and security

2. UX / Conversion Optimization

Improve user journeys and page structure to increase conversions

Optimize:

Call-to-actions (CTAs)

Page hierarchy

Navigation and flow

Identify friction points and continuously improve usability

Work closely with marketing to align pages with campaign goals

3. Technical SEO & Site Performance

Optimize website speed and performance (Core Web Vitals)

Implement best practices for:

Image compression

Lazy loading

Caching

Code optimization (CSS/JS minification)

Ensure proper indexing, crawlability, and site structure

Conduct basic on-page SEO (meta tags, headings, internal linking)

4. Off-Page SEO & Link Building (Primary Focus)

Execute and manage link-building campaigns:

Guest posting

Outreach campaigns

Directory submissions (high-quality only)

Partnerships and backlink opportunities

Identify high-authority domains for backlink acquisition

Build and maintain relationships with publishers and website owners

Track backlink growth and domain authority improvements

5. SEO Tracking & Reporting

Monitor SEO performance using tools such as:

Google Search Console

Ahrefs / SEMrush

Track:

Backlink profile

Keyword rankings

Organic traffic growth

Provide clear, actionable reports and recommendations

Requirements

Core Skills

Proven experience with WordPress (themes, builders, plugins)

Strong understanding of UX/UI design principles

Solid knowledge of SEO fundamentals, including:

Link building strategies

Technical SEO (site speed, indexing)

Experience with SEO tools:

Ahrefs, SEMrush, or similar

Google Search Console

Technical Skills (Preferred)

Familiarity with:

HTML, CSS (basic edits and troubleshooting)

Page builders (Elementor, WPBakery, or similar)

Speed optimization tools (GTmetrix, PageSpeed Insights)

Understanding of Core Web Vitals

Soft Skills

Detail-oriented and highly organized

Strong problem-solving mindset

Ability to think in terms of conversion and business impact, not just design

Self-starter with the ability to execute without constant supervision

Success Metrics (How We Measure You)

Website speed improvements (Core Web Vitals)

Increase in organic traffic

Growth in high-quality backlinks

Improvement in keyword rankings

Conversion rate improvements on key pages

Nice-to-Have

Experience with content marketing or blog strategy

Experience with CRO (conversion rate optimization tools)

Experience working with service-based businesses or real estate companies

Why This Role Matters

This role directly impacts:

Lead generation

Brand authority

Website performance

Revenue growth

You will play a key role in building a high-performing digital presence, not just maintaining a website.

Position Type

Full-time

Remote 

How to Apply

Please include:

Portfolio of WordPress websites you’ve designed

Examples of SEO results (traffic growth, backlinks, rankings)

Brief explanation of your link-building approach

title: Amazon SEO Expert (Data Dive Expert)
description:
FULL-TIME | REMOTE | LONG-TERM POSITION



We are a growing European premium brand looking for a passionate and experienced Amazon Catalog Manager to join our friendly, high-performing team.



We are EU based and have a catalogue of about 550+ parent SKUs (plus Variants) accross all of amazon EU marketplaces, therefore a lot of work would need to be done through datadive + use of Google Gemini or ChatGPT to get the copywriting right with a set process.



If you love diving into data, collaborating with creative minds, and scaling brands across European marketplaces, we would love to meet you!



YOUR ROLE & FOCUS

Your primary mission is to take full ownership of our Amazon catalog, with a strong focus on optimizing our existing listings across various European marketplaces. You will be our go-to DataDive expert, driving our SEO, localization, and conversion strategies.



Including to identify the most interesting keywords to aim for, considering their search volume and conversion rate etc.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Listing Optimization: Deep-dive into our existing catalog and continuously optimize listings for maximum performance across all EU marketplaces.



AI-Driven Localization: Use your DataDive expertise in combination with AI (Gemini Pro, ChatGPT) to create highly converting, semantic translations for foreign-language EU markets.



Team Collaboration: Work closely and seamlessly with our content and design colleagues to brief image updates and align on A+ content strategies.



A/B Testing: Proactively set up, monitor, and evaluate A/B tests to continuously improve click-through and conversion rates.



Manage Images and A+ Across the various Amazon marketplaces. Especially do updates when new content had been produced.



WHAT YOU BRING TO THE TEAM



DataDive Expert: Extremely deep, expert-level knowledge of DataDive is an absolute must for this role.



Amazon Experience: 3+ years of hands-on experience managing Amazon Seller Central (EU market experience is highly preferred).



Technical Foundations: Strong hands-on experience with flat files, variation troubleshooting, and Amazon SEO.



AI Prompting Skills: Comfortable using LLMs (Gemini, ChatGPT) for high-quality semantic translations and listing adjustments.



Mindset: You are a friendly, proactive team player who takes ownership, thinks strategically, and communicates excellently in written English.



HOW TO APPLY

Attention to detail is important to us! Please include the word VELARION in the subject line of your application. (Applications without this word will not be reviewed).



Please send us:



A brief summary of your Amazon background and your specific experience with DataDive.



Some examples of listings you have successfully optimized.

Describing your process



Examples of other work you could do for our catalogue with the help of the various tools that we have (datadive, helium10, sellerboard)



Your expected monthly salary and a link to your CV. Note: the hourly wage is thought to be in the range of $10-12 depending on the level of skills & experience



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Marketing Strategist for Virtual Assistant Company (DigiAssist)

title: Real Estate Lead Generation Specialist
description:
Job Overview

We are seeking a motivated Real Estate Cold Caller to join our remote team. In this position, you will be responsible for reaching out to potential property sellers, qualifying leads, and providing detailed seller and property information to support the acquisition team. The ideal candidate should have excellent communication skills and a passion for the real estate industry.



Key Responsibilities

-Initiate outbound calls to property sellers to identify acquisition opportunities.

-Qualify leads by collecting property details and understanding the seller’s motivations.

-Accurately document all calls and interactions in the CRM system.

-Collaborate with the internal team to escalate qualified leads.

-Maintain a professional and empathetic tone throughout all interactions.

-Follow up with potential sellers to ensure continued engagement.

-Ensure all relevant property details are captured for the acquisition team’s review.



Required Skills

-Exceptional spoken English with a neutral accent.

-Ability to work effectively in a high-volume calling environment.

-Proficiency in CRM tools and phone management systems.

-Strong organizational skills with attention to detail.

-Comfortable working remotely with minimal supervision.



Preferred Skills

-Previous experience in real estate cold calling or property acquisition.

-Familiarity with real estate terminology and processes.

-Experience with lead tracking systems and dialer tools.



Why Join Us

This role offers the flexibility to work remotely while playing a key role in property acquisitions. You will be instrumental in identifying qualified leads and supporting the growth of our real estate portfolio.

Promofect provides custom apparel, promotional products, and branded merchandise for schools, corporations, first responders, nonprofits, and events. Drives high-intent traffic for custom apparel and promotional product campaigns

This role is project-based and focused on analysis and strategy. Additional hours may be approved to implement and optimize campaigns based on findings.



Responsibilities

Audit cthe urrent Google Ads setup and campaign structure

Qualifications

Strong understanding of paid search optimization and conversion tracking

Proven ability to improve lead quality and reduce cost per lead

title: Video Editor & Ad Creative Specialist
description:
We run multiple DTC e-commerce brands across the Nordics (skincare & pet niche), spending heavily on Meta ads in Sweden, Denmark, Finland, and Norway. We don't need a generic video editor — we need someone who understands direct-response advertising and can own the full creative production cycle from competitor research to final delivery to processing learnings on performance data.

What you'll do:



Edit UGC ad creatives from raw creator footage (sourced through Influee and direct creators) following our proven ad frameworks — hook variations, half-face demos, before/after, testimonial-style content, and specific validated angles

Rip and analyze top-performing English-language ads from competitors using Vozo AI and Vidau, break down why they work, then recreate and localize them for Swedish, Danish, Finnish, and Norwegian markets

Use ElevenLabs to dub English voiceovers into Nordic languages for localized ad versions

Create AI-generated image ads using tools like Manus — static creatives, text overlay ads, founder letter formats, infographic-style ads

Produce multiple ad variations per batch for DCT (Dynamic Creative Testing) — different hooks, CTAs, primary texts, headlines across Reels, Stories, and Feed placements

Conduct competitor ad research using ad intelligence tools (Meta Ad Library, GetHookd, Kalodata) — bring actionable insights on winning angles, formats, and hooks in our niches

Work inside our Growth Guide (creative roadmap spreadsheet) to log every ad concept, track batch numbers, mark results as winner/loser, and most importantly — process learnings on every single ad you produce. No ad gets marked as "done" until learnings are completed

Complete feedback loops: analyze metrics (spend, ROAS/CPA, CTR, hook rate, hold rate, CVR), form educated guesses on why an ad worked or didn't, and apply those learnings to the next batch

Add captions, text overlays, transitions, and sound design to every creative

Deliver fast — 24-48h turnaround per batch



Requirements:



CapCut on desktop/PC — non-negotiable

Proven experience editing short-form UGC and direct-response ad creatives for Meta 
/Instagram)

Understanding of ad psychology — scroll-stopping hooks, pacing, CTAs, what makes people stop and buy

Experience ripping, breaking down, and recreating competitor ads

Comfortable with AI voiceover tools (ElevenLabs or similar) and video ripping tools (Vozo AI, Vidau)

Ability to work inside structured creative systems — logging concepts, tracking results, processing learnings in spreadsheets

Ability to analyze ad performance data and turn metrics into actionable creative improvements

Reliable internet and consistent availability



Nice to have:



Experience creating AI-generated static ad creatives (Manus, Midjourney, or similar)

Familiarity with e-commerce/DTC ad creative across multiple markets and languages

Experience with split-testing ad creatives (Marksman and Sniper testing methods)



Compensation:

This starts with a 3-day paid trial. Deliver at the level we need, and we'll match the salary you want — we pay well for people who perform. No ceiling on what you can earn here if your output matches.

Hours per week: 40+ (more hours available if you want them)

Business name: Future Ecom Nordic

Include 2-3 samples of UGC-style ad edits in your application. Bonus points for a rip/localization example or an ad with learnings breakdown attached.

title: Executive Assistant of Operations (Remote)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and proactive full-time Executive Assistant of Operations to support a growing structural engineering client based in the southeastern United States. This client is known for innovative, efficient building designs for commercial, industrial, and high-end residential projects, licensed in multiple states, and committed to safety and quality.



In this role, you will track and report on key company metrics such as sales and production, providing visibility for leadership and team leads. You will manage sales follow-ups, update the CRM, and coordinate proposal workflows to ensure smooth sales operations. Supporting and eventually leading podcast operations will also be part of your responsibilities as the role evolves.



You will oversee and update Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) in collaboration with team leads. Additionally, you will manage marketing and content execution including scheduling social media posts, planning newsletters, and coordinating articles. Acting as a liaison across marketing, sales, education, production, and leadership teams will be key to ensuring seamless communication.



Operational support will include removing workflow blockers, managing tools like Jira, Slack, Dropbox, Hubstaff (for time tracking and reporting), and other productivity software, and assisting with general administrative processes.



Candidate Requirements



Relevant work experience in operations or executive assistance is essential.



Proficiency with software and tools such as Jira, Slack, Dropbox, CRM systems, Hubstaff, time tracking, and other productivity tools is required.



Experience working remotely and adapting to a virtual environment is necessary.



Strong English proficiency in both spoken and written communication is essential.



Professionalism, a positive attitude, clear and prompt response times, and excellent communication clarity are expected.



A reliable internet connection and a well-equipped home office setup are mandatory.



Demonstrated commitment to the role, availability during agreed hours, and excellent time management skills are required.



Dependability, problem-solving abilities, and a willingness to learn and adapt in a dynamic work environment are crucial.



If you want to support a forward-thinking engineering client and thrive in a role that connects multiple teams while driving operational efficiency, please apply with your resume and a brief cover letter explaining your experience and interest.

title: Video Editor
description:
What we are:



- A small, passionate team working to make a real difference in women’s health

- A group of people who care deeply — about the work, the customers, and each other

- Brave, kind, thoughtful, and willing to challenge ideas (including our own)

- Hands-on. Everyone does a bit of everything. No silos here

- Always learning, always improving, always trying new things



What we’re not:



- Not a “side job.” This is a full-time role. We respect work/life balance, but when you’re working, we expect full focus

- Not slow or predictable. There is always something to do — you will not be bored

- Not corporate. No rigid structure, no “that’s not my job” mindset

- Not fully figured out. We are a growing team, and that means you’ll need to adapt, learn new skills, and be comfortable with change

- Not a place where you just follow instructions — we need people who think, question, and take ownership



What you’ll do:



- Turn our existing assets (customer videos, founder videos) into engaging video ads that actually convert

- Test different hooks, formats, and edits — not just make things “look good,” but make them perform

- Do your own research on what’s working across platforms (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube) and apply it

- Understand our products and customers so your edits speak to real problems and emotions

- Continuously iterate - take what works, improve it, and move fast



If this feels like a good fit for you, we’d love to see your portfolio. Please send it to 

 with the subject line: NO KETCHUP EVER

title: Community Growth Lead | Path to CMO
description:
AI Integraterz is an AI-first company — it's literally in our name. We're launching two communities at once (Filipino and American divisions) and we need one person to own the growth of both.



This is a startup role. Things move fast. But if you're the right person, you're not just getting a job — you're stepping into a leadership seat. The goal is to grow you into our CMO within 90 days.



What this role actually is:

You'll be running our Skool community. People come in, go through our AI certification program, pass the test, and we place them with American companies looking to hire. If we don't have a placement ready, we give them the tools to go land their own clients — and we hop on to help them close.



On the American side, you'll be posting on the owner's social profiles to build authority, attract members, and move the free community into the paid group. That paid group helps cover operations and keeps everything running.

We get paid for placements. We get paid for training. You help make both happen.



You don't have to know AI. But you have to want to.



We're an AI company. That means you need to be curious about it, actively trying things, learning, experimenting — and genuinely excited to become an expert. You don't need to be one yet. You just have to want to be.

The person who gets this role is going to light up when they hear they get an unlimited AI budget to learn and build with. That's the tell.



You're the right person if:



You're all about growth — community growth, personal growth, all of it

You're hungry to learn AI and want to become a leader in that space

You want a real leadership role, not just a task list

You're not scared to be on camera, record training videos, or be the face of something when it matters

You're okay going 100 mph right now — we're launching and this is go time

You're willing to support people in the community even when you don't have all the answers yet

You're ambitious, want to make a real difference, and are willing to put in the work





This isn't the role for you if:



You need someone telling you what to do every day

You're skeptical about AI or on the fence about it

You want to just complete tasks and clock out

You're not ready to lead before you feel fully ready



What You Get:



FREE Claude Code Max Plan — paid by the company

Full Claude Ecosystem Certification — Claude Code, Claude Chat, Claude CoWork

Personal AI agents — a freelancer agent and an ops assistant built for you

Direct mentorship from the founder — 4+ years in AI integration

Real growth path — this role is built to evolve into a senior leadership position as the company scales

Performance review at 90 days with a bonus structure tied to community growth from day one

Compensation is performance-based and reviewed at 90 days. We built it to reward people who show up and deliver — so if that's you, there's real upside here.



To Apply:

Send a short intro — who you are, why this excites you, and what AI tools you've been playing with.

e-mail: 
 

Subject: Community Growth Lead — [Your Name]

title: Chief Financial Officer (CFO)
description:

title: Head of Finance & Accounting
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines) – Must work U.S. hours



About Us



WA DeHart Inc., a U.S.-based wholesale distribution company headquartered in Pennsylvania, has been in business for over 100 years. With new leadership, capital, and technology, we are transforming into a tech-driven, growth-focused distribution platform serving convenience stores, gas stations, and smoke shops across the U.S.



Our industry is low-margin, high-volume, and heavily regulated, requiring precision, compliance, and operational discipline to succeed.



Role Overview



We are seeking an experienced Head of Finance & Accounting to oversee all accounting operations, compliance, and financial strategy for our growing organization.



This is a hands-on executive leadership role for a detail-oriented professional who can build scalable financial systems, maintain strict regulatory compliance, and partner with leadership on growth initiatives including cost optimization, capital raises, and acquisitions.



Key Responsibilities



Oversee all accounting operations across multiple entities, ensuring accuracy, transparency, and compliance



Develop and maintain strong financial controls, policies, and scalable accounting systems



Manage monthly, quarterly, and annual close processes, including preparation of financial statements and reports



Lead accounting, financial reporting, and compliance across U.S. operations, ensuring adherence to U.S. and Pennsylvania regulations; experience with FDA regulations, tobacco compliance, and PAC compliance is a strong asset



File required monthly reports with the Pennsylvania Department of Revenue and manage regulatory filings and audits



Partner with external auditors, CPAs, and accounting firms to produce reviewed or audited financial statements



Manage bank and lender relationships, including reporting requirements and loan covenant compliance



Support executive leadership with capital raises, investor reporting, and KPI monitoring



Lead budgeting, forecasting, cash flow management, and financial planning



Drive cost-cutting initiatives and operational efficiency, including vendor contract review, renegotiation of terms, and identifying savings opportunities



Represent the company in audits, tax reviews, and accounting disputes



Mentor and develop a small team of accountants/bookkeepers



Provide financial insights that support organic growth and potential acquisitions



Continuously improve the efficiency, scalability, and accuracy of financial operations



Perform other finance and accounting responsibilities as needed to support strategic, operational, and compliance objectives



Qualifications



10+ years of progressive experience in finance and accounting leadership roles



CPA, CA, or equivalent professional designation strongly preferred



Strong knowledge of financial reporting, regulatory compliance, and accounting controls



Experience managing vendor relationships, cost optimization initiatives, and financial efficiency projects



Experience working with banks, lenders, and financial institutions, including loan covenant compliance



Experience supporting capital raises, investor reporting, or financing activities



Strong business acumen with the ability to think like an owner



Highly detail-oriented, process-driven, and capable of building scalable financial systems



Experience leading and mentoring accounting teams



Preferred Experience



Experience managing multi-entity accounting environments



Experience in wholesale distribution, FMCG, or similar industries



What We Offer



Competitive compensation



Executive leadership role with direct impact on company growth



Opportunity to work closely with ownership and executive leadership



Career growth as the company expands into multiple locations



Long-term opportunities for growth within a scaling U.S. organization



Application Requirement



Please include a short voice or video recording briefly introducing yourself when submitting your application. Applications without a recording will not be considered.

title: Photo Editing QA and Customer Support
description:
ABOUT REAL TOURS



Real Tours is a fast-growing real estate media company delivering professional photography editing, virtual staging, 3D tours, and listing media to real estate agents and brokers. We pride ourselves on fast turnarounds, exceptional quality, and client relationships that keep agents coming back listing after listing.



ROLE OVERVIEW



We are looking for a versatile QA & Client Support Specialist who can operate across both quality assurance and client-facing support functions. In this hybrid role, you will review edited media for quality before delivery while also serving as a point of contact for client inquiries, re-edit requests, and order updates. This position is ideal for someone who is both a sharp visual reviewer and a confident communicator — someone who understands what great real estate media looks like and can represent that standard to clients.



QUALITY ASSURANCE RESPONSIBILITIES



Review edited real estate photo batches for exposure consistency, color accuracy, sky replacement quality, horizon alignment, and overall presentation

Do virtual staging deliverables for realistic staging, proper scale, material texture, and lighting match to the actual room

Do item removal edits for seamless surface reconstruction with no visible patching or artifacts

Inspecta and create Matterport, Zillow 3D Home, and CubiCasa floor plan and 3D tour 

Revise rejected work for clients and their needs

Track and document recurring quality issues to support editor coaching and process improvement



CUSTOMER SUPPORT RESPONSIBILITIES



Serve as a primary point of contact for real estate agent clients via
, Slack, and internal platforms

Communicate order statuses, delivery timelines, and proactively notify clients of any delays

Process re-edit requests and relay precise client feedback to the editing team

Manage client expectations around same-day and next-day delivery SLAs

Escalate unresolved issues or pattern complaints to the appropriate team lead

Support new client onboarding and guide agents through the revision and delivery process



REQUIREMENTS



1+ years of hands-on experience in real estate photo editing, virtual staging, or media post-production — you must be able to identify AND fix common editing issues, not just flag them

Proficient in Adobe Photoshop — able to perform exposure corrections, sky replacements, color grading adjustments, and clean item removals independently when needed

Advanced virtual staging knowledge: understanding of furniture scale, perspective matching, lighting consistency, shadow realism, and material textures

Advanced item removal skills: ability to reconstruct floors, walls, ceilings, and surfaces convincingly with no visible patching, cloning artifacts, or texture mismatches

Familiarity with real estate photo editing standards: sky replacements, virtual staging, item removals, twilight edits, and exposure corrections

Strong written English communication skills — able to write clearly to both clients and editors

Highly self-managed and organized with the ability to juggle QA reviews and open client tickets simultaneously

Experience with Slack, 
, Notion, or similar remote work tools

Comfortable with fast-paced, high-volume workloads and same-day turnaround expectations



NICE TO HAVE



Direct experience with Aryeo, Matterport, CubiCasa, or Zillow 3D Home

Prior work with a real estate photography/media company

Experience with AI editing tools and awareness of AI artifact detection

Background in virtual staging review or advanced retouching QA



TOOLS YOU WILL USE



Adobe Photoshop / Lightroom

Aryeo

Matterport

Zillow 3D Home

CubiCasa

AI Editing Tools

Slack


 / Notion





HOW TO APPLY

To apply, please submit your resume and a brief cover note describing your relevant experience.

Include links to any relevant work samples, portfolios, or past projects where applicable.

title: Video Editor
description:
Trendstop is a leading fashion and lifestyle trend forecasting agency based in London, delivering insight and trend intelligence that helps brands shape future products and strategies.



We are looking for a skilled Video Editor to edit long-form recordings into clear, engaging video content. This is a practical, hands-on role. You will edit videos, improve structure and flow, and create supporting visual and audio assets. You should be confident working quickly while maintaining strong attention to detail.



If you enjoy both editing and creating visual content, and can turn raw material into polished outputs, this role offers the opportunity to shape high-impact content within a creative, insight-driven environment.



What you’ll be doing



Video editing & content transformation

You’ll turn long-form recordings into clear, high-quality videos.

• Edit meetings and presentations into clean, easy-to-watch recordings

• Improve structure, pacing, and overall clarity 

• Identify key 
nts and create short clips

• Create marketing and social media videos from existing recordings

• Create short-form video content from scratch when needed 



Transcript & audio refinement

You will improve the quality of spoken content.

• Edit transcripts for accuracy and readability

• Remove filler words and unnecessary sections

• Ensure audio is clear and consistent 



Descript workflow & project management

You will manage editing projects in Descript.

• Use Descript tools for editing video and transcripts

• Set up and organize projects clearly

• Work efficiently while maintaining quality 



Visual integration & content enhancement

You will add visuals to support the content.

• Add slides, images, and other media to videos

• Apply captions or subtitles when needed

• Ensure visuals match the content and company style

 

Asset creation & creative development

You will create assets that improve the final video.

• Create simple, clear slides or visuals to support key points for marketing and social media videos

• Choose relevant and high-quality images

• Build visual content that is engaging and easy to understand

• Create or use AI voiceovers where needed



File management & content organization

You will keep files organized and easy to access.

• Prepare and organize source files

• Follow clear naming and folder structures

• Make sure all assets are easy to find 



Exporting & delivery

You will prepare final files for use.

• Export videos and related files in the correct formats

• Prepare content for sharing internally or with clients

• Check all outputs before delivery



What we’re looking for

• Experience editing video in Descript (portfolio required)

• Good understanding of Descript tools and workflows

• Ability to edit long content into clear, shorter videos

• Experience creating short-form content for social media or marketing

• Strong visual sense and ability to choose good images

• Experience creating slides or simple visual assets

• Familiarity with AI voiceover or audio tools is a plus

• Good attention to detail

• Strong organization and file management skills

• Ability to follow briefs and guidelines

• Reliable and able to meet deadlines

• Good written and spoken English



Why join Trendstop?

• Work on creative and trend-focused content

• Be part of a global and collaborative team

• Flexible remote working

• Opportunity to shape video and content output

• Competitive pay based on experience



We’d love to welcome you into our trend-focused, creative and collaborative team, where content is elevated through both precision and creative thinking.



To Apply

Please include your CV, covering letter, portfolio with relevant work examples and your hourly rate.

title: Ecommerce Bookkeeper
description:

We are looking for a bookkeeper who is detail-driven, organized, and obsessed with accuracy.



Your mission is to support our finance operations — keeping our books clean, our numbers accurate, and our CEO informed with clear, reliable financial data.



This is not a corporate role.



This is a fast-paced operator position inside a high-performance team.



Responsibilities



Daily / Weekly



-Track and categorize expenses (cards, bank accounts, payment processors)



Maintain spreadsheets for:

-P&Ls

-COGS allocation

-Shipping & fulfillment expenses

-Ad spend & CAC tracking

-Merchant fees & refunds/chargebacks

-Record supplier payments & invoices

-Track cash flow & upcoming payment obligations

- Maintain organized financial files & receipts



Monthly



-Reconcile bank / Stripe / PayPal / Bank accounts

-Update monthly P&L dashboard

-Prepare financial reports for leadership

-Flag anomalies or discrepancies



Systems



-Build better tracking systems for cost control

-Help standardize reporting templates & processes



Requirements



-Experience in accounting, finance, or bookkeeping for 7-8 figure ecommerce brands

-Strong Excel/Google Sheets skills (formulas, pivot tables, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP)

-Strong English communication

-High attention to detail, zero-defect mentality

-Trustworthy, reliable, and proactive

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Experience using:



-QuickBooks / Xero

-Shopify

-Basic understanding of FP&A

-Automation skills (Notion, Airtable, Zapier, Google Apps Scripts)



Who This Role Is For



You thrive in environments where:



-Speed matters, but accuracy matters even more

-You take ownership, not instructions

-You like improving systems, not just executing tasks

-You understand money is the scoreboard of business performance



What You Get



-Work directly with a proven 8-figure e-commerce founder

-Real career growth in finance & operations

-Ability to build, improve, and own financial systems

-Remote schedule and performance-based growth opportunities



This is a long-term role with increasing responsibility for the right person.



How to Apply



Applications will only be considered if submitted through this form:



Applications sent via OnlineJobs,
, or any other channel will be ignored.

title: Ecommerce Video Editor with AI Experience
description:
Are you someone who THRIVES on CREATIVITY, SPEED, and HIGH PERFORMANCE?



Do you get excited by the idea of creating cutting-edge e-commerce ad creatives and using AI at a high level to produce better work, faster?



Do you love the challenge of turning raw ideas, footage, and concepts into emotionally compelling, sales-driven videos that actually convert?



If your answer is a big “ABSOLUTELY!”, keep reading. This could be the opportunity you’ve been waiting for.



We’re a young and ambitious e-commerce brand on a mission to improve the lives of women over 60 through thoughtful, high-quality products designed specifically for them.



We’re looking for an Experienced Video Editor to join our team.



This is not an entry-level editing role.



We want someone who already has strong experience creating direct-response e-commerce ads, and who knows how to use AI tools at a high level to speed up production, improve creative output, and bring fresh ideas to the table.



You’ll be creating video ads that are designed not just to look good, but to capture attention, hold interest, and drive conversions.



We’re aiming to build an 8-figure brand within the next 12 months, and we want a growth-minded A-player who thrives at the intersection of creative instinct, performance marketing, speed, and AI leverage.



What We’re Looking For



We’re not just hiring for technical skills. We’re building a team around shared values:



Unvarnished Integrity

Truth builds trust.



Urgent Precision

We move fast, but we care about quality.



Challenge Assumptions

We don’t just accept “that’s how it’s done.”



Relentless Improvement

We’re always looking for ways to get better.



Extreme Ownership

We take responsibility for outcomes.



What You’ll Be Doing



Video Editing

Create high-performing
 ads, UGC-style creatives, VSL segments, and other direct-response content designed to grab attention and convert.



AI-Powered Production

Use AI tools at a high level to improve speed, workflow, idea generation, asset creation, captions, scripting support, visual development, and creative testing.



Creative Execution

Work closely with the team to turn marketing ideas, scripts, and concepts into polished, conversion-focused video ads.



Creative Testing Support

Help produce multiple variations of hooks, angles, edits, and concepts so we can test faster and find winners.



Trendspotting

Stay current with the latest e-commerce ad styles, editing trends, platform trends, and AI tools that can improve output.



Workflow Efficiency

Continuously look for ways to edit faster, improve quality, and streamline production without sacrificing performance.



What You’ll Need to Bring



Proven experience editing direct-response video ads for e-commerce brands

Especially
 / Meta ads.



Strong editing skills across both short-form and long-form content

Including UGC-style ads, VSL-style content, and social creatives.



Advanced AI proficiency

You already use AI tools in a serious way as part of your workflow. You understand how to use AI to save time, improve quality, generate iterations, and work at a higher level.



Understanding of direct-response marketing

You know how to edit for hooks, retention, emotional engagement, pacing, and conversions, not just aesthetics.



Ability to work fast without sacrificing quality

You can manage multiple projects and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.



Strong communication and teamwork

You can take feedback well, collaborate smoothly, and contribute ideas when needed.



Bonus Points If You Have



Experience in high-volume e-commerce creative production

Experience editing for older demographics, especially women 60+

Experience using AI to create faster testing cycles and better-performing creative variations

Strong instinct for ad angles, hooks, pacing, and direct-response structure



What’s In It For You



Above-market compensation

With performance-based upside depending on experience and results.



The opportunity to work on meaningful products

Helping improve the lives of women over 60.



A high-growth environment

Where strong performance is valued and rewarded.



The chance to be part of something ambitious

Your work will directly contribute to building a fast-growing brand.



If you’re an experienced video editor who understands direct-response, moves fast, and knows how to use AI to create a real edge, we’d love to hear from you.



Apply now and show us what you can do:

title: Dental Phone Support Specialist
description:
We are a U.S.-based oral and maxillofacial surgery practice seeking an exceptional Dental Phone Support Specialist to serve as the voice of our practice. You will handle inbound calls, appointment scheduling, and call routing for a patient population that includes older adults and individuals who may be anxious about surgical procedures.



This is not a sales role. It is an inbound-only position that demands clear English, a calm and reassuring phone presence, and genuine empathy. You will be the first point of contact for patients, referring dental offices, and clinical staff — and we hold that responsibility to the highest standard.



WHY THIS ROLE MATTERS:

Our phone specialist is the face of the practice. Patients often call us during stressful 
nts — after a referral for surgery, in pain, or with questions about an upcoming procedure. The right person in this role reduces patient anxiety, builds trust, and keeps the practice running smoothly.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

• Answer inbound calls promptly and professionally during all scheduled hours

• Assist new patients, existing patients, and referring dental offices with scheduling and inquiries

• Schedule appointments accurately in Archy (our practice management system — full training provided)

• Route calls appropriately to clinical staff when needed

• Escalate urgent or complex calls per established protocols

• Document all calls clearly and flag high-priority inquiries in a timely manner

• Communicate with the team via Slack and Google Workspace throughout the workday

• Use AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) to assist with drafting responses, looking up information, and improving efficiency



ROLE EXCLUSIONS:

• No medical advice, diagnosis, or clinical opinions

• No treatment explanations beyond approved scripts

• No financial counseling, insurance negotiation, or case closing

• No improvisation outside documented workflows



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS:

• Dental office experience required — must understand dental terminology, common procedures, and the patient experience

• Inbound phone experience in a dental or medical environment

• Excellent spoken English with a neutral or very mild accent — patients must understand you easily on the first listen

• Available Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time (this corresponds to evening/overnight hours in the Philippines)

• Detail-oriented, process-driven, comfortable following scripts and protocols

• Baseline familiarity with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or similar) and willingness to integrate them into daily workflows



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS:

• Oral surgery, dental implant, or maxillofacial experience

• Licensed dentist, dental hygienist, or dental assistant credentials

• Experience speaking with older or anxious patients

• Familiarity with practice management systems, EHR platforms, or scheduling software

• Experience with Slack, Google Workspace, or similar collaboration tools

• Demonstrated ability to use AI tools for work tasks



COMPENSATION & SCHEDULE:

Up to $12/hour USD (~$2,080/month), based on experience. Full-time, remote. Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time. No nights, no weekends. Paid training period (1–2 weeks).



HOW TO APPLY:

Submit a 60–90 second Loom (or similar) video including:

1) 30-second intro: your name, dental experience, and why you're a strong fit

2) Read this script verbatim: "Thank you for calling our office, this is [your name]. How may I help you today? I'd be happy to help you with scheduling. Let me confirm a few details, and if needed, I'll connect you with our clinical team."

3) Mock scenario: A patient calls saying "I was referred by my dentist for a wisdom tooth consultation. I'm really nervous. What should I expect?" Handle it within phone support scope (no clinical advice).



Also submit: 1–2 sentence answer: What AI tools do you currently use, and how do you use them in your work?



IMPORTANT: Applications without a voice recording will NOT be reviewed.

title: Assistant Air Distribution Estimator
description:
The Company 

Texas AirSystems is the largest independent HVAC Equipment and Solutions provider in Texas. Our company has grown to five offices and over 400 employees throughout Texas, with headquarters in Irving, next to the DFW airport. We are proud members of ASA, ASHRAE, BOMA, CEF, TEXO & USGBC. We represent over 60 manufacturers, offering innovative systems with a flexibility of equipment and solutions to best match each application. We work with industry professionals and end users from the conceptual stage of projects to provide energy efficient, value?added solutions to their complex problems 



Our overall mission is simple: we want to create value and make a difference every day in our journey to be the best HVAC sales and service organization in North America. We believe we can succeed in that mission by being the BEST provider for our clients, the BEST partner for manufacturers, the BEST company for our employees, and the BEST investment for our current and future shareholders. 



The Opportunity

This is an entry-level role learning Texas AirSystems air distribution products and systems to estimate projects. As the Assistant Air Distribution Estimator, this individual will be responsible for equipment selection, plan takeoffs and pricing for each project. Must be detail oriented and have excellent organizational skills.  Position requires oral and written correspondence with the Sales Team and Manufacturers to ensure timely completion of estimating projects while maintaining accuracy and documentation. Must be able to work well with others in a fast-paced & high-volume environment.



Responsibilities

• Create and maintain job files

• Optimize the project estimates

• Manage multiple bids on an ongoing basis

• Read, understand and interpret building plans & specifications 

• Determine project requirements, constraints, and sales team responsibilities to meet all of the customer’s system design, installation and maintenance expectations



The Required Profile

• 1-2 years of experience in the HVAC, estimating, engineering, construction management or contracting environment

• Working knowledge of Mechanical design, CAD, general contracting, mechanical contracting, engineering or construction industry a plus

• Ability to prioritize, multi-task, deal with ambiguity and manage high volume of estimataes

• Strong PC skills in Bluebeam and Microsoft Office applications including Word, Excel, and Outlook



Other Skills/Abilities

Operating Skills

Ability to discern between tasks to determine how best to accomplish goals and organize task/people assignments to get results in a timely way. Ability to figure out processes and simplify them in order to maximize work flow. 



Environmental Requirements

Will be required to work in an office environment.



Physical Demands

While performing the duties of this job, the employee is regularly required to use hands to operate computer keyboard and telephone, reach with hands and arms. The employee frequently is required to stand, walk, and sit. The employee is occasionally required to climb or balance and stoop, kneel, crouch, or crawl. The employee must regularly lift and/or move up to 25 pounds. Specific vision abilities required by this job include close vision, distance vision, peripheral vision, depth perception, and ability to adjust focus.



NOTE:  This job description is not intended to be all-inclusive. Employee may perform other related duties as negotiated to meet the ongoing needs of the organization.





Texas AirSystems is an Equal Opportunity Employer

title: SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR
description:
Who We Are

Trixie Lash is a mid-luxury lash supply brand and education platform based in Calgary, Canada. We're not just selling products — we're building a community of lash artists who want more freedom, better clients, and a business that actually works. Our content reflects that: elevated, real, and built to convert.

We're growing fast and we need a video editor who gets the internet.



The Role

We're looking for a short form video editor to take our raw footage and turn it into scroll-stopping content for Instagram Reels and TikTok. You'll work closely with our founder (that's me) to bring our content strategy to life — from day-in-the-life clips to educational hooks to social proof content.

This is not a "trim and add a trending sound" role. We have a specific aesthetic and voice, and we need someone who can execute it consistently.



What You'll Be Doing



Editing 4–8 short form videos per week (Reels and TikToks)

Adding captions, text overlays, transitions, and sound that fit our aesthetic

Taking raw footage and turning it into polished, on-brand content

Keeping up with trending formats and applying them to our niche

Communicating through our content management system (Notion) and turning around edits within 48 hours





You're the Right Fit If You...



Have a portfolio of short form content that actually performs (show us views, not just pretty videos)

Understand hooks — you know why the first 2 seconds matter

Have edited for beauty, lifestyle, or education brands before

Are comfortable working independently and hitting deadlines without hand-holding

Know the difference between content that looks good and content that converts





Our Aesthetic

Think: warm, aspirational, elevated but real. Clean text overlays, intentional pacing, nothing chaotic.



The Details



Part-time contract to start (with room to grow)

Fully remote — work from anywhere

Pay based on experience — include your rate when you apply

Must be available for a short onboarding call to align on brand aesthetic



A short intro (2–3 sentences — tell us who you are)

3–5 examples of short form content you've edited (links preferred)

Your hourly or per-video rate

Your typical turnaround time



Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.
