title: Airbnb Management Customer Success Manager
description:
Company Description:

We operate a rapidly growing serviced accommodation management business that markets our properties on online travel agent (OTA) websites such as Airbnb and 
. Catering to both leisure and contractor worker guests, we provide quality accommodations for those looking to stay at our properties across the UK. With a strong focus on expansion, we are actively working to increase the number of assets under management and strengthen our presence in the market. We are looking to grow to over 50 management properties over the next 12 months and are looking for an operations executive to help grow the business and take care of day to day operations, customer service/care and marketing.



Position Overview:

We are seeking an experienced and proactive Short Term Rental Customer Success Manager to oversee and optimise daily operations for our portfolio of short-term rental properties in the UK. The ideal candidate is not only skilled in managing operations but is also passionate about growing the business rather than simply maintaining its current level. A strong drive to expand and improve operations is essential, as we are looking for someone who can contribute to the company’s continued growth and success.

This individual will work closely with cleaning teams, virtual assistants (VAs), and other stakeholders to ensure smooth property management, excellent guest communications, and scalable growth.

We are looking for a driven individual that wants to grow companies and make a difference, this role has strong promotion potential as we take on more management units.



*Key Responsibilities:*

Property Onboarding & Management:

- List and manage properties on OTA platforms and the company's channel manager (Hostaway).

- Ensure accurate property descriptions, pricing, and availability updates across channel manager, and all OTA’s.



Guest & Communication Management:

- Handle inbound calls from guests, OTA platforms, and cleaning staff.

- Conduct outbound calls for callbacks, follow-ups, business outreach, and cleaner coordination.

- Manage guest interactions using HostAway and SuiteOp to ensure seamless experiences.



 & Scheduling Management:

- Maintain a zero inbox rule, ensuring prompt responses and organised
 management.

- Schedule cleaning and maintenance services to maintain property quality.



Operational Support & Documentation:

- Complete ad-hoc administrative tasks such as document creation, spreadsheets, and presentations.

- Maintain strong team communication via ClickUp and WhatsApp to ensure workflow efficiency.





Key Qualifications:

- Minimum 1 Year of Experience in Airbnb/short-term property management (required).

- Customer Service Experience, with a strong ability to handle guest interactions professionally.

- Exceptional Written & Verbal Communication Skills in English.

- Confidence in Communication, particularly in speaking with individuals from the United Kingdom.

- Adaptability & Willingness to learn new systems and processes.

- Industry Knowledge, with experience or understanding of the real estate and Airbnb industry (in-depth training for the right candidate).



Key Softwares:

- Hostaway; manage the property across OTA’s (required or like for like software).

- Airbnb; communicating with guests, optimising the listings (required).

- 
; communicating with guests, optimising the listings (required).

- SuiteOp; Guest portal system for ID check, security deposits, rental agreements (optional).

- PriceLabs; pricing management software (optional).

- Turno; cleaner management and automation software (optional).



Work Schedule:

- The role will consist of 40 hours per week (time to be confirmed, but roughly 14:00-22:00 UK time)

- 5 days per week

- Company office hours are between 08:30-22:00 GMT (Weekend and holiday coverage included), you are not expected to work outside of your shift hours.

title: WordPress WooCommerce Developer
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We're a web agency looking for a reliable Jr. WordPress Developer to join our small, remote team. You'll handle live client websites daily — from routine maintenance to building new sites and fixing technical issues. This is a hands-on role where reliability and resourcefulness matter more than years of experience.



This is a part time role with the possibility to become a full time role with the right candidate. We are looking for dedicated tea
mbers who enjoy collaborating with tea
mbers, love to learn, enjoy problem solving, and are looking for a long term role with opportunity for growth.



AVAILABILITY REQUIREMENT

You must be available and responsive between 9am–1pm EST on weekdays for collaboration, task handoffs, and time-sensitive updates.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



1. Weekly Website Maintenance

- Run plugin and theme updates using WP Umbrella

- Check site functionality after updates

- Fix broken features or roll back plugin versions when needed

- Know your way around plugin settings and be eager to learn new tools



2. New Website Development 

- Build sites using Kadence Blocks, with full understanding of global settings, header/footer, element templates, and patterns

- Apply a good eye for design — balance, spacing, typography

- Deliver clean, on-brief results with minimal revisions



3. WooCommerce Management

- Configure variable products, bundles, virtual products, and subscriptions

- Set up and troubleshoot shipping rules

- Manage product feeds to Google Merchant Center (GMC)

- Handle time-sensitive updates: monthly banners, sale pricing dates



4. Customer Support Tickets

- Handle client requests for site edits, updates, and fixes

- Work from basic descriptions; find answers independently when needed

- Represent the agency professionally in every response



5. SEO Technical Fixes

- Resolve issues from Semrush audits: broken internal links, 4XX errors, broken JS/CSS, unminified assets, slow load times

- Submit pages to Google Search Console; add keyword tracking in Semrush



6. Content Publishing

- Publish content per brief and SEO guidelines

- Adapt quickly to process changes, especially with AI-assisted workflows



7. Security & Performance

- Maintain strict login security and protect client data

- Work confidently in Perfmatters — including identifying JS scripts to exclude from defer/delay when something breaks



MUST-HAVE SKILLS

? Problem solving and critical thinking

? Strong written and verbal communication skills (English)

? Passion for learning new skills

? Detail oriented

? 1+ year hands-on WordPress experience

? WooCommerce: shipping, variable products, product feeds

? Kadence Blocks (global styles, headers, footers, elements)

? Basic SEO knowledge (GSC, Semrush, canonical tags, redirects)

? Confidence with HTML/CSS for minor edits

? Reliable, meets deadlines, communicates proactively



NICE TO HAVE

• Experience with WP Umbrella or similar maintenance tools

• Familiarity with Perfmatters or similar performance plugins

• Experience with page speed optimization



HOW WE WORK

Small team, async-first, but available for overlap during 9am–1pm. We use SOPs and checklists — we'll train you on our systems. We expect you to be resourceful: if you don't know something, you figure it out and ask smart questions.



TO APPLY

Respond to this application with the following - Include KITCHEN BOWLS in the first line of your application. Send a short summary of your experience and a resume. Also send a Loom video introducing yourself (3–5 min) and walking us through a WordPress site you built or maintained. Tell us: what the project was, one problem you hit, and how you solved it. 



If you don't follow all of the instructions, you will not be considered for the job.

title: TikTok Content Creator for Streetwear Brand
description:
Hello,



I’m looking for someone who can create and post image-based content on TikTok.



The role involves making simple slideshow-style posts using images related to my niche (streetwear/apparel). Each slide will be a 4-image grid collage, creating a clean, engaging montage that showcases different brands and styles.



Content ideas will include things like:



Fashion “ins and outs”

Best brands to buy from

Affordable alternatives to popular brands



Example:

-Out – Hollister / In – [My Brand]

-Out – Sambas / In – Gats

-Out – Skinny jeans / In – Baggy jeans



You’ll be responsible for:

-Finding relevant streetwear brands and images

-Creating grid-style collage slides

-Turning them into TikTok slideshow posts

-Writing captions and posting the content



I will provide examples to follow, so the process should be straightforward.



I’m looking for someone who understands streetwear and TikTok content, can stay consistent, and has strong English skills.



The goal is to post around 3 videos per day.



PLEASE, provide any past experience this is a MUST!



Thank you.

title: Video Editor - Corporate Videos
description:
Who We Are



We partner with video production businesses, agencies, and creative teams to connect them with high-quality editors who can seamlessly integrate into their workflow.



Instead of building in-house teams from scratch (and dealing with the time, cost, and uncertainty that comes with it), our clients rely on us to match them with editors who are already equipped to deliver.



No middle layers.

No unnecessary markups.

Just the right editor, placed with the right team, ready to do great work.



Who We're Looking For



We’re looking for well-rounded video editors who understand that editing is more than just cutting clips — it’s about communicating a message clearly and effectively.



This is not limited to one format.



Our clients work across:



- Brand videos

- Corporate content

- Testimonials

- Ads & marketing content

- Long-form and short-form storytelling



If you can adapt your editing style based on the goal of the project, you’ll fit right in. Or if you have one area of expertise, let us know so we can profile you to the right client.



The Role:



As an editor placed through C3 Studios, you’ll work directly with video teams and businesses who need someone reliable, fast, and detail-oriented.



This is a full-time, remote opportunity for editors who:



- Are comfortable working in a fast-paced environment

- Can handle consistent workload

- Take ownership of their work without constant supervision



You’ll be expected to plug into an existing system and deliver high-quality outputs with minimal friction.



Key Responsibilities



Editing & Storytelling



- Turn raw footage into polished, client-ready videos

- Adapt editing style depending on the project (brand, social, corporate, etc.)

- Maintain clarity, pacing, and engagement



Audio & Visual Quality



-Clean and balance audio

-Apply color correction and grading for consistency



Enhancements



-Add graphics, text, and motion where needed

-Use effects intentionally (not excessively)



Collaboration



-Work with project managers, producers, or clients

-Implement feedback clearly and efficiently



Efficiency



-Handle multiple projects when needed

-Meet deadlines without sacrificing quality



Required Skills & Experience



Experience



-3+ years of video editing experience

-Strong portfolio across different formats



Technical Skills



-Advanced in Adobe Premiere Pro

-If you are working on Davinci Resolve, you can send application too!

-After Effects is a plus

-Solid understanding of audio, color, and pacing



Work Ethic



- Reliable and responsive

- Able to manage time and priorities independently

- Comfortable working remotely with international teams



Communication



- Strong English communication skills

- Can clearly understand feedback and apply it



Technical Requirements

-Minimum 200/200 mbps internet speed

-Computer capable of handling 4K workflows (10-bit 422 preferred)



How This Works

-We match you with clients that fit your skillset

-You work directly with them (no micromanagement from us)



We focus on creating long-term, sustainable partnerships between editors and clients.



What We're Looking For (Important)



To make sure you’ve read everything:



When you apply, please include:



-Your portfolio

-Your monthly rate and hourly rate

-A short message on why you’re a good fit

-Your favorite local actor/actress (this helps us see who reads the post )

-Confirmation that you are comfortable working in a US-based timezone



Why Work With C3 Studios

- Access to consistent, high-quality clients

- No need to chase projects, we bring opportunities to you

- Work remotely with global teams

- Be part of a growing network of professional editors



Apply Now



If you’re an editor who values clarity, consistency, and strong storytelling across different formats, we’d love to connect.



Send your application and let’s find the right fit for you.

title: Property Management Virtual Assistant (Remote)
description:
Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern Standard Time



Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)



About the Company:

We are a fast-growing, vertically integrated real estate investment and property management company based in the United States. We manage a portfolio of residential properties and are focused on delivering high-quality service to our tenants while continuing to scale our operations.



We have been successfully working with virtual assistants in the Philippines for nearly 10 years and have built strong systems, structure, and growth opportunities for long-term tea
mbers.



Position Overview:

We are hiring a Property Management Virtual Assistant to support our day-to-day operations. This is a communication-heavy role that combines tenant relations, leasing coordination, and administrative support.



You will be responsible for managing inbound and outbound communication with tenants and prospective renters, assisting with leasing efforts, and supporting general property management functions.



-Key Responsibilities:

-Tenant Communication & Relations

-Handle inbound and outbound calls, texts, and
s with tenants

-Respond to tenant inquiries in a professional and timely manner

-Assist with resolving tenant concerns and directing issues appropriately

-Communicate regarding maintenance requests and general property issues

-Leasing & Lead Management

-Call and follow up with rental leads to schedule property tours/showings

-Nurture prospective tenants through the leasing process

-Collect feedback from prospects after showings

-Assist in moving prospects toward signed leases

-Lease Administration

-Assist with lease renewals and rent increase communication

-Follow up on delinquent accounts and overdue rent

-Maintain organized records of tenant interactions and lease activity

-General Administrative Support

-Update CRM and property management systems

-Track communications and follow-ups

-Support the team with day-to-day operational tasks



Requirements:

-Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

-Strong phone presence and interpersonal skills

-Comfortable handling a high volume of calls and messages daily

-Highly organized and detail-oriented

-Experience in customer service, real estate, or property management is a plus

-Ability to work full-time during U.S. Eastern hours (9 AM – 5 PM EST)

-Reliable internet connection and quiet working environment



What We’re Looking For:

-A people-oriented professional who enjoys speaking with tenants and prospects

-Someone who is proactive, responsive, and solutions-driven

-A team player who can follow systems and also think independently

-Long-term mindset with interest in growing within the company



Why Join Us:

-Stable, long-term remote position

-Clear systems and structured workflows

-Opportunity for growth and increased responsibility

-Work with an experienced U.S.-based real estate team



How to Apply



Please submit your application along with:

-A short introduction about your experience

-A voice recording or video introduction

-Details of any relevant experience in property management, leasing, or customer service. Be sure to include a smiley face in the subject line of your application ! 



If you are a strong communicator who enjoys helping people and staying organized, we encourage you to apply.

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 3a
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 





CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education



APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED:

title: Google Ads (Search) Campaign Manager – Long-Term, Flat Fee Per Account
description:
Job Description



We’re looking for a Google Ads Search-only campaign manager to help manage and optimize multiple client accounts.



This is not an entry-level role and not a “learning opportunity.”

You will be managing live client ad spend, following SOPs, and optimizing for lead quality, not volume.



This is a long-term position for the right person.



What You’ll Be Doing



-Setting up Google Search-only campaigns



-Structuring campaigns and ad groups based on intent



-Writing and rotating ad copy (no AI-only junk)



-Adding and managing negative keywords



-Weekly optimization and cleanup



-Basic performance summaries and notes



You will not:



-Touch budgets without approval



-Use Smart campaigns



-Use Display or Performance Max



-Use broad match without explicit approval



Requirements (Read Carefully)



-Proven experience managing Google Search Ads



-Comfortable following SOPs and rules



-Understands keyword intent and filtering low-quality traffic



Familiar with:



-Conversion tracking



-Call tracking



-Google Business Profile integrations



-Can explain why you made changes, not just what you changed



If you rely heavily on Google “recommendations,” this is not a fit.



Compensation (Flat Fee – Not Hourly)



We pay per account, not per hour.



Campaign Setup: $100 per account (one-time)



Monthly Management: $75 per account



Typical workload:



~8–12 hours for setup (paid flat)



~4 hours per month per active account



A manager handling 15–20 accounts can earn $1,100–$1,500/month consistently.



Trial Period



Paid trial with one account



30 days



Continued work based on quality, communication, and SOP compliance



How to Apply (Required)



Please include:



A 5–7 minute Loom video explaining how you would structure a Google Search campaign for a high-ticket local or commercial service



Screenshots or brief descriptions of accounts you’ve worked on (client info can be blurred)



Your experience level with Google Ads (years, approximate account count)



Applications without a Loom will not be reviewed.



Final Notes



We are building a small, high-quality team.

We value:



-Clear thinking



-Rule-following



-Consistency



-Long-term reliability



If you’re looking to grow with a stable agency and manage accounts responsibly, apply.

title: Video data labeler for AI boxing coaching app
description:
We're building MyCorner, an AI boxing coach that uses computer vision to detect and classify punches from phone camera video. No sensors, no hardware, just a phone. To train our model, we need accurately labeled boxing footage, and that's where you come in.



The accuracy of our training data directly determines how good the AI coaching is. Your labels are what the model learns from.



What you'll do:



Label boxing videos using our custom labeling software: identify each punch, mark when it starts and ends, and classify the type. Over time, you'll also source new footage from YouTube based on what the model needs.



What we're looking for:



- Someone who can commit full-time (roughly 40 hours/week)

- Attention to detail and patience. This is repetitive, precise work. If you're someone who rushes through things, this isn't the right fit

- Reliable internet connection and a computer that can play video smoothly

- Strong English communication for async check-ins



If you have boxing experience or a genuine interest in the sport, mention it in your application. It's not required, but it helps.



What we offer:



- ?47,100 - ?57,500 per month, paid monthly

- Fully remote, flexible hours. We care about output, not when you're online

- A small, transparent team where your work has direct impact on the product

- Clear documentation and training materials. We've built video guides for everything



To apply:



Reply with a short introduction: who you are, relevant experience, and your availability. If you have any boxing or combat sports experience, include a section on that. No need for a formal cover letter.



If your profile looks like a fit, we'll send you access to our labeling guide and custom labeling tool, along with a test video to label. If that goes well, there's a second short test where we give you specific criteria and you go find and label a video on your own.



Strong submissions move to a paid 1-week trial.



Contract type: Ongoing, contractor



Hours: Full-time (~40 hrs/week)



Duration: Long-term

title: Client Concierge Coordinator
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Client Concierge Coordinator serves as a pivotal support role for clients attending our Essentials Workshops and other Cardone Ventures events. This individual is responsible for ensuring that every client has a seamless and remarkable experience from the 
nt of purchase through event attendance. The role includes managing communications, conducting welcome calls, coordinating event scheduling, and providing customer service support via
, phone, and other communication channels. This person will proactively handle client needs, such as confirming event attendance, addressing concerns, and upselling additional seats or tickets.



This will be a contract position only of 3-6 months



This position is 100% remote.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

Driving an increase in client engagement and event participation by effectively managing communications and follow-ups to ensure high attendance rates, upselling additional seats or tickets, and maximizing event participation



OBJECTIVES

• Manage post-sale client interactions to confirm ticket payments and ensure attendance at purchased events.

• Audit pre-event task completion and manage reminders to ensure clients are ready for their events.

• Assist the Client Concierge Manager in resolving client concerns, answering queries, and enhancing client satisfaction.

• Facilitate event scheduling, including follow-ups with clients who have not scheduled their attendance and rescheduling as necessary.

• Upsell additional event tickets or seats by effectively using sales scripts tailored to various Cardone Ventures events and workshops.

• Build trust and maintain positive client relationships through open and interactive communication.

• Manage various client communications platforms, including HubSpot, Asana, G-Suite, Slick Text, and Aloware, ensuring timely responses and accurate information sharing.

• Monitor and manage und
 calls and tasks, marketing responses, and communication blasts to drive client engagement.

• Support with scrubbing and managing deals related to 10X360 and Essential Workshops to ensure accurate tracking and client follow-up

• Ensure response times to client inquiries are within a 24-hour window, maintaining a high standard of customer service.



COMPETENCIES

• Proven experience in de-escalating client situations while maintaining a positive representation of the Cardone Ventures brand.

• Proficiency in HubSpot, Asana, and G-Suite tools (Sheets, Documents, Gmail, Calendars, Slides).

• Strong communication skills with the ability to memorize and effectively utilize essential sales scripts.

• High level of business acumen to engage with business owners and understand their needs.

• Capable of executing process improvements to streamline client communications and event coordination.

• Ability to manage and prioritize multiple tasks, including daily priority meetings, pre-event qualifications, and managing client communications across multiple platforms.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• At least 2 years’ experience in a customer service role in a professional environment



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

• Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce, 10X Health System recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates, and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:


/

• Repurpose long-form videos into multiple high-quality clips with strong hooks, captions, and clean pacing

• Create marketing materials and resources such as flyers, simple brochures/one-pagers, client guides/checklists, event promos, and branded graphics

• Keep assets organized and on-brand (clean naming, folders, versions)

• Track what performs and improve content based on results (views, retention, engagement)



MUST-HAVES (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

• Proven short-form video editing skills (you can produce polished reels end-to-end)

• Strong ability to repurpose long-form videos into multiple clips efficiently

• Strong English skills (for captions, hooks, and on-screen text)

• Strong design sense for clean, professional marketing materials (Canva or similar)

• Extremely organized: you can run a content calendar and deliver on deadlines

• Tech-savvy and fast with tools and workflows

• Reliable and consistent (you hit deadlines every week)

• Must be able to work 11am–3pm EST, Monday–Friday



NICE-TO-HAVE

• Experience in mortgages, real estate, finance, or other professional services

• Comfortable turning raw talking points into hooks/scripts

• Familiarity with scheduling tools (Meta Business Suite, Later, Buffer, etc.)

• Experience creating client-facing resources (guides, checklists, explainers)



YOUR PORTFOLIO IS REQUIRED

To be considered, you MUST submit:

• Your resume

• A portfolio link that includes:

Short-form video edits (Reels/TikTok/Shorts)

Examples of repurposed clips from long-form content

Marketing materials/graphics you created (flyers, guides, branded assets)

• A short note confirming you can work 11am–3pm EST (M–F)



IMPORTANT: Applications without relevant video editing samples and marketing material samples will not be reviewed.

title: HIRING Full-Time Video Editor for 7 Figures Supplement Brand
description:
About Us

We’re a fast-growing DTC brand in the health supplement space, scaling to 30K days with performance-driven creatives. Every ad we launch is backed by data and crafted to convert. We’re looking for a video editor who not only edits but also thinks like a marketer - someone who wants to grow, push limits, and create winning ads at scale.



The Role

We’re hiring a Video Editor who can consistently deliver high-performing Meta video ads (30–120s). This is a long-term, remote role with $4 start salary which increase if hit rate is on target. Also introducing performance bonuses in 2nd month.



What You’ll Do

- Edit high-converting ads for Meta & Google (30–120s)

- Apply strong hooks, pacing, captions, and transitions

- Work with UGC, b-roll, and AI-generated content (Heygen, ElevenLabs, Nano Banana and VEO3)

- Test UGC-style videos, TikTok-style ads, AI visuals, and VSLs

- Analyze performance data & iterate quickly based on KPIs (hook rate, hold rate, CVR)

- Collaborate closely with the Creative Manager + other editors to push volume

- Source raw footage & voiceovers to bring concepts to life

- Experiment with new formats, trends, and storytelling angles



You Need

- Experience editing performance-driven Meta ads (UGC/direct response)

- Proven portfolio of short-form, direct response ads

- Strong creative eye and ability to deliver 15 ad concepts per week

- Understanding of marketing psychology, hooks, and consumer behavior

- Hunger to grow — willing to test, fail, and iterate fast



What You’ll Get

- Base salary: $4 per hour (start salary that increases if performance is on target) + performance bonuses

- Fully remote role

- Direct collaboration with a high-performing editors, strategists and Founder

- Managed under a dedicated Creative Manager who oversees editors and strategy



How to Apply

Send us a link to your portfolio or past performance ads

Start with text "Sate"

title: Med Spa Appointment Setter (Female)
description:
We help med spas pack their calendars with lip filler and 
 appointments using
 ads. You will be the first voice our clients’ leads hear. That means you are not “just a caller” – you are the front line of revenue.



We have a lot of fun, but we take our work very seriously. The goal is simple:

Be the best.

Have fun doing it.



We do not hire people to “try sales.” We hire people who want to get very good at it. If that sounds like you, keep reading. 



Schedule: flexible 5 days per week, must be available to help out some weekends, Here are the hours in EST 

Morning shift: 8 am – 3 pm EST

Evening shift: 3 pm – 11 pm EST



What You Will Do:

You will live in two modes all day: Hunting leads and Closing leads



Hunting:

Call new leads within 60 seconds every time you are not already on a call. This is non negotiable. Speed to first contact is the biggest driver of show rates. 

Work all clients’ leads in priority order:

Use GHL, Slack and our internal workflows so no lead is ever left behind.

Run our C.L.O.S.E.R. scripts word for word, naturally.

Clarify their goals, label their problem, understand what they’ve tried, then book them into the right offer.

Handle concerns and reinforce their decision so they actually show.



What Success Looks Like...

You are winning here if:

New leads are called in under 60 seconds 

You rehearse the script so much you can breathe it

You follow up a lot, and you personalize them based on the lead’s goal



Compensation:

Base: $500 USD per month + $1,000 Performance pay for doing minimum daily tasks: + (100% of current setters hit this, it is the standard, not a stretch)

Bonuses:

Monthly performance challenges up to +$500 USD extra

Uncapped +$5 USD bonus  for every low ticket booking you generate

Realistic monthly earnings for a solid performer: $1,500 USD





We pay for results and consistency. If you show up, work the system, and hit your numbers, you will earn well above typical VA roles.

Requirements

Non?negotiables:

Comfortable working EST shifts (either 8 am – 3 pm or 3 pm – 11 pm), 5 days per week including rotating weekends with your teammates.





Strong spoken English with a clear, neutral accent that works for US patients.





Internet at least 100 Mbps up and down, stable power (or a reliable backup).





Quality headset, quiet workspace, large monitor + laptop.





Experience in appointment setting, call center, sales, or high?volume customer support is preferred, but raw coachability and work ethic matter more.





Tools you will use daily: GoHighLevel (GHL), Slack





How We Train You:

You get a full playbook and training system:

Daily script rehearsal, roleplays, and call reviews in week one.

A detailed Appointment Setter Handbook that shows you exactly how to win here.

Ongoing coaching so your skills and income go up over time.





The people who win here:

Show up every day and do the repetitive work.

Take notes, ask questions, and actually fix their mistakes.

Treat this like a career, not a side hustle.





**How To Apply**

Send over a voice recording from 
 talking about:



- Why you think you’d be a fit for this role

- Any relevant experience (preferred, not required)

- A goal want to achieve (can be short or long term)



If I like how it sounds, I’ll respond with the next steps for getting started

title: Visual Storyteller | Editor
description:
Visual Storyteller | Video Editor (Remote/Hybrid)

About Re:Action



Re:Action is a cinematic brand storytelling agency. We work with ambitious startups and high-growth companies to craft brand films, campaigns, and content systems that clarify their story and drive growth.



We don’t just edit video — we design stories that move people. Now, we’re looking for a Visual Storyteller | Video Editor to join our team and help bring those stories to life.



The Role



As a Visual Storyteller, you’re not just cutting clips — you’re shaping narrative, rhythm, and emotion. You’ll collaborate with our creative team and founder to transform raw footage into cinematic short-form and long-form pieces for websites, campaigns, and social platforms.



Key Responsibilities



Edit short-form videos (30–90 sec) for social (Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube Shorts).



Edit longer-form content (2–5 min) for brand films, campaigns.



Craft compelling narratives through pacing, music, sound design, and graphics.



Collaborate with the team on creative direction and story structure.



Repurpose existing assets into new content formats while keeping the cinematic feel.



Stay on top of editing trends, motion graphics, and social-first storytelling styles.



What We’re Looking For



Strong portfolio that shows story-driven editing, not just flashy cuts.



Proficiency in DaVinci Resolve (preferred) or Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects.



Understanding of pacing, rhythm, and storytelling in video.



Ability to integrate graphics, subtitles, and text animations when needed.



Creative eye for detail — color, sound, and mood.



Self-starter who can work independently and meet deadlines.



Bonus: experience editing cinematic commercial work or founder-led content.



Compensation & Commitment



Freelance / Part-Time to start (with option to grow into Full-Time).



Competitive pay depending on experience.



Remote-friendly, with flexible hours as long as deadlines are met.



Opportunity to work on high-end, cinematic campaigns for startups and brands.



How to Apply



Send your CV and portfolio/reel to 
 with the subject line: “Visual Storyteller Application – [Your Name]”.

Include 2–3 examples of your strongest story-driven edits (commercial, brand, or social).

title: Video Editor – AI-Powered E-Commerce Ads (Freelance / Ongoing)
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing e-commerce company running multiple personalized gift brands (mugs, tumblers, and other print-on-demand products). We create and scale high-performing video ads on Meta 
 & Instagram) and are looking for a talented video editor to join our team on an ongoing basis.



What You'll Do



Create scroll-stopping short-form video ads (15–30 sec) in vertical 9:16 format for Meta and TikTok advertising

Use AI tools to generate realistic lifestyle product shots — this is a core part of the role. Our ads feature AI-generated scenes such as:

Hands holding/unboxing personalized mugs and tumblers in cozy, realistic settings

Product reveals on natural surfaces (wood slices, kitchen counters, etc.)

Pouring scenes (coffee/tea being poured into mugs)

UGC-style "unboxing" 
nts that feel authentic but are fully AI-generated

Compose these AI-generated shots into polished, high-converting video ads with:

Emotional text overlays/hooks at the top (e.g. "My daughter surprised me with this", "This Mother's Day means everything")

Smooth zoom-ins and reveal transitions

Background music that matches the emotional tone

Clean, professional pacing (15–21 seconds)

Produce multiple ad variations and iterations for A/B testing

Create content around seasonal 
nts (Mother's Day, Father's Day, birthdays, holidays, etc.)

Stay up to date with the latest AI video and image generation tools and trends



What We're Looking For



Proven experience creating short-form video ads for e-commerce / D2C / print-on-demand brands

Strong proficiency with AI image and video generation tools (Midjourney, RunwayML, Kling, Pika, HeyGen, or similar) — you must be able to generate realistic product-in-scene shots using AI

Skilled in video editing software (CapCut, Premiere Pro, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

Eye for what makes a scroll-stopping ad — you understand pacing, emotional hooks, and storytelling for personalized gift products

Ability to work independently, take creative direction, and deliver quickly

Reliable communication and ability to meet deadlines



Reference Content

To give you an idea of the style and quality we're looking for, check out these example ads:











Also look at the content style of brands like PetPrinted, Pawsionate, and WanderPrints for additional reference.



The Style in a Nutshell

Vertical (9:16), 15–21 second videos featuring AI-generated realistic product lifestyle shots of personalized mugs/tumblers. The feel is UGC-style but fully AI-created — someone holding the product, unboxing it, pouring coffee into it. Emotional text hooks overlay the visuals, with smooth transitions and music. Clean, professional, and designed to stop the scroll on Meta.



Details



Freelance / contract basis with potential for long-term collaboration

Volume: multiple videos per week

Payment: per video or monthly retainer (to be discussed)



How to Apply

Please include in your application:



A link to your portfolio or examples of video ads you've created (especially for personalized/POD products)

Examples of AI-generated product shots you've produced — this is essential

The AI tools and video editing software you're most experienced with

Your availability and rate

title: Operations Manager (Solar Operations)
description:
ABOUT SUNSENT

SunSent is a fast-growing U.S.-based solar and roofing company. We are expanding our operations and looking for a highly organized, process-driven Operations Manager to lead and optimize our solar operations.



We are looking for someone structured, detail-oriented, and execution-focused, someone who can build systems, manage teams, and ensure smooth coordination across departments.



COMPENSATION

• $350–$425/week, $1,400-$1,700/month (depending on experience)

• Paid weekly



ROLE OVERVIEW

As our Operations Manager, you will:

• Oversee day-to-day solar operations from sale to installation

• Manage workflow across sales, permitting, scheduling, and installation teams

• Build and improve operational systems and processes (SOPs)

• Track project timelines, backlog, and completion rates

• Ensure clear communication between departments

• Identify bottlenecks and implement solutions

• Maintain accurate reporting and performance tracking

• Coordinate closely with U.S.-based leadership



You will report directly to our COO.



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

• Proven experience in operations management (solar, construction, or service-based industry preferred)

• Strong understanding of workflow management and process improvement

• Experience managing teams and holding accountability

• Excellent organizational and problem-solving skills

• Strong communication skills (written and verbal)

• Experience using CRM and operations tools such as AccuLynx, Dialpad, and similar platforms

• Highly structured, disciplined, and detail-oriented

• Must be comfortable working U.S. business hours (Central Standard Time)



NICE TO HAVE

• Experience in solar operations (permitting, installation, interconnection)

• Familiarity with EOS (Entrepreneurial Operating System)

• Experience working with U.S.-based teams



WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

We are specifically looking for candidates who are:

• Detail-oriented

• Process-driven and highly structured

• Strong in execution and accountability

• Data-driven and analytical

• Proactive problem-solvers

• Strong leaders who can manage and align teams



This is a highly structured, performance-driven role where consistency, organization, and follow-through are critical to success.



(We utilize Culture Index as part of our hiring process.)



HOW TO APPLY

To apply, please submit:

• Your updated resume

• A short message explaining your operations management experience

• Any relevant experience in solar or roofing operations



Only shortlisted candidates will move to the next stage.



We’re excited to meet a strong Operations Manager who can help scale and strengthen SunSent’s operations.



Apply now!

title: AI Video Creator — Biblical History YouTube Channel (Full-Time)
description:
Job Post  AI Video Creator for Biblical History YouTube Channel



Salary Range: Open to discuss based on experience and skill level, but price must be very good



About the Channel

We run a growing YouTube channel focused on biblical history — bringing stories from the Bible to life using AI-generated visuals. Think "rebuilt" footage that takes the viewer back 2,000 years and shows them what life actually looked like in the time of Jesus. Our videos are getting strong traction and we're scaling to 3-4 videos per week.





What You'll Be Doing



Creating 3 to 4 complete videos per week (12-16 minutes each)

Generating AI images and footage that look photorealistic — ancient villages, interiors, landscapes, people in biblical settings

Editing full videos from script to final upload-ready file (voiceover will be provided)

Creating consistent visual styles across videos — same color grading, same feel, same quality

Generating thumbnail images from prompts we provide

Light motion/animation on still AI images (Ken Burns, subtle movement, transitions)



What We Need From You



Strong experience with AI image generation (Midjourney, DALL-E, Gemini, Flux, or similar)

Ability to create photorealistic images that don't look "AI" — natural lighting, correct skin tones, no extra fingers, no plastic faces

Video editing skills (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut, or similar)

Understanding of how to create visual storytelling — not just pretty images, but images that TELL A STORY scene by scene

Ability to match reference styles (we will provide example channels and thumbnails you need to match)

Reliable internet and ability to deliver on deadline



Bonus Skills (Not Required But a Plus)



Experience with AI video generation tools (Runway, Pika, Kling, etc.)

Experience creating content for YouTube specifically

Understanding of biblical or historical content

Experience with consistent AI character creation across multiple scenes



What We Provide



Full scripts with detailed editor notes and visual scene descriptions

Voiceover credits

Thumbnail

Reference channels and examples to match

Clear feedback and direction



This is NOT a good fit if:



You only know basic video editing without AI image generation

Your AI images look obviously AI (plastic skin, weird lighting, deformed hands)

You cannot deliver 3-4 videos per week consistently

You need heavy supervision on every creative decision



How to Apply

Send us:



A short NON AI message about your experience with AI image generation and video editing

3-5 examples of AI-generated images you've created (historical or realistic style preferred)

A link to any video work you've done (YouTube or portfolio)

Your availability and how many hours per week you can commit

Your expected monthly salary



We respond to every serious application. Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: AI Developer (Offshore)
description:
Focus: Building Practical AI Tools for Real Estate & Business Operations

We’re looking for a sharp, execution-focused AI Developer to help us build and maintain internal and customer-facing AI tools. This is not a research role. You’ll be shipping real products that automate workflows, analyze data, and create leverage across our businesses. You’ll work directly with founders and operators, turning clear business problems into scalable AI solutions.



What You’ll Work On:

Build AI agents and tools that automate real workflows (research, underwriting, CRM enrichment, content, ops).

Develop LLM-powered applications using OpenAI or similar APIs.

Design prompt frameworks, tool calling, and agent logic.

Connect AI models to real systems (CRMs, databases, APIs, spreadsheets).

Improve model accuracy, reliability, and cost efficiency.

Create lightweight dashboards or interfaces for internal teams.

Document systems so they can scale and be reused.

Tech Stack (Flexible, But You Should Be Comfortable With Most)

Python (primary)

JavaScript / TypeScript (for interfaces or integrations)

OpenAI API / Anthropic / LLM frameworks

LangChain, LlamaIndex, or similar (or ability to build without them)

Vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, FAISS, etc.)

APIs, webhooks, and automation tools

Basic cloud deployment (AWS, GCP, or similar)



What We’re Looking For:

2–5+ years of software development experience

Hands-on experience building AI or LLM-powered tools

Strong problem-solving mindset — you think in systems, not tasks

Ability to translate vague ideas into working software

Clear communication and documentation

Comfortable working async with US-based founders

Nice to Have (Not Required)

Experience with agents or multi-step AI workflows

Experience in real estate, finance, or business operations

Frontend experience (React, simple dashboards)

Experience optimizing LLM costs and latency



Working Style:

Offshore, full-time or part-time (long-term preferred)

Async friendly with overlapping US hours as needed

You’ll be given ownership, not micromanagement

Speed and output matter more than perfection

Why This Role Is Different

You’re building tools that actually get used, not demos.

Direct access to founders and fast decision-making.

Opportunity to grow into a Lead AI Engineer role as we scale.

Exposure to multiple businesses, data sets, and real-world use cases.



To Apply

Please include:

Examples of AI tools or systems you’ve built

Your preferred tech stack

Availability (hours/week)

Rate expectations

title: Customer Experience Member
description:
Company: Blessinger Legal PLLC

Department: Customer Experience

Reports to: CSE Supervisor



Compensation & Schedule

Rate: $6 – $7 per hour

Employment Type: Full-Time



Position Purpose

The Customer Experience Representative serves as the first point of contact for clients seeking assistance with the company’s services. This role is responsible for managing inquiries across multiple channels, maintaining accurate client records, and ensuring a high level of client satisfaction through professional and timely support.

The ideal candidate will have strong customer service experience triaging calls of various types and on a complexity of issues with a respectful and sympathetic tone. They will be able to document client calls, forward them, and follow up with clients in a proactive manner. 



Primary Responsibilities

Ensure a positive, professional, and efficient client service experience

Manage client inquiries via phone,
, chat, SMS, and social media

Handle inbound and outbound calls; log and classify calls (e.g., transfer, inquiry, follow-up)

Address client concerns and escalate complex issues to the appropriate department

Provide accurate information about services and general assistance

Proactively follow up with clients on ongoing cases or requests

Maintain and update client records and documentation

Identify potential service issues and initiate proactive solutions

Stay updated on company policies, procedures, and service trends

Recommend improvements based on client feedback

Perform administrative or support tasks during low call volume (e.g., contacting attorneys regarding cases)



Performance Expectations

Handle multiple calls when needed (typically up to 3 simultaneously)

Maintain strong call handling efficiency (AHT awareness)



Basic Requirements

At least 1 year experience as a receptionist in a US-based company

Prior experience in customer service and/or calling roles

Strong English communication skills (verbal and written)

Experience handling inbound and outbound calls

Familiarity with logging calls and categorizing interactions

Proficiency in Microsoft Office and Google Workspace

Ability to multitask and manage multiple client interactions simultaneously

Strong problem-solving and interpersonal skills

Ability to work proactively and independently





Preferred Qualifications

Previous experience as a customer service representative

Fluency in English and Spanish

Familiarity with INSZoom or Docketwise

title: Real estate admin
description:
Role Overview

The role focuses on identifying and contacting owners of existing HMOs with the aim of sourcing off?market or pre?market acquisition opportunities. The assistant will work primarily through HMO licensing databases, council records, and other publicly available sources to build accurate lead lists and initiate first contact with landlords. The goal is to help secure properties that already hold HMO status, removing the risks associated with planning permission, Article 4 restrictions, and change?of?use applications.

Key Responsibilities

•  Search and extract data from local authority HMO registers, licensing databases, and other public records to identify suitable existing HMOs.

•  Compile and maintain lead lists including landlord names, contact details, property addresses, licence status, and any relevant notes.

•  Conduct outreach to landlords via
, phone, or messaging platforms to introduce the company, gauge interest in selling, and arrange follow?up conversations.

•  Track all communication in a structured CRM or spreadsheet, ensuring accurate notes, dates, and outcomes.

•  Pre?qualify opportunities by gathering basic information on property condition, tenancy status, rental income, and landlord motivation.

•  Monitor changes in HMO licensing data and flag new opportunities as they appear.

•  Support negotiation preparation by providing background research on properties, comparable sales, and local market conditions.

•  Handle sensitive information with confidentiality and professionalism at all times.

Skills & Experience

•  Strong research skills and the ability to navigate council databases and public records.

•  Excellent written and verbal communication, especially for professional outreach.

•  Comfortable making cold or warm contact with landlords and property owners.

•  Highly organised, with experience using spreadsheets or CRM tools.

•  Ability to work independently, follow processes, and meet weekly targets.

•  Prior experience in property sourcing, lettings, acquisitions, or virtual assistance is beneficial but not essential.

Personal Qualities

•  Persistent and proactive in following up leads.

•  Detail?oriented, especially when handling data.

•  Professional, polite, and confident when speaking with landlords.

•  Motivated by results and comfortable working to KPIs.

Working Hours & Structure

•  Remote, flexible working.

•  Part?time or full?time depending on availability and performance.

•  Weekly reporting on leads generated, contacts made, and opportunities identified.

Purpose of the Role

This position directly supports the acquisition strategy of purchasing existing HMOs, allowing the business to bypass planning risk, Article 4 restrictions, and delays associated with change?of?use applications. The assistant plays a key role in sourcing compliant, income?producing properties that can be purchased quickly and efficiently.

title: Director of Marketing / Social Media Specialist
description:
Seeking a part-time Director of Marketing with a strategic mindset to spearhead our
 marketing and communications strategies, ultimately driving sales growth and enhancing customer retention. This position will be responsible for the comprehensive development and implementation of promotional efforts for the upcoming release of “Six Until Dawn.” 

The ideal candidate will blend innovative thinking with data-driven analysis to ensure messaging consistency, brand alignment, and measurable outcomes. This role also entails providing strategic oversight and operational support to facilitate the successful scaling of book sales. 



This opportunity is imbued with purpose and has the potential to make a significant impact by effectively communicating Jeannie Wishal’s work and values to a global audience.



ESSENTIAL DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES:

•
 Campaign Strategy: Design and execute a targeted marketing campaign for the author, focusing on both sales’ generation and educational outreach. 

• Content Creation: Craft a detailed overview of the author, Jeannie Wishal, that emphasizes her expertise and aligns with our strategic objectives. The focus should be on encouraging the target audience to engage in her literary works and highlighting how they complement and advance our mission and goals.

• Campaign Management: Develop a dedicated webpage for promoting author book signings, incorporating functionality to direct potential readers to purchasing options for the book. This page should feature an engaging layout, integrate a calendar for upcoming events, and include hyperlinks to various retail platforms where the book is available for sale. Additionally, implement best practices to enhance visibility and drive people to the site.

• Analytics and Reporting: Monitor response metrics and optimize sales conversions while pinpointing opportunities for enhancement.

• Collaboration: Collaborate intensively with the author to devise comprehensive campaign strategies that align with overarching objectives and desired outcomes.

• Customer Support: Deliver technical guidance and support to customers, troubleshooting issues effectively, and optimizing operational workflows for seamless performance.

• Event Coordination: Coordinate the logistics for book signings, encompassing the planning and execution of setup, inventory control, and promotional initiatives to optimize engagement and operational efficiency.

• Ensure meticulous documentation of all communications and interactions by leveraging suitable software solutions.



EDUCATION: Associate degree (minimum)



EXPERIENCE: Minimum of 3 years of experience related to Sales and Marketing.



CERTIFICATION: N/A



KNOWLEDGE, SKILLS, AND ABILITIES:

• Exceptional time management and organization skills

• Strong oral and written communication skills

• Ability to work independently, collaboratively, and under supervision.

• Willingness to serve and build relationships with customers and the author

• Must possess strong initiative, leadership skills, organizational and project management skills, with the ability to multitask in managing a variety of projects and priorities, coordinating the actions of others, follow through on duties to timely completion, and demonstrate excellent judgment with attention to detail.

• Microsoft Office experience with Word, Outlook, Publisher, Excel, and PowerPoint software experience.

• Must support the author’s mission.



WORKING CONDITIONS: Work is performed indoors, with minimal safety hazards, and requires seated, standing, and moving work.



The outlined responsibilities and qualifications should not be viewed as an exhaustive list of all expectations for this role; instead, they delineate the core criteria for this position. Currently, this is a part-time role, with the potential to convert to full-time contingent upon exceeding sales and marketing performance benchmarks.



Applicants should submit a link to their CV as part of the application. In your cover letter, state the years of experience in marketing and share a brief summary of your marketing experience and the roles you have previously worked in.

title: Webflow Designer for Service-Based Websites
description:
Are you a Webflow designer who leans more editorial, refined, and minimal than techy and heavy?



We’re looking for a designer to support ongoing client projects.

Our work is strategy-led, clean, and conversion-focused, with a strong emphasis on white space, hierarchy, and restraint.



This is not a role for “just build it” developers.

We care about how things feel, not just how they function.



THE TYPE OF WORK WE DO



We design websites for service-based businesses.



Think

Clean layouts

Strong hierarchy

Generous white space

Refined typography

Subtle interactions

Elevated, considered design



Not

Dark, heavy, tech-style builds

Over-designed layouts

Cluttered sections or excessive effects



If your portfolio leans corporate, SaaS, or developer-heavy, this likely isn’t the right fit.



WHY YOU’LL ENJOY WORKING WITH US



Clear direction. Strategy, copy, and wireframes are provided

Defined scope. No guesswork, no vague briefs

Flexible hours. Work to deadlines, not fixed shifts

Respectful collaboration. No last-minute chaos

Long-term partnership. Consistent work for the right person



We prioritise quality over speed.



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



Build websites in Webflow based on provided strategy and wireframes

Translate brand direction into clean, high-end layouts

Structure CMS collections logically

Apply SEO basics during build

Refine and improve existing Webflow sites

Ensure all builds are easy for clients to manage



Optional



Design in Figma before build



REQUIRED SKILLS



WEBFLOW

Strong experience building in Webflow

Confident with CMS, components, and interactions

Clean builds only. No messy overrides or shortcuts



CLIENT-FIRST

Solid understanding of Client-First structure

Clear class naming and scalable systems



SEO BASICS

Proper heading structure

Meta titles and descriptions

Alt text and CMS SEO fields

Internal linking



THE NON-NEGOTIABLE



Your work must demonstrate

Strong use of white space

Clean, minimal layouts

High-end, service-based design

Thoughtful typography



We will not consider portfolios that



Feel overly masculine, tech-heavy, or corporate

Are cluttered or visually noisy

Prioritise effects over clarity



YOUR WORKING STYLE



You work well independently with clear direction

You communicate early if something’s off

You meet deadlines

You’re open to feedback

You take pride in clean, considered work



HOURS AND RATE



Part-time, ongoing

Flexible hours

Work to deadlines, not fixed shifts

Rate based on experience



HOW TO APPLY



2 to 4 live Webflow sites you personally built

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About the Role



We’re a boutique branding studio based in the Netherlands, working at the intersection of identity, systems, and design execution. We’re looking for a Brand & UI Systems Designer — someone who can translate brand identity into structured, scalable visual assets across decks, templates, interfaces, and documentation.



This is a part-time remote role (3 fixed days/week) with the potential to grow into a full-time position. You’ll work on both client-facing and internal design systems — creating clarity, consistency, and structure in everything you build.



If you enjoy making brands work — not just look good — this is for you.



---



What You’ll Do



- Apply and extend brand systems across digital and print applications

- Design structured layouts, branded decks, templates, and documentation visuals

- Build and maintain brand kits, internal design tools, and asset libraries

- Create light UI components and visuals that support interface design (e.g., Webflow mockups, content visuals)

- Work independently but collaboratively — with support from our design and strategy team

- Use Figma, Illustrator, and InDesign as your core tools

- Keep all files organized, scalable, and developer-ready where needed



---



What This Role is Not



This is not a generalist or social media content role.



It’s also not for junior designers focused purely on visual trends or aesthetics.



We’re looking for someone who:



- Thinks in systems, not just single-use visuals

- Builds brand architecture, not just one-off designs

- Can adapt identity into interface and layout logic



---



What We’re Looking For



- 5+ years of experience in branding, identity design, or UI-aligned visual systems

- Strong portfolio showing brand system implementation across multiple touchpoints

- Experience creating and managing assets like design kits, templates, and documentation

- Confident with tools like Figma, Illustrator, and InDesign

- Good habits around file structure, versioning, and organized delivery

- Excellent English (C1/C2 level) — both written and spoken

- Available to work 3 fixed days/week (6–8 hours/day)

- Comfortable working independently and owning deliverables



---



Nice to Have



- Experience with Shopify (designing assets, layout support)

- Familiarity with Webflow or other no-code platforms

- Proficiency with Premiere Pro and After Effects

- Interest in building internal systems and improving design operations



---



Compensation & Benefits



- Monthly range: 45,000 – 65,000PHP, depending on experience and portfolio 

- Final offer based on your portfolio, profile, and a short design use case test

- Path to grow into a full-time position if the collaboration is strong

- 13th month bonus for long-term contributors (including part-time)

- Be part of a team that values clarity, autonomy, and systems thinking



---



How to Apply



Send us:



- Your portfolio — focused on brand systems, templates, or UI-aligned identity work

- A short motivation explaining why this role fits your skill set and mindset



If there’s a potential fit, we’ll invite you to complete a short design use case as part of the evaluation.

title: Full-Time Remote SEO Link Builder & Outreach Specialist (Portfolio of Multiple Websites)
description:
We are a growing company with a portfolio of websites and need a dedicated, full-time remote Link Builder to take full ownership of our off-page SEO. You will buy and secure high-quality backlinks, write & post guest articles, monitor rankings and traffic impact, and deliver consistent results across all our sites. This is a long-term role for someone who loves results and can work independently./



Key Responsibilities:



Prospect, outreach, negotiate, and buy high-quality links (niche edits, guest posts, resource links, paid placements – mix of free + paid is fine)



Research, write, or coordinate SEO-optimized articles and get them published on relevant sites



Monitor daily/weekly rankings, traffic, and backlink profiles using Ahrefs, SEMrush, Google Search Console



Perform competitor backlink gap analysis and find new opportunities every week



You tell us what links to buy weekly or monthly



Keep detailed tracking sheets and send professional weekly reports (links acquired, cost, live URLs, ranking impact)



Ensure every link is relevant, high-authority, and white-hat



What We Offer (Hybrid Pay – You Earn More When You Deliver More):



Base salary: $850 – $1,000 USD per month (depending on experience and proven results)



Performance bonus:  extra for ranking/traffic lifts (to be discussed later as websites perform)



Separate reimbursable link-buying budget ($1,000–$2,000+/month across all sites – you control spending)



Full-time (40 hrs/week), long-term, with room to grow



Work from anywhere (strong preference for Philippines for time-zone alignment)



Requirements:



1+ years real experience buying links, guest posting, and outreach (not just theory)



Proficient with Ahrefs / SEMrush for ranking monitoring and competitor research



Strong English writing skills (you will post articles)



Highly organized and self-motivated – able to manage 5–15+ websites at once



Portfolio of recent links you have secured (we will check them in Ahrefs)



How to Apply:



Reply with the subject line “Link Builder Application – [Your Name]” and include:



Your expected monthly base salary



8–10 examples of backlinks you personally secured recently (URLs + short note on how you got each)



Screenshot or description of how you currently monitor rankings



Why you’re the right person for a multi-site portfolio role



We need people that are self motivated, we don't have time to chase people up.

title: E-commerce Supply Chain Coordinator
description:
We are a fast-growing European e-commerce brand selling across Amazon EU, 
 and other marketplaces, supported by a main warehouse in the Netherlands and multiple external fulfillment networks (FBA & LVB).



We are looking for a structured and hands-on Supply Chain Coordinator / Specialist to own replenishment execution, shipment coordination, and inventory control.



This is NOT an admin role.

This is a planning, execution and control role.



Responsibilities:



• Plan and execute replenishment to FBA and LVB from our NL main warehouse

• Balance stock across external warehouses while protecting main warehouse levels

• Plan based on daily sales velocity, stock on hand, and incoming inventory

• Prioritize fast restocking of out-of-stock SKUs

• Create and manage FBA shipments in Seller Central (box & pallet)

• Coordinate shipments with our fulfillment partner and carriers

• Manage pallet bookings via Amazon Freight

• Support AGL container planning where relevant

• Maintain shipment tracking and PO planning in Airtable

• Allocate order line quantities across containers (manual allocation)

• Organize and upload shipping documents accurately

• Maintain clear inbound visibility at all times



Requirements:



• 2–4+ years experience with Amazon FBA operations

• Strong understanding of replenishment planning and inventory flow

• Experience with international freight and warehouse coordination

• Strong Airtable / spreadsheet skills

• High attention to detail and structured working style

• Proactive, ownership-driven mindset



Note: LVB is a Dutch fulfillment platform. Prior experience with LVB is not required, as we will train you.



We value structure, precision and accountability.



To apply, answer with a 1 minute video introducing yourself and why you think you would be a good fit for this role.

title: Shopify & Zendesk Customer Service Agent (Part-Time, Long-Term)
description:
We are looking for a highly detail-oriented and experienced Customer Service Agent to join our expanding eCommerce team. This is a part-time role with the potential to transition to full-time based on performance.



This position is not suitable for beginners. We need someone who can work independently, follow established workflows, and handle customer issues with minimal supervision using our customer service guide.





Role Details:



- $4/hour

- 20 hours per week (Monday–Friday)

- Timeproof tracker required for logging work hours

- Opportunity for full-time hours based on performance



Key Responsibilities



- Manage customer inquiries via Zendesk

- Process return requests for refunds or exchanges

- Handle chargebacks and PayPal disputes



Minimum Requirements:

(Please DO NOT apply if you do not meet all of the following criteria)



- 1+ year of experience in customer support, specifically in drop shipping eCommerce

- Hands-on experience with Shopify and Zendesk

- Excellent written English communication skills

- Ability to work independently and follow detailed workflows

- Must be able to use our customer service guide effectively

- Self-starter with a quick learning ability

- Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

- Must have no other job 

- Positive team player attitude



Preferred Experience:

-Familiarity with Duoplane or similar order management systems



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS 



Failure to follow the application instructions exactly will result in automatic rejection. Please ensure you complete ALL steps as follows:



1. Subject line format: [Your Favorite Animal] – Shopify CSR Application

2. In the body of your application, please answer the following questions:

- How many tickets did you handle per day in your last role?

- What was the name of the drop shipping store you worked with? (This confirms relevant experience.)

- Describe a difficult customer situation you faced and how you resolved it.

- How did you manage return requests in your previous job?

- Share examples of similar roles you’ve held in the past.

3. Record a short loom video (1-2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining your relevant experience, including how you’ve handled:

- Return requests

- "Item not received" complaints

- "Wrong item received" complaints

- "Item not as described" complaints



We will only review applications that follow these instructions exactly.

title: Ebook Editor / Proofreading / Copyediting
description:
The ideal candidate will be responsible for refining ebooks and books generated by our internal AI system, making them more engaging, human-sounding, accurate, and error-free. This role involves correcting grammatical mistakes, improving clarity and readability, enhancing the value of the content, and ensuring the manuscript aligns with the client’s expectations for a polished, professional final product.



The editor will work with a prewritten draft created by AI. Your primary focus is to elevate the content through precise, detail-oriented editing—making small but impactful improvements that enhance flow, structure, tone, and usefulness for the intended audience. You should be able to spot inconsistencies, content gaps, weak explanations, or missing context, and fill them in as needed based on the project brief.



We are specifically looking for someone who has strong experience with proofreading, copyediting, and more complex editorial work—even before the rise of AI tools. Your expertise in traditional editing will help us merge high-quality editorial standards with our innovative AI-driven systems to create a smooth, modern workflow.



You will also play a valuable role in helping us improve our internal processes. As you work with our drafts, we expect you to give us feedback and help identify areas where our systems can be refined so we can consistently deliver better, more accurate first drafts to you and the rest of our editing team.



Responsibilities:



- Edit and proofread ebooks and books for grammar, clarity, tone, structure, and readability.

- Enhance AI-generated drafts to make them engaging, accurate, and aligned with the intended audience.

- Improve content using small but meaningful edits rather than rewriting the entire draft.

- Ensure the manuscript meets the client’s brief, style preferences, and project goals.

- Identify and address content gaps, unclear explanations, or inconsistencies.

- Conduct light research when necessary to strengthen sections or add missing context.

- Provide insights and suggestions to help us improve our AI prompts, templates, and systems.

- Prepare clean, polished documents ready for formatting and design.



Requirements:



- Strong experience in proofreading, copyediting, and substantive/complex editing (prior to AI).

- Exceptional writing and editing skills, with the ability to elevate AI-generated content.

- Strong attention to detail and organizational abilities.

- Ability to interpret and meet client expectations while maintaining content accuracy.

- Familiarity with Google Docs and ChatGPT (or willingness to learn quickly).

- Creative thinking, analytical skills, and the ability to enhance content quality.

- Full fluency in American English, including grammar, spelling, and style conventions.

- Experience with ebooks, book editing, digital products, or Amazon KDP is a strong advantage.



P.S. We are looking for someone who can work consistently almost every day during the week. You don’t need to start full time, but we require at least 20–25 hours per week from the beginning. We receive new orders almost daily, and we want you to be able to take on projects promptly. As we continue to scale, this role can grow into a full-time, long-term partnership with even more hours and ongoing work.



Looking forward to working together!

Tomas Placko

title: Migration of landing pages ASAP
description:
In need of a web design specialist to facilitate the migration of 2 landing pages in Framer to Wordpress. Tasks include

• Rebuild and redesign 2 existing Framer landing pages within the WordPress environment

• Match the current visual design, layout, branding, typography, spacing and overall user experience as closely as possible

• Maintain as many existing Framer animations, hover states, transitions and interactive effects as possible within WordPress

• Ensure both landing pages are fully responsive across desktop, tablet and mobile

• Build pages in a way that is easy to update internally post-launch

• Configure all page sections, buttons, forms and CTA pathways to function correctly in WordPress

• Recreate or embed any required forms for ebook downloads, enquiry submissions and sales call bookings

• Integrate booking tools, CRM forms (goHighLevel) or third-party embeds where required

• Setup and configure Google and Meta pixel tracking across both landing pages

• Configure event tracking for key conversion actions including page views, ebook downloads, button clicks, form submissions and sales call bookings

• Verify that all tracking is firing correctly through tools such as Meta Events Manager, Google Tag Manager and/or GA4

• Setup thank you pages, redirects or conversion confirmation steps where needed

• Optimise page speed, image compression and overall performance for WordPress

• Test browser compatibility across major browsers

• Test all links, forms, tracking events, booking flows and downloads before launch

• Implement any required privacy, cookie or tracking consent elements

• Support domain or subdomain connection 

• Conduct final QA and pre-launch checks

• Provide post-migration support for minor fixes after launch
