title: Elite AI Video Creator (MUST use Nano Banana Pro or Seedance 2.0)
description:
We are Interlink AI, an emerging Synthetic Media Studio based in Australia. We build hyper-realistic, cinematic commercial video assets for enterprise brands.



We are looking for a bleeding-edge AI Video Creator & Prompt Engineer to join our production pipeline. I do not care what niche your current portfolio is in (sports, luxury cars, architecture, cyberpunk, etc.)—I just want to see your undeniable, god-tier visual quality and motion consistency.



THE NON-NEGOTIABLE TOOLS: You MUST be an active user of Nano Banana Pro and/or Seedance 2.0



Your Responsibilities:

- Taking our creative briefs and visual equations (First Frame + Last Frame).

- Executing complex frame-to-frame interpolations using your software access.

- Managing the rendering queues (Your Philippines timezone is a massive advantage here for hitting Chinese servers during their off-peak hours).

- Delivering raw, broadcast-ready MP4s to our shared Drive.



???? HOW TO APPLY (Read Carefully - This is a test):

I receive hundreds of spam applications. To prove you are a real human and actually have active access to these specific tools, you must format your application exactly like this:

1. Start your message with the exact word: SYNTHETIC

2. Send me a link to your portfolio (Google Drive, YouTube, Instagram, etc.) showcasing your absolute BEST videos generated specifically using either Nano Banana Pro or Seedance 2.0. Tell me which tool you used for the videos.

3. CRUCIAL: You must attach at least ONE uncropped screenshot of your actual computer screen showing the Nano Banana Pro or Seedance 2.0 workspace/UI with a generation in progress. I need to see the tool interface to prove you have an active account/workflow and didn't just download someone else's video.



If you are an elite operator who understands how to bend these specific models to your will, we have a massive opportunity for you to scale with our studio.

title: AI Content Creator & Community Manager (US Basketball/Sports)
description:
About Us:

We run a highly scalable social media network based in Australia. Our flagship basketball debate brand, KingVsAir, is rapidly expanding its daily output. We are looking for a hungry, detail-oriented AI Content Creator and Community Manager who lives and breathes US basketball culture and can execute a strict, high-volume content formula.



To succeed in this role, you cannot just be a casual fan. You need a deep, almost encyclopedic knowledge of the NBA, historical matchups, player stats, and the current debate culture to create content that genuinely hooks a hardcore basketball audience and drives massive comment velocity.





The Software You Will Use:



Nano Banana Pro: You will be provided access to generate images via our centralized Higgsfield Team Account so there is no cost to you. All text generation happens natively inside the prompt—no Photoshop or Canva required.



Seedance 2.0 & Topaz: You will generate high-fidelity video motion using Seedance 2.0, and then use Topaz to upscale all final video assets to crisp 4K at 60fps. (Note: Access to these external tools will be provided. Once Seedance 2.0 is available on Higgsfield, we will transition that step into our Team plan).



Google Drive & 
: 
 is our HQ for all communication, concept pitches, and draft reviews (using a simple emoji approval system). Final high-resolution assets are strictly uploaded to our shared Google Drive.





Your Daily Responsibilities:



Content Generation: Generate 5 AI images (Nano Banana Pro) and 6 short-form videos (Seedance 2.0 + Topaz upscaling) daily, strictly following our established text/image debate formulas and visual hooks.



Copywriting: Write highly engaging captions, relevant hashtags, and debate-sparking questions for each post to drive community interaction.



Asset Management: Upload all drafts to designated 
 channels for quick review, then push final approved assets to Google Drive.



Community Management: Act as a moderator for our page via Meta Business Suite. Reply to comments to boost algorithmic engagement, manage our official
 Group, and ensure our lead magnet links (wallpaper packs) are pinned in the comments as soon as posts go live.





What We Are Looking For:



Deep, obsessive knowledge of the NBA, basketball history, and debate topics (e.g., MJ vs. LeBron, peak performances, rings vs. stats). You should be able to spot a flawed basketball argument from a mile away.



Experience with AI image generation, video creation tools, and video upscaling software.



Reliability to hit the 11-post daily quota consistently.



Excellent written English for copywriting and community replies.





Compensation & Perks:



Base Pay: $400 - $500 USD per month ($100 - $125/week), paid weekly via Wise.



Performance Bonus: An end-of-month cash bonus if the page's overall Average View Duration hits our target metrics.



Buffer Time: This is a full-time, 40-hour/week role. The content generation will leave you with healthy buffer time each day to handle moderation, research, and ideation without burning out.





How to Apply:

Please reply with the phrase "Nothing but net" at the top of your application so we know you read the entire post. Include a brief summary of why your favorite NBA team will (or won't) win the championship this year, and link to any previous AI, video editing, or community management work you have done.

title: Marketing Analyst (SQL/AWS)
description:
PLEASE APPLY THROUGH THIS LINK: 
/applyjob-noncaller-1



About Us:

With over 100 years of combined industry experience, the Community Minerals team specializes in the purchase of mineral or royalty rights all over the US. We have earned a stellar reputation with hundreds of satisfied customers and an “A” Rating with the Better Business Bureau. With our proven track record, we continue to serve mineral owners in several states with transparency, accountability, and a personalized experience to meet individual needs.



Job Summary:

The Marketing Performance Analyst’s core objective is to empower the Marketing team with actionable insights to drive data-driven marketing strategies and optimize campaign performance. This role requires advanced skills in querying databases (MySQL/AWS) and generating detailed analytics reports that align marketing efforts with strategic objectives, ultimately enhancing marketing performance and ROI.



Job Description:



• Develop comprehensive reports from multiple data sources (MySQL, AWS, CRM systems), providing actionable insights to track and optimize marketing campaign performance.

• Generate, update, and maintain daily, weekly, and monthly KPI reports for the marketing team, assessing performance across channels, identifying trends, and making data-driven recommendations to enhance marketing strategies.

• Create and manage reports for 3 teams within the marketing department, tailoring insights and metrics to support their specific goals and objectives.

• Coordinate with Lead Management Specialists to ensure raw data sources are maintained and up-to-date, ensuring data accuracy and consistency across all marketing datasets.

• Work closely with leadership to provide strategic data insights, helping to align marketing campaigns with overall business goals and objectives.

• Implement, maintain, and refine data processes for collection, cleansing, maintenance, analysis, and validation across marketing datasets.

• Use MySQL and AWS to create, execute, and optimize queries for efficient data retrieval, supporting rapid decision-making and automated reporting where possible.

• Collaborate with marketing and leadership teams to understand key metrics, providing data analysis that drives strategic adjustments, campaign refinements, and business insights.

• Develop and implement forecasting models to predict marketing responses and conversion metrics, supporting marketing budget and resource allocation.

• Develop and maintain process documentation for all reporting and analysis tasks, ensuring consistency, accuracy, and alignment across teams.

• Provide ongoing recommendations based on data analysis to continuously optimize campaign performance, customer segmentation, and conversion strategies.



Qualifications:

• Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Statistics, Data Science, Marketing Analytics, Computer Science, or a related field.

• Experience: 3-5 years of performance analysis, specifically in a marketing team setting. Experience with MySQL and/or AWS data environments is required.



Technical Skills:

• Advanced proficiency in SQL for data manipulation and querying, with a strong preference for experience in MySQL or AWS.

• Intermediate to advanced skills in Excel and/or Google Sheets for data visualization and modeling.

• Strong familiarity with CRM platforms; knowledge of marketing automation tools is a plus.

• Analytical Skills: High-level analytical skills to identify trends, understand root causes, and make data-backed recommendations.



Additional Skills:

• Strong quantitative skills with the ability to apply statistical methods to marketing performance data.

• Ability to work independently and cross-functionally, handling multiple projects in a dynamic, deadline-driven environment.

• Excellent communication skills to present data insights effectively across various organizational levels.

• Must be willing to work during US business hours



What's in it for You:

- Competitive Compensation: Earn $4.19-$5.25 per hour, commensurate with your skills and experience.

- Work your way: Remote Work Set-Up enabling you to operate from the comfort and convenience of your own chosen workspace

- Flexible Healthcare Bonus (Philippines): A healthcare bonus you control. Use it for HMO coverage, life insurance, or set it aside as an emergency fund—whatever best supports your well-being. It’s entirely up to you.

- Success Incentives: Enjoy company bonuses and performance-driven rewards.

- Soar with Us: Opportunities for career growth and promotions await you.

- Positive Vibes Only: Experience a supportive and uplifting work culture.

- Annual Bonus: We value your dedication throughout the year, rewarding you with an annual performance bonus shared at the end of the year.

- Performance Raise: Your hard work doesn't go unnoticed. Be ready to seize opportunities for a salary increase based on your outstanding performance.

- Performance Incentives: We believe exceptional work deserves recognition. Performance incentives are awarded to individuals who demonstrate outstanding contributions, initiative, and results. It’s our way of celebrating excellence and motivating continued success.

- Discretionary Bonus: At Community Minerals, exceptional work doesn’t go unnoticed. Contractors who consistently go above and beyond may be rewarded with discretionary bonuses, a token of appreciation for outstanding contributions, impactful results, and dedication to excellence. Let your work speak, and the rewards will follow!



Other Requirements:

- Willing to work in US Business Hours (CST)

- Must have stable Internet and Power Connection

- Must have a Computer with at least 2 monitors set up, a stable Internet Connection



System Requirements:

To ensure optimal performance and functionality while using different web and application tools, please make sure that your syste
ets the following requirements:



Operating System:

title: Short-Form Video Editor
description:
We’re Hiring: Remote Contractual Short-Form Video Editor

(Include the word “Compass” in your application title so we know you read this.)



Are you passionate about creating content that grabs attention, stops the scroll, and has real viral potential?



We’re looking for a creative, detail-driven Short-Form Video Editor to join our team in a contractual role, with strong room to grow. This is a great opportunity for someone who understands how to make engaging content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts, while also wanting to grow with a team that values structure, quality, and long-term success.



We are not simply looking to hire an editor. We are looking for someone who wants to be part of a creative system built for growth, consistency, and excellence.



You should live and breathe short-form content. If you understand pacing, hooks, storytelling, and current trends, you’ll fit right in.



What You’ll Be Doing

Editing scroll-stopping videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

Using Adobe Premiere Pro and CapCut to produce clean, engaging, high-retention edits

Adding custom animated captions, sound effects, transitions, and music

Using Matt Hannan’s content style and overall brand direction as a creative reference point, while still bringing your own editing instinct and ideas 

Communicating with the team and meeting deadlines consistently

Revising edits when needed to help us achieve the strongest possible final output



What We’re Looking For

A solid portfolio of short-form videos, ideally with viral performance or strong engagement

Expert skills in Adobe Premiere Pro and CapCut

Strong editing fundamentals, including:

• custom animated captions

• clean sound design and SFX

• tight pacing, with no long dead air or slow cuts

• thoughtful music choices that support the content

A creative eye that can follow brand direction without relying on copy-paste editing

Excellent communication in English

Responsive during JST business hours, which is 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM Manila Time, on WhatsApp or Slack

Detail-oriented, organized, and open to feedback

Must include “Compass” in your application title



Compensation

Starting rate: $30 per completed reel

Editors will begin in a contractual editor role

For every THREE successful and outstanding completed reels, we will revisit the current rate and consider an increase based on quality, consistency, and overall performance

Additional opportunities are available for editors who consistently deliver exceptional work



Why You’ll Enjoy Working With Us

Fully remote and flexible workflow

Supportive, fast-moving creative team

Clear systems, direction, and room to grow

Opportunity to develop into a bigger role over time

Your work could reach thousands, or even millions, of viewers



How to Apply



Please send us:



Your portfolio of your best short-form edits

Links or performance stats, if available

An application title containing the word “Compass”



We’re excited to see your creativity and how you think. If you’re looking for a role where your editing skills can grow within an organized and ambitious team, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Full-Time B2B Content Writer & Content Manager (LinkedIn, Email, Instagram)
description:
We are looking for a talented, driven writer to join Agency Growth Partner (AGP) as our full-time Content Manager.



AGP helps marketing agencies grow through client acquisition systems. We are scaling the personal brand of our founder, Ethan Welby, across multiple platforms — and we need a dedicated writer to own that content engine.



This is a long-term, full-time remote role with a clear growth path. If you are a strong writer who wants to grow with a fast-moving business, this is for you.



ABOUT THE ROLE



You will be responsible for all written content at AGP. Your mission is to grow Ethan's personal brand and generate inbound leads from marketing agency owners. You will work closely with Ethan to understand his ideas and turn them into daily content for LinkedIn and Instagram, weekly
s, and syndicated posts for
,
/X, and our Skool community.



Compensation: $1,000/month to start. Performance-based increase to $1,500/month within the first 90 days for hitting agreed outcomes.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES



- Write 7 LinkedIn posts per week (daily) in Ethan's voice and style.

- Create 7 Instagram content pieces per week (daily).

- Write 2
 newsletters per week.

- 
 and syndicate content to
,
/X, and the Skool community.

- Track content performance and adjust strategy based on results.

- Suggest new content ideas and angles proactively.



WHAT WE EXPECT IN YOUR FIRST 90 DAYS



- You are publishing daily without being reminded.

- Content is being seamlessly repurposed across all required platforms.

- LinkedIn engagement has grown by 20% compared to when you started.

- Your content is generating at least 10 qualified inbound leads per month.

- Ethan can post your content without needing to rewrite it.



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



You are a strong writer with experience in B2B content. You understand how to write for a personal brand and how to manage a multi-platform content calendar. You are organised, reliable, and you take full ownership of your work. You communicate clearly and do not need to be chased.



Experience writing for marketing agencies, consultants, or service businesses is a strong advantage.



TO APPLY



At the top of your application, please include the following:



Please submit your full portfolio of copywriting work (links, Google Drive, Notion, or any other format you have). In your application, highlight 1-2 pieces that best demonstrate your ability to generate engagement or results, and briefly explain why they were successful.



Applications that do not include this will not be considered.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Website Design and Development Coordinator
description:
Job Description:



We are seeking a full-time Web Development and Design Coordinator. If you feel called to use your skills to support life-affirming organizations, enjoy building and maintaining websites, and thrive in a fast-paced, purpose-driven environment, this is the position for you.



The Web Development and Design Coordinator works under the direction of the Web Development and Graphic Design Manager and supports both administrative coordination and basic technical execution across web projects. This role is responsible for helping review, manage, and keep 
ntum across the many Website Design and Development projects our team handles daily.



This position blends project coordination, light development support, and quality assurance. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, responsive, technically capable at a foundational level, and thrives in a fast-paced, team-driven environment while staying connected to the greater mission behind the work.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Project Coordination & Workflow Management 

* Assist with scheduling for design and development teams across website and design projects 

* Monitor timelines, task progress, and workflows for all active projects (template websites, custom builds, revisions, and design work) 

* Stay actively engaged throughout the workday to review incoming tasks, triage priorities, and route work to the appropriate tea
mbers 

* Help remove bottlenecks by following up on tasks and ensuring projects continue moving forward 

* Serve as a communication bridge between Client Services and the Design/Development team



2. Technical Support & Website Maintenance

* Perform basic website edits using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript when needed 

* Execute WordPress content updates (text, images, links) without impacting layout or functionality 

* Assist with plugin updates and perform basic QA checks (forms, responsiveness, broken links)

* Support routine website maintenance tasks such as cache clearing and IP allowlisting (e.g., /?calevir access) 

* Help manage SSL renewals and ensure website security best practices are followed



3. Quality Assurance 

* Conduct QA and bug testing across websites prior to launch or after updates 

* Verify functionality across devices and browsers

* Identify and escalate technical issues to developers when needed



4. Administrative & Operational Support 

* Work with Client Services to obtain credentials and access (DNS, domains,
) 

* Maintain and update Design/Dev Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) 

* Support documentation, organization, and process improvements across the team 

* Assist in creating efficiencies that reduce processing time and improve project delivery





Qualifications & Skills:



- Technical Skills:

* Basic proficiency in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

* Experience with WordPress, including content updates and familiarity with plugins

* Understanding of website QA processes (testing forms, links, responsiveness) 

* General knowledge of SSLs, DNS, and domains



- Professional Skills:

* 3+ years of digital marketing, web coordination, or related experience

* Strong organizational and project coordination skills

* Ability to stay responsive and manage tasks in real time in a fast-paced environment ·

* Excellent attention to detail and ability to follow processes

* Strong time management and prioritization skills

* Ability to multitask and meet deadlines

* Strong communication skills, both written and verbal

* Self-starter with the ability to learn quickly and work independently

* Ability to take feedback and adapt quickly

* Positive attitude and team-oriented mindset



- Tools and Systems:

* Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint, Outlook)

* Experience with project management tools (preferred but not required)





To fast track your application, please submit the following information:

Resume: A link to your Google Drive. Please ensure the sharing setting is set to "Anyone with the link."

title: Rust Developer
description:
Our client is building the next generation of edge IT infrastructure — a purpose-built platform that lets enterprises manage hundreds or thousands of distributed locations from a single pane of glass. Their stack powers clustering, distributed filesystems, mesh networking, container orchestration, and VM workloads at the edge.



They are looking for an experienced Rust Engineer to join the core engineering team. You will design and implement performance-critical systems software — from daemons and distributed protocols to networking layers and storage subsystems — and help shape the architecture of a product used by real companies managing real infrastructure at scale.



Responsibilities:

- Design and develop core platform services in Rust, including clustering daemons, monitoring agents, and resiliency subsystems

- Build and maintain distributed networking components such as proxy layers and mesh routing

- Contribute to a high-resilience clustered filesystem and storage layer

Integrate with Linux-native hypervisors (KVM) and container runtimes to manage VM and container workloads

- Collaborate on the API and control-plane services that power our central management portal

- Participate in architecture decisions, code reviews, and improving engineering practices across the team



Requirements:

- 3+ years of professional experience using Rust

- Deep understanding of Rust's ownership model, async runtimes (Tokio preferred), and safe concurrency patterns

- Experience building systems-level software: daemons, IPC, networking stacks, or storage engines

- Upper-intermediate level of English (B2) 

- Availability to work up until 1 am Philippines time 

- Familiarity with Linux internals — process management, namespaces, cgroups, filesystems, or kernel interfaces

- Solid grounding in distributed systems concepts: consensus, replication, failure modes, and consistency trade-offs

- Ability to write clean, testable code and participate meaningfully in technical design discussions



Nice to Have:

- Experience with container runtimes (containerd, runc) or hypervisors (KVM, QEMU, libvirt)

- Familiarity with distributed filesystem design (Ceph, GlusterFS, or similar)

- Prior work on networking proxies, service meshes, or SDN components

- Contributions to open-source Rust projects or systems software

- Experience in edge computing, IoT infrastructure, or multi-site IT management



Stack & Environment:



Language: Rust (primary), with some Go and shell scripting

Platforms: Linux (Ubuntu), x86/x86_64

Infra: Containerized workloads, KVM VMs, clustered storage, distributed mesh networking

Tooling: Git, CI/CD pipelines, standard Linux development toolchain

title: Accounting VA with Accrual-Basis Accounting Experience: Weekly Pay & Growth Opportunities
description:
Hi there!



We're searching for a highly motivated and detail-oriented Accounting VA with Accrual-Basis Accounting experience to join our remote team. 



This remote position offers an exciting opportunity for you to contribute to our client's success while enjoying the freedom and flexibility of a work-from-home lifestyle.



If you're passionate about helping others succeed and want to grow your career in a dynamic and supportive environment, then read on…





== WHY WORK WITH US ==



Make a Difference at Pro Sulum: An Award-Winning Company Where You Matter.



We're not just about accolades (like being on the Inc. 5000 list) - we're about empowering our team to create real impact. At Pro Sulum, your contributions matter, and your unique talents are valued. Join a company that fosters personal growth, celebrates individuality, and champions success for all.





-> Benefits:

 * Competitive salary (Php 30,000 to Php 40,000) depending on experience

 * Pay Increase Opportunity Every 6 Months

 * Weekly Pay

 * Paid Service Incentive Leaves

 * Monthly Incentives

 * Referral Incentives

 * Virtual Company Events

 * Dynamic, fun, and supportive team

 * Full-time role as an independent contractor (not BPO)

 * Long-term opportunity with career growth and advancement





== THE POSITION ==



As the Accounting VA for a fast-growing accounting firm, you’ll play a key role in supporting the company’s financial operations and ensuring accuracy across all accounting processes.



Your primary focus will include managing accounts payable and receivable, categorizing transactions in QuickBooks, performing bank and credit card reconciliations, and supporting month-end close activities. You’ll also assist with journal entries, account reconciliations, and maintaining clean, accurate financial records.



You’ll work closely with leadership and cross-functional teams to ensure timely reporting and smooth day-to-day operations. If you’re detail-oriented, reliable, and experienced in accrual-basis accounting with strong QuickBooks proficiency, this is your opportunity to grow within a dynamic and fast-paced organization.





-> Requirements:

• Solid accounting experience is a must, with a strong emphasis on accrual-basis accounting.

• Proficiency with QuickBooks or any similar accounting platform is required.

• Must have a high level of accuracy and attention to detail, and the ability to analyze data and exercise sound judgment.

• Available to work full-time (40 hrs/wk).

• Can work during standard US business hours.

• Fast, stable internet connection (Minimum download speed 10 Mbps)

• Working computer/laptop (Minimum Requirement: Processor - Intel i5 or equivalent, RAM - 8GB).

• Backup power source or work location for power outages.





-> Nice to Have:

• Experience working with the following tools is preferred: Outlook, MS Excel, Slack, ClickUp, Sage, NetSuite, 
, and Ramp.





-> Responsibilities:

Duties and Responsibilities include but are not limited to:

• Review and accurately categorize bank and credit card transactions in QuickBooks

• Manage accounts receivable, including invoice creation, payment application, and customer account reconciliation

• Process accounts payable such as vendor bill entry, purchase order matching, and vendor account maintenance

• Perform monthly bank and credit card reconciliations to ensure all transactions are properly recorded

• Prepare balance sheet and general account reconciliations

• Create and post recurring and adjusting journal entries, including accruals and allocations

• Assist in validating financial data and performing basic variance analysis

• Support month-end close activities, ensuring timely and accurate financial reporting





-> About You:

For this position, the successful candidate will have/be:

* High Attention to Detail: You are accurate, consistent, and thorough in your work. 

* Dependable & Trustworthy: You complete tasks on time and follow through on your commitments.

* Resourceful & Proactive: You tackle challenges head-on and solve problems independently.

* Great Communicator: You excel in both written and verbal English communication.





== HOW TO APPLY ==



Ready to join us? Apply now and unlock your future with Pro Sulum!



If you are interested in this position and believe you have the qualities listed above to be successful, please complete this Google Form and FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTIONS carefully.



APPLY HERE >>>



 - Due to the high volume of applications we receive, only candidates selected for further consideration will be contacted to move forward in the hiring process.

 - If you're a good fit for the role, you'll receive an
 from the Pro Sulum Recruitment Team within 1-2 weeks.



Congratulations on taking the first step towards a rewarding career with Pro Sulum! We're excited to learn more about you and explore the possibility of you joining our team.

title: Netflix Video Editor Instagram Personal Brand
description:
I'm looking for a netflix-grade video editor for short and long-form. The one who gets it.



What this is:



I'm building an esoteric high-agency personal brand around one idea: law of attraction and consciousness expansion. Think James Bond movie style content combined with a spiritual jackie Chan. Missions across countries. Consciousness. High standards. Real depth beneath the lifestyle.



Think cinematic lifestyle, but with a soul. Not travel content. Not motivation content. Something that hasn't really been done before.



The reference aesthetic: Iman Gadzhi early content + film-grade color + retro camera texture cuts + one line of text that stops people scrolling.



What you'll do:

• Edit 10-20 reels per month, quality over quantity, every single one must be extraordinary

- 1 vlog per month for youtube + other long form piece

- 3-4 static IG posts per month

• Color grade to a consistent film aesthetic (warm, cinematic, slightly desaturated — think Kodak film emulation)

• Blend high-quality cinematic footage with retro/film camera cuts for texture

• Source and cut music that feels expansive, cinematic, and slightly spiritual — not generic travel music

• Add precise, minimal text overlays — one line maximum per video, timed perfectly

• Maintain a visual identity so consistent that people recognize the content before they see the name

• Occasional photo editing and feed curation (Lightroom/Photoshop)



! Must be spiritual, slightly esoteric, and be able to create netflix grade content!



MUST BE GOOD AT STORYTELLING AND SCRIPTWRITING!



Must-haves:

• Portfolio that genuinely moves people, not technically impressive reels, emotionally impressive ones

• Mastery of DaVinci Resolve or Premiere Pro, you should be able to color grade in your sleep

• Deep understanding of pacing, music sync, and the feeling a cut creates, not just the look

• Experience with film LUTs, grain overlays, and creating a signature visual aesthetic from scratch

• AI tools for b-roll generation and enhancement (Runway, Pika, or equivalent)

• Photoshop and Lightroom proficiency

• You have watched something and felt it shift something in you, and you know how to create that feeling for others



?????????????????????????



The thing that will get you this role over everyone else:



You have a reference reel or piece of work where someone who watched it messaged you to ask what it meant. Or sent it to someone. Or saved it. Not because it was beautiful. Because it made them feel something they couldn't name.



If you've never made something like that, don't apply. If you have, lead with it.



What you get:

• $500-$3500/month depending on experience and portfolio quality

• Remote, full-time or part-time depending on arrangement

• Direct access to the creative vision, you work directly with me, no middle layer

• You will be the visual architect of a brand that is built to last decades

• Full creative input welcomed, this is a collaboration, not a brief factory



How to apply: 



Don't apply if you don't match the criteria and have high quality personal brand edits.

title: Senior CX/UX Designer
description:
About Us

2DC is an Australian digital agency with offices in Australia, the Philippines and the UK. We deliver large-scale web and mobile platforms for enterprise clients across government, health, membership organisations and the not-for-profit sector. We are looking for an experienced Senior CX/UX Designer to join a specific project engagement starting in April 2025.



About the Role

This is a part-time, work-from-home contract running from 7 April to 6 November 2025, with a total commitment of approximately 250 hours. Hours are spread across the project lifecycle and vary significantly by phase, with the heavier research and design workload front-loaded in the earlier phases.



You will be embedded within our Australian delivery team on a complex, multi-platform project that spans a responsive national website, a branded member mobile app, CRM integrations, and multiple third-party system touchpoints. This is not a purely visual role - we need someone who can drive the full UX process from research through to handoff, with a strong analytical mindset and the ability to translate findings into clear, evidenced recommendations.



What You Will Be Doing

Discovery and User Research

Analysing existing site behaviour using Hotjar - reviewing heatmaps, scroll maps, session recordings and click data, then producing clear visual outputs that communicate how users are currently navigating the site

Facilitating and synthesising insights from workshops with diverse user groups including administrators, members, and other stakeholder types

Distilling workshop outputs into a structured view of user pains, opportunities and roadblocks, prioritised by impact and frequency

Planning and conducting additional user research using qualitative and quantitative methods where gaps exist, then translating findings into actionable recommendations



Strategy and Frameworks

Applying Jobs To Be Done (JTBD) thinking to frame user needs and challenge assumptions about what the product should do

Using Value Proposition Design to map the fit between user needs and the solutions being built

Validating design decisions against user context to ensure the product solves real problems, not assumed ones

Creating user personas, journey maps, information architecture and interaction models that guide product strategy and design direction



User Journey Mapping

Mapping primary and secondary customer journeys end-to-end, covering both web and app touchpoints

Identifying friction points, drop-off risks and 
nts of value across different user types and access tiers

Documenting journeys in a format that is useful to developers, content specialists and stakeholders alike



Design and Delivery

Designing intuitive, accessible interfaces for both web and mobile, with a strong focus on WCAG 2.1 AA+ compliance

Building interactive prototypes and wireframes in Figma to communicate design intent to developers and stakeholders

Producing developer-ready specifications, design systems and component libraries that the build team can work from directly

Supporting accessibility and usability testing throughout the build and QA phases



Collaboration

Working closely with art directors, content specialists, developers and project managers across Australian and international time zones

Mentoring junior designers and contributing to the continuous improvement of UX processes and standards within the team



What We Are Looking For

At least ten years of hands-on experience in UX research and design for digital products, ideally across both web and native mobile

Demonstrated ability to conduct and synthesise behavioural analytics - specifically Hotjar or equivalent tools - and present findings in a clear, visual format

Experience facilitating stakeholder and user workshops, and the analytical skills to translate messy, qualitative outputs into structured insight frameworks

Solid understanding of Jobs To Be Done and Value Proposition Design as applied frameworks, not just theoretical knowledge

Strong working knowledge of WCAG accessibility standards and inclusive design principles

Expert-level proficiency in Figma, including design systems, prototyping, auto-layout and developer handoff workflows

Experience working within complex integration environments where UX decisions need to account for CRM data, tiered access models, SSO or payment flows

Confident communication skills, comfortable presenting findings and recommendations to senior stakeholders

Self-motivated and reliable, able to work independently in a remote environment while staying closely connected to the wider team

A portfolio that demonstrates your end-to-end UX process - research, synthesis, strategy, and design - not just final visual outputs



Nice to Have

Experience with AI-assisted design tools such as Figma AI

Familiarity with GA4 or similar analytics platforms

Experience with content-heavy platforms requiring complex information architecture

Previous work with Australian clients or within Australian digital agencies



What We Offer

AUD $25 per hour for the right applicant

Day shift hours: 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM Philippine time on scheduled working days

Part-time contract, work from home

A genuinely interesting, large-scale project with a senior and collaborative delivery team



How to Apply

Submit your CV, portfolio, and a brief cover note explaining why this role is the right fit for you. Your portfolio should include at least one example that shows your research and synthesis process - not just the end design.



If shortlisted following the initial interview, the next stage will include a practical skills assessment to help us find the best match for the role.

title: Client Success Coordinator
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Client Success Coordinator supports client onboarding and Client engagement within the 10X Business Academy. This role helps ensure clients and their teams stay on track with their learning programs by monitoring participation, coordinating touchpoints, and maintaining accurate client records. The Coordinator works closely with the Client Success Manager to identify engagement risks early, maintain proactive communication, and contribute to strong client satisfaction and retention.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results-oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

• Clients remain actively engaged in programs with strong participation and course completion.

• Client questions and requests are addressed quickly and professionally.

• Engagement data and client records are accurate, organized, and consistently updated.



OBJECTIVES

• Support onboarding of new clients by coordinating kickoff activities and tracking setup completion.

• Monitor Client engagement metrics such as participation, attendance, and course progress.

• Conduct scheduled check-ins and follow-up communication with clients.

• Maintain accurate client records in CRM and learning platforms.

• Identify disengagement risks early and escalate them to the Client Success Manager.

• Prepare engagement summaries and progress reports for leadership review.

• Coordinate scheduling for kickoff calls, accountability sessions, and coaching meetings.

• Assist with renewal preparation by compiling engagement insights and participation data.

• Performs other related duties as assigned.



COMPETENCIES

• Strong written and verbal communication skills in English.

• Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.

• Professional and client-focused approach to communication and service.

• Ability to track engagement data and recognize participation trends.

• Strong time management and follow-through on commitments.

• Comfortable working with CRM systems, learning platforms, and productivity tools.

• Ability to work independently while collaborating with a remote team.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Communications, Education, or a related field preferred.

• 1–3 years of experience in customer service, account coordination, BPO, or client-facing roles.

• Experience working with global clients or remote teams is a plus.

• Familiarity with CRM systems or online learning platforms is preferred.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

title: Business Process Admin (experienced in Sharepoint)
description:

The Business Process Admin or Visual Communication Admin plays a key role in supporting internal operations by managing and updating content in company information hubs, creating visually compelling slide decks, and contributing to content development per Cardone Ventures’ brand guidelines. This role combines administrative coordination with creative execution, ensuring that internal documents, presentations, and shared resources are well-organized, up-to-date, and aligned with brand standards.



The Business Process Admin / Visual Communication Admin position is highly independent but will provide support to all departments within our organization. You will need to deliver results in a fast-paced and ambiguous environment, and be dependable and reliable in meeting deadlines and targets.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results oriented. title: STATIC IMAGE DESIGNER: DTC - Health/Wellness Brand
description:
We Need a Static Designer Who Actually Gives a Damn



Most designers we've talked to are good at making things look pretty.



That's not what we need.



We're a direct-response supplement brand running paid social at scale. Every image we put out has one job - stop the scroll, 



hold the eye, and move product. Not win a design award. Not impress other designers. Move product.

If that distinction means something to you, keep reading.



Here's the reality of this role. You'll be designing static ads for Meta - comparison creatives, listicles, native-style images, product shots, social proof visuals. Some weeks we're testing 10 new concepts. You'll be inside the data with us figuring out why something worked, stripping it down, rebuilding it sharper.



You'll know the difference between an image that performs and an image that looks like it should perform. And you'll care about that difference enough to lose sleep over it.



What we're NOT looking for:



Someone who needs 3 rounds of revisions to get to good. Someone who's never looked at a ROAS in their life. Someone who thinks "creative" means complicated.



What we ARE looking for:



You've got a sharp eye for what's ugly-but-effective versus pretty-but-dead. You can look at a winning ad and reverse-engineer exactly why it stopped the scroll. You move fast without getting sloppy. You take feedback like a pro and come back better, not bruised.



Bonus if you've worked in supplements, health, or direct-response before. Serious bonus if you've designed thumb-stopping statics that you can point to and say "that's mine, here's what it did."



This is freelance to start. Real volume, real feedback loop, real opportunity to grow with a brand that's moving.

If this is you, send your portfolio and a single sentence telling us which ad in your book performed best and why.



Don't send a cover letter. Don't tell us you're a "passionate creative." Just show us the work.

Track and report content performance and analytics weekly

Go High Level proficiency is required you must be able to hit the ground running

mbers 4x their pay in 6 months by showing us their work ethic, performance, conversions.

description:
WHO WE ARE:

KB Creative Web & Marketing is a digital marketing agency that specializes in helping small business scale their eCommerce efforts and become more profitable. We provide everything a client needs under one roof including web design & development, SEO, PPC, content creation,
 marketing, and overall strategy. Over the last eight years, we have helped businesses of all sizes and across a range of markets to grow their online sales and achieve their dreams.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

We are looking for an experienced Video Editor who has experience creating videos for social media,
 and Instagram ads, and YouTube.



This is a remote work from home role and would be perfect for someone who is self motivated, organized, detail oriented, and a great communicator.



You will have an opportunity to help dozens of small businesses grow their online sales and also help our small team grow to serve even more clients. This is a part time position that could lead to full time once you've proven a good fit within the team.



You'll report directly to the Project Success Manager and work closely with other tea
mbers on various client accounts.

 Ads creatives

- Experience and passion with the game of golf

- Strong written and verbal communication skills

- Must be detail oriented

- Attention to detail is essential



You should be comfortable using project management software, Google Drive, Zoom, Slack, and other cloud based communication tools.



You should also be confident enough to push back on the leadership team and express your opinion if you have suggestions or improvements based on your experience. We encourage that.



HOW WE WILL HELP YOU SUCCEED:

We want you to succeed in this role. We will provide any additional training you may need to get on board and hit the ground running. We're not going to teach you how to do your job, because your past experience will serve you well.



However, we will train you regarding our systems, our products and our customers so you can apply your skills to help us achieve our mission.



We will also listen to you, see you for who you are and encourage you to bring your entire self to work. We are humans first, work colleagues second.





EMPLOYMENT TYPE:

This is a part-time role with the potential to grow into full time. Salary is dependent upon your experience and quality of work. We will likely do a paid test to make sure we're a good fit to work together. I'm looking for someone to join us long term as we have a large need for video editing in the agency.



GOLF EXPERIENCE AND PASSION IS REQUIRED

Salary is negotiable with the right experience

title: WordPress Designer / Visual Creative
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We're a growing web and digital marketing agency looking for a talented WordPress Designer to join our small, remote team. You'll be the go-to creative on the team — designing website layouts, creating visual assets for ad campaigns and
 campaigns, and collaborating with developers and strategists to bring client brands to life online.



This is not a pure "make it pixel-perfect in Figma and hand it off" role. You'll work with a team, use tools like Canva and Photoshop, and increasingly leverage AI-powered design tools to move fast and produce great work. We're looking for someone with a strong eye for design who is also resourceful, adaptable, and excited to learn new tools as they emerge.



This is a part-time role with the opportunity to grow into full-time for the right person. We're looking for a dedicated tea
mber who enjoys collaborating, loves to learn, thrives on problem solving, and wants a long-term role with real opportunity for growth.



AVAILABILITY REQUIREMENT

You must have some overlap with US business hours (Eastern Time Zone) for collaboration, task handoffs, and time-sensitive updates. We're flexible on the exact window — what matters is that you're reachable and responsive during a consistent block of time that works for both sides.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Website Design & Layout

- Design and build visually polished pages in WordPress using Kadence Blocks, with strong attention to balance, spacing, typography, and color

- Create homepage layouts, landing pages, service pages, and other key pages that look professional and convert

- Translate client branding (logos, colors, fonts) into cohesive website designs

- Deliver clean, on-brief results with minimal revisions





Visual Asset Creation

- Design graphics, banners, social media images, and other visual assets using Canva, Photoshop, or similar tools

- Create and update website imagery — hero images, icons, section graphics, before/after visuals, etc.

- Maintain brand consistency across all visual touchpoints for each client



AI-Assisted Design & Rapid Prototyping

- Use AI design tools like 
v, Nano Banana, and others to accelerate the design process

- Stay current on emerging AI tools and proactively bring new ideas to the team

- Know when to use AI tools vs. traditional design methods to get the best result





Collaboration with Deer Designer & Tea
mbers

- Write clear, detailed creative briefs for our Deer Designer design service

- Review deliverables from external designers and provide constructive feedback

- Collaborate with developers to ensure designs are implemented accurately

- Work closely with project managers and strategists to understand client goals and turn them into visual solutions



Client-Facing Design Work

- Handle design-related client requests — website refreshes, new page designs, visual updates

- Present design options and explain your thinking when needed

- Represent the agency professionally in every interaction



Content & Marketing Design Support

- Design
 templates, ad graphics, and social media visuals as needed

- Support the team with design assets for campaigns, launches, and promotions



MUST-HAVE SKILLS

? 2+ years of hands-on design experience (web design, graphic design, or both)

? Strong portfolio showing clean, modern web design work

? Proficiency with Canva, Photoshop, or similar design tools

? Strong eye for layout, typography, color, and spacing

? Experience with or eagerness to use AI design tools (
v, Nano Banana, etc.)

? Strong written and verbal communication skills (English) — this is critical

? Problem solving and critical thinking

? Passion for learning new tools and techniques

? Detail oriented

? Reliable, meets deadlines, communicates proactively



NICE TO HAVE

WordPress/WooCommerce experience

Figma experience

Basic HTML/CSS knowledge (enough to make minor tweaks)

Experience creating design briefs for external design services

Familiarity with brand style guide creation or management

Motion graphics or video editing skills



HOW WE WORK

Small team, async-first, with flexible overlap during US business hours. We use SOPs and checklists — we'll train you on our systems. We expect you to be resourceful: if you don't know something, you figure it out and ask smart questions. We're big on collaboration and communication — you won't be working in a silo.

We're also an agency that's leaning into AI tools to work smarter and faster. If you're the kind of person who gets excited about testing a new tool and figuring out how it can improve your workflow, you'll fit right in.



TO APPLY

Include PURPLE PALETTE in the first line of your application. Send a short summary of your design experience and a resume. Also send a Loom video introducing yourself (3–5 minutes) where you walk us through 2–3 design projects you're proud of — these can be websites, graphics, or both. Tell us: what the project was, what design decisions you made, and one challenge you ran into and how you solved it.



If you don't follow all of the instructions, you will not be considered for the job.

title: Looking for a Personal Injury Legal Filer for a US-based Law Firm
description:
Are you a detail-oriented legal professional with a passion for personal injury law? Do you have strong writing skills and experience handling legal filings, case management, and e-filing systems? If so, we want YOU to be part of our growing Personal Injury Litigation Team at Ethen Ostroff Law!



About the Company:



Ethen Ostroff Law (EOL) is a passionate law firm led by Ethen Ostroff, a licensed attorney in Pennsylvania. Our firm is dedicated to advocating for the injured and vulnerable, with a mission to make a meaningful impact by fighting for justice and ensuring that our clients’ rights are protected.



About the Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Personal Injury Administrative Filer to support our Personal Injury Litigation Team. If you have strong writing skills, familiarity with legal filings and case management, and thrive in a fast-paced, remote environment, we’d love to hear from you.

Core Responsibilities

Manage personal injury litigation case files and monitor case progress.

Accurately enter and update case details, deadlines, and filings in Litify (our case management system).

Ensure all legal filings are completed accurately and submitted on time.

File legal documents with courts and insurance providers via e-filing systems.

Draft and send Letters of Representation (LOR), demand letters, tort notices, and PIP application benefits.

Prepare legal pleadings, discovery responses, and settlement documentation.

Proofread all documents to ensure accuracy and compliance with legal standards.

Collaborate with attorneys and paralegals to meet filing deadlines.

Maintain accuracy of PI litigation components in the Litify system.

Communicate and coordinate with insurance adjusters, medical providers, and opposing counsel.





Core Qualifications

Minimum 6 months of law firm experience (Required).

Experience handling personal injury or workers' compensation cases (Preferred).

Familiarity with case management software (Litify preferred) and e-filing systems.

Understanding of PI case stages including demand letters, complaints, discovery, and settlements (Preferred).

E-filing proficiency with courts and insurance companies.

Skilled in legal document handling, scanning, uploading, and categorization.

Proficient in Microsoft Word, Excel, Adobe Acrobat, and legal formatting.

Ability to manage high volumes of case files and meet strict deadlines.

Strong proofreading skills to ensure professional and error-free filings.

Excellent written communication skills for drafting legal correspondence.

Comfortable working under pressure with urgent filings and updates.

Collaborative mindset to work effectively with legal and administrative teams.





Nice to Have:

At least 6 months of hands-on experience as a Virtual Assistant, with a deep understanding of remote work dynamics and the ability to seamlessly integrate into digital workflows, effectively functioning in a plug-and-play manner.

How to Apply: Please send your application ONLY to 
 your subject line begins with "Your Next PI Admin Legal Filer  is Here!" to help us correctly identify your application for this position. This also confirms that you've thoroughly read and understood the job description before applying.

title: Professional Voiceover Recorder - English
description:
Hello,



I’m looking for someone who is experienced with recording english voiceovers.



Experience is needed, please provide previous files / audio recordings.



I will provide the script and, in some cases, a reference for tone and delivery. I need you to produce a polished, edited voiceover that sounds professional, engaging, and enthusiastic.



We are looking for someone with a clear and masculine voice and speak fluent, natural-sounding English suitable for an American audience. Strong articulation and prior voiceover experience are required.



Please include samples of previous voiceover work with your response. Applicants using chatgpt will not be accepted

title: Remote Dental Phone Support Specialist
description:
U.S. Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery Practice

Schedule

Monday–Thursday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time

Remote

About the Role

We are a U.S.-based oral and maxillofacial surgery practice seeking an experienced Dental Phone

Support Specialist to handle inbound calls, scheduling, and call routing. Many of our patients are older

or anxious, so clear English, calm tone, and excellent phone etiquette are essential. This is a

non-sales, inbound-only role.

IMPORTANT APPLICATION REQUIREMENT

Applications without a voice recording will not be reviewed. Applicants must submit a short Loom (or

similar) video to assess clarity, pacing, and accent.

Key Responsibilities

• Answer inbound calls promptly and professionally

• Assist new patients, existing patients, and referring dental offices

• Schedule appointments accurately and route calls appropriately

• Escalate urgent or complex calls per protocol

• Document calls clearly and flag high-priority inquiries

Role Exclusions

• No medical advice or diagnosis

• No treatment explanations beyond scripts

• No financial counseling or case closing

• No improvisation outside workflows

Required Qualifications

• Dental office experience REQUIRED

• Inbound phone experience in dental or medical setting

• Excellent spoken English with neutral or mild accent

• Comfortable working U.S. Eastern Time hours

• Detail-oriented and process-driven

Preferred Qualifications

• Oral surgery or dental implant experience

• Experience speaking with older patients

• Familiarity with dental scheduling systems or EHRs

Voice Sample Instructions (Required)

Submit a 30–90 second Loom video including:

1) 30-second introduction (name and dental experience)

2) Reading the following script verbatim:

“Thank you for calling our office, this is [your name]. How may I help you today?

I’d be happy to help you with scheduling. Let me confirm a few details, and if needed, I’ll connect you

with our clinical team.”

Performance Expectations

• High call answer rate during assigned hours

• Reduced hangups and missed calls

• Accurate scheduling and documentation

• Professional, patient-centered phone presence

Compensation

Competitive hourly rate based on experience. Long-term opportunity for the right candidate. No nights

or weekends.

Reminder: Applications without a voice recording will not be reviewed.

title: Social Media Manager (Graveyard Shift)
description:
Job Title: Social Media Manager

Overview: We are seeking a highly creative and results-driven Social Media Manager to join our team. The ideal candidate will have a passion for social media, a strong understanding of the latest trends, and the ability to engage our audience with compelling content.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Content Creation:

- Develop, create, and manage content (text, images, video) tailored to each social media platform.

- Design and execute a content calendar to ensure a consistent posting schedule.

- Collaborate with the marketing team to align social media content with broader marketing strategies.

- Social Media Strategy:

- Develop and implement a comprehensive social media strategy to increase brand awareness, engagement, and follower growth.

- Analyze and report on social media performance metrics, making data-driven decisions to optimize strategies.

- Stay up-to-date with the latest social media trends, tools, and best practices.

3. Community Engagement:

- Engage with followers, respond to comments and messages in a timely manner, and manage online communities.

- Monitor and participate in relevant social media discussions about our brand and industry.

4. Campaign Management:

- Plan and execute social media advertising campaigns to support marketing objectives.

- Collaborate with influencers and brand ambassadors to amplify reach and engagement.

- Manage social media budget and optimize ad spend for maximum ROI.

5. Brand Management:

- Ensure brand consistency across all social media channels.

- Develop and enforce social media guidelines and best practices.

- Monitor and protect the brand’s online reputation.

6. Analytics and Reporting:

- Track, analyze, and report on social media metrics and campaign performance.

- Use analytics tools to measure the effectiveness of social media strategies and provide insights.

- Prepare regular reports for management to showcase progress and areas for improvement.

Qualifications:

• Proficiency in Social Media Platforms: In-depth knowledge and experience with
, Instagram, Google Business, TikTok, and
.

• Advertising Expertise: Skilled in setting up and managing
 and Google Ads campaigns, including the creation, optimization, and analysis of ad performance.

• Reporting and Analytics: Capable of generating comprehensive reports on ad performance and providing actionable insights to clients for continuous improvement.

• Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field.

• Proven work experience as a Social Media Manager or similar role.

• In-depth knowledge of social media platforms, trends, and analytics tools.

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

• Creative thinking and the ability to develop engaging content.

• Experience with social media advertising and paid campaigns.

• Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

• Familiarity with graphic design and video editing software is a plus.

Key Competencies:

• Strategic thinking

• Creativity and innovation

• Analytical skills

• Communication and interpersonal skills

• Project management

• Adaptability and flexibility

• Problem-solving skills

title: Legal Intake Specialist – Day Shift (US After-Hours) – $4-$6/hr
description:
We are a US-based Personal Injury law firm seeking two (2) high-energy, empathetic Intake Specialists to manage our potential client inquiries during US after-hours. 



Note to Applicants: While this covers the US night shift, this is a Day Shift/Early Morning shift in Philippine Time (PHT). We are looking for sharp, morning-person professionals who can provide a "speed-to-lead" response for our firm. 



Shift Times (PHT): 



Shift A: 5:30 AM – 1:30 PM PHT 

Shift B: 12:30 PM – 8:30 PM PHT 

(Combined, these cover 5:30 PM – 8:30 AM EST) 



Key Responsibilities: 



- Omnichannel Response: Monitor and respond immediately to incoming calls, Webform submissions, and
s. 

- Speed-to-Lead: You are expected to call back web leads within 5 minutes of submission. 

- Qualify Leads: Interview potential clients using our 6-step checklist (Fault, Role, Statute of Limitations, Injury, Treatment, and Current Representation). 

- Lead Docket Management: Enter all contact info and case details directly into Lead Docket. 

- Coordination: Use WebEx for phone communications and internal tea
ssaging. 

- Appointment Setting: Schedule qualified leads for a formal follow-up with our daytime intake team. 



Requirements: 



- Experience: Previous experience in US Legal Intake or high-level Customer Service. 

- Tech: Experience with Lead Docket and WebEx is a massive plus. 

- Communication: Exceptional English with a clear, professional phone presence. 

- Bilingual: Spanish fluency is a plus (Higher pay scale applied). 

- Reliability: Since you are working our "after-hours," you are the only line of defense. You must have a stable internet connection and a power backup (UPS). 



Compensation: 



- English Only: $4.00 – $6.00/hour 



- Bilingual (English/Spanish): $6.00 – $8.00/hour 



HOW TO APPLY: 



- Send a message with the subject line: "Intake Rockstar for [Your Firm Name]" 

- Include a link to a 60-second voice recording (audio or video) introducing yourself and your experience. 

- List your preferred shift (Shift A or Shift B).

title: Operations Lead - Marketing & Conversion Strategy
description:
Application Link: 
/EmFAppF



OVERVIEW

We're looking for an Operations Lead to own and scale the revenue engine across our creator portfolio.



This is not a VA role. This is for a Growth Marketer who understands funnels, conversion, and customer psychology — and knows how to turn that into measurable revenue.



You won't be doing manual execution. You'll be designing the systems and strategies that drive performance, working through a team of VAs.



Your success is measured by one thing: revenue growth.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN

> Funnel Architecture - Design and optimize the full subscriber journey — from acquisition through retention.

> Messaging & Monetization - Own the structure, cadence, and performance of messaging across all creators.

> Lifecycle Marketing - Build and refine welcome flows, re-engagement, re-subscription, and win-back campaigns.

> Performance Optimization - Track conversion metrics, identify gaps, and continuously improve pricing, offers, and messaging.

> Team Leadership - Lead a team of VAs to execute your strategy with speed and consistency.





WHO YOU ARE

> Growth-Focused Marketer - You understand funnels, conversion triggers, and how to move people from interest to action.

> Systems Thinker - You think in angles and structure — not just individual messages. You build, not just write.

> Data-Driven Operator - You use metrics to identify problems and drive decisions. Gut feel is backed by numbers.

> Ownership Mentality - You take responsibility for outcomes, not just execution. Results are your accountability.

> Relevant Experience - Background in high-volume digital sales, e-commerce, or direct response marketing. OF experience is a plus, not required.



THE OFFER

>Base Salary - $1,200 – $1,600 / month (depending on experience)

> Performance Bonus - Directly tied to revenue growth and portfolio performance

> Growth Path - Direct path to senior leadership as the operation scales

> Environment - Fully remote, performance-focused





This is a performance-driven role with real upside. High performers grow their compensation in line with the revenue they generate.

title: Ecommerce Video Editor with AI Experience
description:
Are you someone who THRIVES on CREATIVITY, SPEED, and HIGH PERFORMANCE?



Do you get excited by the idea of creating cutting-edge e-commerce ad creatives and using AI at a high level to produce better work, faster?



Do you love the challenge of turning raw ideas, footage, and concepts into emotionally compelling, sales-driven videos that actually convert?



If your answer is a big “ABSOLUTELY!”, keep reading. This could be the opportunity you’ve been waiting for.



We’re a young and ambitious e-commerce brand on a mission to improve the lives of women over 60 through thoughtful, high-quality products designed specifically for them.



We’re looking for an Experienced Video Editor to join our team.



This is not an entry-level editing role.



We want someone who already has strong experience creating direct-response e-commerce ads, and who knows how to use AI tools at a high level to speed up production, improve creative output, and bring fresh ideas to the table.



You’ll be creating video ads that are designed not just to look good, but to capture attention, hold interest, and drive conversions.



We’re aiming to build an 8-figure brand within the next 12 months, and we want a growth-minded A-player who thrives at the intersection of creative instinct, performance marketing, speed, and AI leverage.



What We’re Looking For



We’re not just hiring for technical skills. We’re building a team around shared values:



Unvarnished Integrity

Truth builds trust.



Urgent Precision

We move fast, but we care about quality.



Challenge Assumptions

We don’t just accept “that’s how it’s done.”



Relentless Improvement

We’re always looking for ways to get better.



Extreme Ownership

We take responsibility for outcomes.



What You’ll Be Doing



Video Editing

Create high-performing
 ads, UGC-style creatives, VSL segments, and other direct-response content designed to grab attention and convert.



AI-Powered Production

Use AI tools at a high level to improve speed, workflow, idea generation, asset creation, captions, scripting support, visual development, and creative testing.



Creative Execution

Work closely with the team to turn marketing ideas, scripts, and concepts into polished, conversion-focused video ads.



Creative Testing Support

Help produce multiple variations of hooks, angles, edits, and concepts so we can test faster and find winners.



Trendspotting

Stay current with the latest e-commerce ad styles, editing trends, platform trends, and AI tools that can improve output.



Workflow Efficiency

Continuously look for ways to edit faster, improve quality, and streamline production without sacrificing performance.



What You’ll Need to Bring



Proven experience editing direct-response video ads for e-commerce brands

Especially
 / Meta ads.



Strong editing skills across both short-form and long-form content

Including UGC-style ads, VSL-style content, and social creatives.



Advanced AI proficiency

You already use AI tools in a serious way as part of your workflow. You understand how to use AI to save time, improve quality, generate iterations, and work at a higher level.



Understanding of direct-response marketing

You know how to edit for hooks, retention, emotional engagement, pacing, and conversions, not just aesthetics.



Ability to work fast without sacrificing quality

You can manage multiple projects and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.



Strong communication and teamwork

You can take feedback well, collaborate smoothly, and contribute ideas when needed.



Bonus Points If You Have



Experience in high-volume e-commerce creative production

Experience editing for older demographics, especially women 60+

Experience using AI to create faster testing cycles and better-performing creative variations

Strong instinct for ad angles, hooks, pacing, and direct-response structure



What’s In It For You



Above-market compensation

With performance-based upside depending on experience and results.



The opportunity to work on meaningful products

Helping improve the lives of women over 60.



A high-growth environment

Where strong performance is valued and rewarded.



The chance to be part of something ambitious

Your work will directly contribute to building a fast-growing brand.



If you’re an experienced video editor who understands direct-response, moves fast, and knows how to use AI to create a real edge, we’d love to hear from you.



Apply now and show us what you can do:

title: Senior Web Developer (Paid Trial to Long-Term)
description:
Senior Web Developer (Paid Trial to Long-Term)



We are hiring a highly qualified Developer for a paid trial project with the goal of a long-term, part-time to full time partnership. We need an expert who delivers clean, modern, high-performing sites.



The Trial Project: Interactive Landing Page



You will build a complex landing page featuring a custom interactive map (Mapbox/Google Maps) that serves as our project footprint.



Dynamic Data: Markers must pull from an external source (Google Sheets/Airtable).



Custom UI: Branded "shield" markers and a custom blue-themed map interface.



Functionality: Category filtering (Jobs/Reviews/Offices), marker clustering, and interactive detail popups.





Long-Term Expectations (Post-Trial)



Upon successful completion, you will handle multiple medium-complexity builds at scale.



Full Builds: Design and develop conversion-focused layouts from start to finish.



Performance: Guarantee lightning-fast load speeds and mobile-first responsiveness.



Stack: Expert proficiency in WordPress, Webflow, or custom builds.



Requirements

Proven Senior Experience: A portfolio of live, professional-grade websites.



UI/UX Mastery: Strong design sense combined with technical precision.



Reliability: Responsive communication and strict adherence to timelines.



How to Apply (Mandatory)

Portfolio: Provide websites you personally built (specifically highlighting any map/API work).



Your Role: Briefly explain your exact responsibility on each project.



The Map: Which platform do you recommend for the trial (Mapbox vs. Google) and why?



Timeline: Your estimated turnaround for the trial landing page.



APPLY ONLY IF YOU CAN WORK ON THE PAID TRIAL PROJECT IMMEDIATELY.

title: DTC/E-commerce Video Editor - For Ads (Full Time)
description:
Are you a video editor who understands marketing psychology, and specializes in DTC + E-commerce ADS?



We’re hiring a skilled video editor to help us build high-impact content for ads, landing pages, and narrative-based funnels. Your job? Create videos that stop the scroll, build belief, and drive conversions.



If you know how to structure edits to keep cold traffic watching… and turn attention into action… read on



What You’ll Be Doing:

Edit short-form ad creatives for Meta 
 & Instagram + TikTok)



Structure video content that aligns with our funnel journey: Hook ? Problem ? Unique Mechanism ? CTA



Cut and reframe VSLs, listicle-style videos, and UGC mashups



Use motion graphics, B-roll, captions, 
s & sound to boost engagement



Deliver modular video assets we can repurpose across platforms



Must-Have Skills:

Strong editing sense for pacing, attention curves and emotional flow



Ability to build narrative structure, not just pretty edits



Experience with ad-first editing (TikTok, Meta, YouTube)



Confident with Premiere, Final Cut, CapCut or DaVinci



Excellent English comprehension (most voiceovers/scripts are in English)



Strong eye for visual storytelling and retention



Bonus If You Have:

Experience editing performance ads or VSLs



UGC-style editing with punchy subtitles and fast transitions



Familiarity with psychological ad frameworks (AIDA, PAS, etc.)



Background in direct response marketing or e-commerce content



Who You Are:

You think like a marketer, not just a creative



You’re data-minded and care about what gets clicks and sales



You bring ideas to the table (not just wait for instructions)



You’re detail-oriented and always deliver sharp, final-ready edits



You’re reliable, proactive and consistent



Job Details:

Hours: 20–40 hrs/week (negotiable)



Long-term position
